title: Bookkeeper – Australian Accountants Office – Work from home
description:
Bookkeeper – Australian Accountants Office – Work from home - 2 Positions available



We are seeking an experienced bookkeeper based in the Philippines who has real, hands-on experience with Australian GST.



This role is for someone who understands why transactions are treated a certain way under Australian tax rules, not just how to enter data into accounting software.



ABOUT US

Cascade Accounting & Tax is an Australian accounting practice supporting small businesses and professional firms across Australia. We already have four happy Philippines based tea
mbers who have been with us between 13 months and 3 years.

We are a fully paperless, systems-driven firm. Accuracy, documentation, and sound accounting judgement are essential in our work.



THIS ROLE IS A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

• Have practical experience working with Australian GST

• Understand the difference between cash and accrual accounting for GST

• Know why a BAS may not match the GST control account at a point in time

• Can correctly identify GST-free, input-taxed, and mixed-use transactions

• Are comfortable asking questions before coding transactions

• Follow naming conventions and file source documents carefully

• Prefer doing work correctly rather than quickly



THIS ROLE IS NOT SUITABLE IF YOU:

• Only process data in Xero or QuickBooks without understanding the results

• Use suspense accounts to force balances to reconcile

• Guess GST treatment when unsure

• Avoid documenting your work or explaining adjustments

• Expect full independence without following established procedures

• Want to re-invent our effective work procedures



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• End-to-end bookkeeping for Australian clients

• Accurate GST coding and review

• Bank and credit card reconciliations

• Preparation of BAS data

• Identifying and escalating issues clearly

• Maintaining clean, well-structured source documents and workpapers

• Working within documented systems and workflows



SOFTWARE EXPERIENCE

• QuickBooks Online

• Xero

(Software skills are important. Australian GST knowledge is essential.)



WHAT WE VALUE



• Strong accounting fundamentals

• Attention to detail

• Clear written communication

• Professional judgement

• Willingness to say “I’m not sure, I need to check”



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY)



To apply, please
 
 and please include:

1. A short cover message written by you, explaining:

o When you discovered you liked bookkeeping

o Your experience working with Australian GST

o What would you do if an account on a clients’ Balance Sheet showed a significantly different balance to what you expected.

o One common GST mistake you see in Australian client files

2. Your Curriculum Vitae (different to a one-page marketing brochure)

Shortlisted applicants will complete a practical fundamentals of bookkeeping assessment, on zoom with one of our team before being offered and interview.

We assess how you think, not how polished your application looks.



LOCATION & HOURS

• Remote role – work from home

• Ongoing full-time work

• Hours and pay discussed with suitable candidates



ESSENTIAL EQUIPMENT

• PC or Laptop minimum i5 processor; minimum 8 mb RAM (preferably 16 mb)

• Reliable fast internet and backup internet

• Licenced copy of Microsoft Office with operational copies of Word and Excel on your desktop

• At least 2 external monitors of 24 inch or larger

• External keyboard with number pad and mouse

• Noise cancelling headphones with microphone for tea
etings

• Ergonomic desk and chair in quiet location away from other family members

• Extra Adult in home to mind any children under 8 years old during working hours
salary: AUD $7.50 per hour to AUD $15 per hour

title: Remote Level 2 Support Agent - ConnectWise Stack WFH
description:
READ BEFORE YOU APPLY AND SEND YOUR CV TO:







Company Overview

We are a  leading Managed Service Provider (MSP) dedicated to providing

exceptional IT solutions and support to our clients. We pride ourselves on leveraging best-in-

class technology, particularly the ConnectWise suite, to deliver seamless and efficient service.

We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Level 2 Remote Support Agent to join our

technical team.



Position Summary

The Level 2 Remote Support Agent will be a critical member of our team, responsible for

resolving the most complex technical issues, acting as an escalation point for Level 1 and Level

2 technicians, and managing key MSP tools. This role requires deep expertise across the

entire ConnectWise stack and proficiency in related technologies. The ideal candidate must

be capable of providing advanced technical support directly to end-users in a remote

environment while maintaining exceptional customer service standards.

Key Responsibilities

? Advanced Troubleshooting & Escalation: Serve as the final point of escalation for

high-priority and complex technical issues, including server, network, cloud, and security

i
.

? ConnectWise Stack Mastery: Utilize and administer the full suite of ConnectWise

solutions, including:

? ConnectWise Manage (CW PSA): Perform advanced service board

management, workflow automation, reporting, and agreement/billing checks.

? ConnectWise Automate (CW RMM): Develop, deploy, and maintain advanced

automation scripts, monitor system health, and ensure effective remote

management of client endpoints.

? ConnectWise Control/ScreenConnect: Provide secure and efficient remote

support and assistance.

? Tool Management & Administration:

? Onboarding ConnectWise (Continuum/Kaseya Integration): Execute and

manage client and device onboarding processes effectively.

? Auvik: Administer, troubleshoot, and leverage Auvik for advanced network

monitoring and documentation.



? Security & Patch Management: Oversee and execute patch management

strategies. Administer and troubleshoot Bitdefender endpoint security solutions.

? Cyber Remediation: Lead and execute procedures for Cyber Remediation

following security i
.

? Backup & Disaster Recovery: Manage and perform advanced recovery

operations using Axciant 360 recovery solutions.



? Client Support: Deliver professional, timely, and effective technical support to end-

users via phone,
, and ticketing system, ensuring high first-call resolution rates for

Level 2 issues.

? Documentation & Training: Create and maintain detailed technical documentation,

knowledge base articles, and provide mentorship/training to lower-level technicians.

Required Skills and Qualifications

? 5+ years of progressive experience in an IT support role, with at least 3 years in an

MSP environment at a Level 2 or equivalent capacity.

? Expert-level proficiency with the entire ConnectWise stack (Manage, Automate,

Control, Onboarding ConnectWise).

? Demonstrable expertise in ConnectWise PSA (CW Manage) and ConnectWise RMM

(CW Automate) administration and scripting.

? Proven experience with Auvik network management and monitoring.

? In-depth knowledge of security products, specifically Bitdefender and experience with

security response/remediation tools like Cyber Remediation.

? Strong understanding of backup and disaster recovery solutions, including experience

with Axciant 360 recovery.

? Extensive experience with Microsoft server operating systems (Windows Server

2016/2019/2022), Active Directory, Group Policy, and Microsoft 365/Azure

administration.

? Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex

technical issues to non-technical users.

Work Environment

? This is a fully remote position.

? Requires a dedicated, quiet home office space and reliable high-speed internet

connection.

? Must be willing to participate in an on-call rotation for after-hours support as needed.
salary: Depends on the Level you will be hired

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Web Copywriter
description:
Job Title: Web Copywriter

Location: Remote (based in the Philippines)

Working Hours: 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM China Time (lunch break 12:00 to 1:00 pm)

Company Registration: Hong Kong



Compensation and Benefits:

- Salary: 60,000 PHP per month

- 13th-month bonus

- 10 paid holidays per year

- 3 paid sick days per year

- 10 paid vacation days per year

- Overtime paid at 1.25× regular pay (OT may occasionally be required)



About P1peline:

P1peline is a service agency and SaaS platform focused on supporting custom product companies, primarily in the Australian market. We help businesses that sell customized products improve how they market, sell, and operate. Our work spans websites, branding, marketing, content, and digital systems.



We work across a range of industries and client types, including both B2B and B2C businesses. We are building a team that values clear thinking, strong execution, and high standards.



About the Role:

We are looking for a web copywriter who can write clear, useful, high-quality copy across different industries, audiences, and formats.



This role is not just about writing well. It is about understanding a business, identifying its real competitive advantages, and translating those into clear benefits for the target customer. You must be able to adapt your voice and tone based on the brand, audience, and purpose of the content.



You will work closely with web designers, graphic designers, and marketers to create copy for websites, blogs, marketing campaigns, and other business needs.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

- Writing website copy, landing pages, service pages, and other web content

- Writing blog posts and educational content

- Writing marketing copy for ads,
 campaigns, brochures, social posts, and other materials

- Adjusting tone and voice based on different brands and audiences

- Turning business features and competitive advantages into clear end-user benefits

- Writing for both B2B and B2C audiences

- Asking the right questions to understand a client’s positioning, offer, market, and goals

- Working with internal teams to make sure copy supports the design and marketing strategy

- Delivering concise, high-value copy, including in cases with limited word counts



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong ability to write in different voices and tones

- Strong understanding of how to communicate value clearly

- Ability to write for different industries and business types

- Experience writing web page content, blog posts, and marketing copy

- Strong communication skills

- Ability to ask smart, useful questions to gather the right information before writing

- Ability to write clearly without relying on fluff or vague language

- Strong attention to structure, clarity, and usefulness

- Ability to go deep on a topic and produce high-level content

- Ability to write strong B2B copy that prioritizes clarity and useful information over fancy language

- High-quality standards and strong judgment

- Ability to meet deadlines consistently

- Ability to accept feedback and revise work when needed

- High attention to detail and self-quality checking before submission



Important Requirements:

- This is a full-time remote position

- Applicants must submit both a resume and a portfolio

- Applications without a portfolio will not be considered



What We Look For in Portfolios:

- When reviewing portfolios, we will be looking closely at:

- Clear structure and organization

- Writing that delivers useful information instead of empty fluff

- Strong understanding of audience and positioning

- Ability to explain topics clearly and at a high level

- Ability to write concise copy that still communicates real value

- Range across different tones, formats, and industries



How to Apply:

Please send your resume and portfolio. In your application, include examples that show your ability to write across different tones, industries, and formats, especially web copy and B2B content.

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
Perma Products is an Australian product design and retail company creating innovative, high-quality hardware and home improvement products. We partner with major global retailers including Bunnings, Walmart, ALDI, Chewy, Target, and many more, as well as operating our own e-commerce channels. 



Since starting in 1969, we’ve grown into a global business with a diverse portfolio of brands and over 1,000 products. Our focus is simple: build practical, reliable products that make everyday life easier. As we continue to grow, our team works closely together to bring new ideas to market and deliver results that matter. 



Please note that this role will be supporting our Australian team and therefore will be required to work within standard Australian business hours. 



About the Role 



Perma Products is looking for an organised and proactive Operations Coordinator to support our fast-paced operations team. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys organisation, problem solving, and working in a dynamic team environment. 



You’ll support daily operations by assisting with logistics coordination, maintaining accurate system records, and providing responsive customer service. Working remotely, you’ll collaborate closely with the AU operations team to ensure orders are processed accurately, deliveries run smoothly, and customers receive reliable support. 



What You’ll Do 



 You’ll support the day-to-day flow of operations, helping keep orders moving, systems accurate, and customers informed. 



Responsibilities include:  



* Support daily logistics and admin tasks, including order tracking, data entry, reporting, and maintaining accurate system records 



* Monitor dispatch and delivery progress, issue PODs, and help resolve freight, warehouse, and order issues 



* Respond to customer enquiries, provide order and delivery updates, and follow through to resolution 



* Assist with claims, invoice checks, and related documentation, including Bunnings and freight matters 



* Communicate clearly with internal teams and external stakeholders to keep operations running smoothly 



What You’ll Bring 



You’re organised, detail-focused, and enjoy solving problems in a fast-paced environment. 



Skills & Experience 



* 0–2 years in admin, logistics, or customer service (nice to have, not essential) 



* Comfortable using Microsoft Office and
 systems 



* Strong communication skills, written and verbal 



* High attention to detail and accuracy 



* Good time management and organisation 



* Customer-first mindset 



* Willingness to learn and pitch in wherever needed 



Why Join Us 



* Fully remote role with flexibility 



* Strong entry point into operations and logistics 



* Supportive, down-to-earth team 



* Opportunity to learn, grow, and take ownership 



* Work in a business that values initiative and continuous improvement 



Apply Now 



If you’re organised, reliable, and ready to build your experience in operations, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now and join a team where you can learn, contribute, and grow.

title: Remote IT Support Specialist
description:
About Us



At BayNS, we are a Managed Service Provider (MSP) focused on delivering IT solutions and support for architectural firms. Our clients rely on us for managing their IT environments, including Autodesk software, Adobe Creative Suite, Microsoft 365, and secure network infrastructures.



We are seeking a Senior Remote IT Support Specialist with advanced troubleshooting, networking, and IT security skills to join our growing team.



Position Summary



The Senior Remote IT Support Specialist will provide advanced technical support, network troubleshooting, and assist with IT security tasks for multiple client environments. This role requires hands-on experience with Autodesk software, Adobe applications, Windows domain administration, and network security best practices. The ideal candidate has worked for an MSP, preferably supporting architectural firms, and can manage complex IT challenges independently.



Excellent English communication skills (both written and spoken) are essential, as this position requires direct interaction with clients and documentation of processes.



Key Responsibilities



Technical Support & Troubleshooting



Provide remote support for clients using tools such as Splashtop, Remote Desktop, and Zoho Desk.



Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to:

Autodesk (AutoCAD, Revit, Revit plug-ins like pyRevit)

Bluebeam, SketchUp

Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)

Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneNote, SharePoint)



Assist with advanced troubleshooting for design software integrations and plug-ins.



Network & System Administration



Manage and troubleshoot Windows Domain Servers and Active Directory environments.

Perform network troubleshooting, including switches, routers, and access points.

Configure and maintain firewalls and network security devices.

Manage DNS, DHCP, and VPN configurations.



IT Security & Compliance



Perform regular IT security tasks, including monitoring, updates, and reporting.

Support and implement best practices for endpoint security, MFA, and firewalls.

Work on client security initiatives such as patch management, vulnerability scanning, and backup verification.



Operational Tools & Documentation



Use Zoho Desk for ticketing and client communication.

Document processes and client environments in IT Glue.

Plan and manage tasks using ClickUp and Resource Guru.

Follow MSP best practices for ticket handling, escalation, and SLAs.



Requirements



Proven experience working for an MSP (minimum 3–5 years).



Advanced technical knowledge in:

Windows Server administration, Active Directory, Group Policy.

Network administration and troubleshooting (TCP/IP, firewalls, VPNs, switches).



Familiarity with Autodesk products (AutoCAD, Revit), including troubleshooting plug-ins like pyRevit.

Experience supporting Adobe Creative Suite and Microsoft 365 applications.

Strong understanding of IT security concepts and willingness to own security-related tasks.

Experience with remote support tools (Splashtop, RDP).

Knowledge of MSP tools such as Zoho Desk, IT Glue, ClickUp, Resource Guru or similar.

Excellent English communication skills (both written and spoken) for client interactions and documentation.

Strong problem-solving abilities with logic and common sense.

Ability to work independently in a remote environment.



Preferred Qualifications



CompTIA Security+ or equivalent security certification (highly preferred).

Familiarity with architectural industry workflows and software requirements.

Experience with firewall configuration (SonicWall, Fortinet, or similar).

ITIL or other process management certifications.

Experience implementing security policies and compliance requirements.



Key Competencies



Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills.

High attention to detail and organizational skills.

Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Professional written and verbal communication with clients and tea
mbers.



How to Apply



If you are interested in this position, please send us your resume and a cover
 explaining why you are the right fit for this role.

title: Mortgage Support Associate (AU, US, UK, PH, etc. Mortgage Industry)
description:
Role Description:

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Mortgage Support Associate to join our dynamic team. This role demands a strong understanding of the Australian mortgage landscape, from loan structuring and compliance to client relationship management. The ideal candidate will possess deep knowledge of financial assessment, lender guidelines, and be proficient in using mortgage CRMs to ensure seamless support for both brokers and clients.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Client Consultation & Pre-Qualification

- Conduct initial client consultations to assess financial goals and homeownership needs.

- Evaluate client eligibility by reviewing financial data, creditworthiness, and serviceability using Quickli and the 5 Cs of Lending.

- Prepare and issue pre-qualification letters to assist clients in their property search.



2. Mortgage Product Selection & Structuring

- Educate clients on various mortgage options, interest rates, and loan terms.

- Recommend the most appropriate loan solutions based on their financial profile.

- Collaborate with clients to structure loans, balancing fixed or variable rates and flexible loan terms.



3. Loan Application & Documentation Management

- Guide clients through mortgage applications and ensure timely collection of essential documentation (pay slips, tax returns, bank statements, credit reports).

- Utilize CRM platforms such as Salesforce, Creatio, and Salestrekker to manage applications and client files.

- Submit complete application packages to underwriters, ensuring accuracy and completeness.

- Securely handle documents using platforms like DocuSign and Ezidox.



4. Credit Analysis & Compliance

- Analyze credit reports, suggest improvement strategies, and address potential credit barriers.

- Ensure full compliance with Australian mortgage regulations, including the Loan Estimate and Closing Disclosure.



5. Communication & Coordination

- Maintain clear, timely, and professional communication with clients, brokers, lenders, real estate agents, and underwriters.

- Provide updates on loan status and proactively resolve client inquiries and concerns.



6. Negotiation & Rate Lock Assistance

- Assist in negotiating loan terms and conditions.

- Guide clients through the interest rate lock process to secure competitive rates.



7. Post-Closing Support & Follow-up

- Ensure smooth loan settlement by coordinating the preparation of final documents.

- Support clients post-settlement with direct debit arrangements, offset accounts, and other follow-up services.



8. Networking & Lead Generation (if applicable)

- Build and nurture relationships with key referral partners (e.g., real estate agents, financial planners, accountants).

- Leverage LinkedIn, industry groups, and freelancer platforms for lead generation.



9. Continuous Learning & System Optimization

- Stay updated on evolving lender policies, industry trends, and technology tools.

- Collaborate on initiatives to streamline client onboarding and loan processing workflows.



Qualifications

1. End-to-end experience in the Australian Mortgage industry.

2. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills for financial assessments and reporting.

3. In-depth knowledge of mortgage compliance, industry guidelines, and lender procedures.

4. Proficient in Salesforce, Creatio, Salestrekker, ApplyOnline, Mercury, and Equifax.

5. Experience using digital platforms such as Equifax and IDyou for client verification and credit analysis.

6. Proven ability to manage multiple applications and maintain accuracy under pressure.

7. Experience working with Australian aggregators (AFG, Connective, SFG) is a plus.

8. Familiarity with Microsoft Dynamics and the Microsoft 365 Suite, or equivalent platforms.

9. Strong written and verbal communication abilities.

10. Capable of handling confidential information with integrity and discretion.

11. Prior experience in client service or administrative roles is advantageous.

12. Proactive approach to problem-solving, with a willingness to take initiative.

13. Exceptional attention to detail and commitment to accuracy.

14. Adaptable to fast-paced environments and able to manage multiple priorities.

15. Knowledge or background in property management and trust accounting is a plus, though not mandatory.

16. A positive attitude towards continuous learning and professional development, especially in property management systems like PropertyMe or similar software.

title: Operations VA for Airbnb Hosting Company
description:
Who is this role for?



You MUST have previously worked as a Level 2 Case Manager at Airbnb. (Do not apply if you have no experience with Airbnb).

Make sure to mention in your
 what you did for Airbnb, how long you worked there, etc.



Experience working as a VA for a company is not required, but it is a plus. If you have such experience, please mention your role.



What does this job include?

- Communicating with cleaners/inventory and supply management: Coordinate with cleaners the ordering and delivery of supplies on Amazon, ensuring they are sent to the appropriate properties and cleaning teams.

- Communicating with handymen and our Project Coordinator: Ensure that any maintenance issues on the properties are taken care of in a timely manner.

- Invoice Verification: Cross-check invoices from cleaning teams with the Hostaway/Airbnb calendar to ensure accurate billing and prevent charges for unperformed cleanings. Please include the word Apples to your subject line to prove you’ve read the job post.

 us their resume and a 1-minute video explaining specifically what they have learned from the company introduction video above and why they would be a good fit for our company.

title: Amazon Sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team!Seeking one part time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as part time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ?  

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

title: Graphic Designer - Print File Preparation Specialist
description:
About Us

This role works across two established Australian print brands:



DTF Direct - A leading provider of direct-to-film printing for custom apparel and textiles.

The Tshirt Mill - Specialising in high-quality custom printed garments for businesses, brands and events.



We are fast-paced, production-driven businesses with high standards. Accuracy and efficiency matter here. Your work directly impacts print quality and turnaround times.



When applying, please include the word “Precision” in the first line of your application. Applicants who don't do this will not be reviewed. 



About the Role

We are looking for a highly accurate, efficient and dependable Graphic Designer to prepare print-ready files daily.

This is not a conceptual design role. It is a production-focused role that requires precision, consistency, and speed.

Your core responsibility is ensuring every file is 100 per cent correct before it reaches production.

Why Join Us



We value long-term tea
mbers and treat our staff with respect. This is a stable, full-time role with consistent hours and clear expectations.



We offer:

Paid annual leave

Paid public holidays

Stable monthly salary

Clear systems and structured workflow

A supportive but performance-driven team

We believe in rewarding reliability, accuracy and long-term commitment.



You must be:

FAST - Deadlines and accuracy matter 

Extremely detail-oriented

Comfortable working with high daily file volumes

Confident working independently

Proactive in spotting and fixing artwork issues



Key Responsibilities

Prepare print-ready files for DTF printing, including adding white channels, resizing and resolution checks

Create garment mockups with correct sizing and placement guides

Set up accurate print dimensions for front, back and sleeve placements

Ensure Pantone colour matching where required

Double-check all artwork against order specifications

Identify and fix artwork issues before production

Maintain organised file structures and naming conventions

Communicate clearly with production staff, including updates on workload 



What We’re Looking For



Advanced Adobe Photoshop skills - white channel setup is essential



Strong Illustrator skills



Excellent understanding of print resolution, colour modes and file preparation



Highly organised workflow habits



Ability to manage multiple jobs daily without sacrificing accuracy



Strong written English communication



Preferred but not essential:



Experience in DTF printing, garment decoration or screen printing



Important



This role requires full-time commitment during agreed working hours. Applicants currently working in another full-time role will not be considered.



We are looking for someone committed to this position long-term.

description:

The ads you will mainly be creating are AI UGC ads, and AI Voice-over VSL's with B-roll sourced from the internet and/or generated with AI.

Meaning your starting salary can already be around $1,000 USD a month.

title: Podcast Manager with Agency Experience
description:
We are a rapidly growing US-based podcast production and marketing agency looking for a Podcast Manager with agency experience to join our team.



This role is for someone who knows how to manage podcast production at a high level, stay organized in a fast-paced environment, and take real ownership of their work.



If you are ambitious, want to grow fast, take on more responsibility, and build a long-term career inside a stable and growing agency, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



We are not looking for someone who needs constant follow-up, misses deadlines, or does the bare minimum. We want someone who is proud of the work they produce, works ahead, communicates clearly, and wants to grow with a long-term team.



Rate and Hours

• $4 USD/hour

• 20 hours per week to start

• Strong opportunity for long-term growth and advancement within the agency as we continue to expand



What You’ll Be Doing

• Editing podcast audio

• Editing podcast video

• Repurposing long-form episodes into short-form content

• Writing strong show notes

• Creating attractive, clickable episode titles

• Organizing production workflows and content calendars

• Making sure deadlines are met consistently

• Helping keep projects moving without needing to be chased

• Supporting a smooth client delivery process in a fast-paced agency setting



You Must Have

• Previous agency experience, preferably in podcast production, content marketing, or media services

• Experience editing both audio and video

• Experience repurposing podcast or long-form content into clips and promotional assets

• Strong writing ability for show notes and titles

• Excellent organization and time management

• Ability to work ahead and manage multiple moving parts

• Strong attention to detail

• Clear communication

• Reliability and pride in your work

• A mindset of ownership, not just task completion



This Role Is Best For Someone Who

• Takes ownership instead of waiting to be told every next step

• Is proud of the quality of their work

• Wants a long-term role, not just a short-term freelance gig

• Likes being organized and staying ahead

• Can thrive in a fast-paced environment

• Meets deadlines without excuses

• Notices details and solves problems before they become issues



This Role Is Not For Someone Who

• Misses deadlines

• Needs constant reminders or hand-holding

• Applies to every job without reading the post

• Has no agency experience

• Is disorganized or slow to respond

• Produces average work and calls it done



How to Apply

To be considered, please send all of the following:



• Your CV / resume

• Your portfolio

• Your website, if you have one

• A short message explaining your agency experience

• Examples of podcasts or content you have worked on

• The tools/software you use for audio, video, and content repurposing



Please also include the phrase “I take ownership” at the top of your application so we know you read this post carefully.



Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be considered.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with a serious agency and be part of a team that values quality, reliability, and long-term opportunity.

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor (Meta Ads Creative) – Part Time, Remote
description:
Our Mission



To help dental practice owners grow thriving practices through high performing Meta advertising and standout creative.



We are not looking for someone average.



We are looking for a graphic designer and video editor who understands how to create content that actually converts.



If you are someone who can turn ideas into high quality ads that grab attention, stop the scroll, and generate leads, this could be the opportunity you have been looking for.



You will be responsible for creating high-performing ad creatives for dental practices across the UK, including images, carousels, and short-form videos.



If you enjoy creating content, testing ideas, and seeing your work directly impact real business results, this role may be a great fit.



Who We’re Looking For



We are looking for a performance focused creative who:



• Has strong experience in graphic design and/or video editing

• Understands how to create content for
 and Instagram ads

• Can design clean, modern, high-end creatives (not cluttered or outdated)

• Knows how to hook attention in the first few seconds of a video

• Can follow brand guidelines and adapt to different client styles

• Is proactive, organised and comfortable working independently



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys performance driven creative and takes pride in producing work that delivers results.



Your Responsibilities



• Create high-converting ad creatives for Meta campaigns (images, carousels, short videos)

• Edit short-form video content for paid ads (Reels style, UGC style, etc.)

• Design clean, modern graphics aligned with client branding

• Test different creative angles and variations

• Work closely with the ads team to improve creative performance

• Turn briefs into polished, ready-to-launch ad creatives

• Continuously improve based on feedback and results



Experience Required



• Experience in graphic design and/or video editing (portfolio required)

• Experience creating content for social media ads (Meta preferred)

• Strong understanding of what makes a high-performing ad creative

• Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Suite, Canva, CapCut or similar

• Ability to work quickly without compromising quality

• Good attention to detail

• Excellent written and spoken English



What You’ll Get



• Fully remote, part-time role

• Ongoing work with a growing performance marketing agency

• Clear briefs and structured workflow

• Opportunity to work on multiple brands and campaigns

• A results driven environment where great work is recognised



How to Apply



If you believe you can create high quality, high performing ad creatives, we would like to hear from you.



Apply here:





Important:

Along with your application, please send a short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and your experience. This helps us understand who you are and ensures applications are genuine.



Please also include examples of your work (images and/or videos) that demonstrate your ability.



This role is for people who take pride in their creative work and want to be part of a performance focused team. If that sounds like you, we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Capital Markets Advisor
description:
We’re HIRING a Capital Markets Advisor



To apply, please complete this application form:

Only submissions through this form will be considered.

We’re looking for a high-energy, results-driven Capital Markets Advisor to lead Moe’s Group’s external capital strategy. In this role, you will identify, negotiate, and secure funding through loans, private investors, and strategic financial partnerships. Your success will directly fuel our expansion through consistent capital injections and strong, long-term investor relationships.



About Us:

Moe’s Group is a global leader in skincare manufacturing, trusted by over 100 international brands. We combine innovation, quality, and a personalized approach to help businesses scale and succeed in competitive markets. From manufacturing to brand strategy, our end-to-end services are designed to exceed expectations, backed by a team committed to customer satisfaction and long-term success. At Moe’s Group, we don’t just support brands—we empower them to lead.



What you’ll do:

-Lead fundraising and capital acquisition efforts, securing funding through traditional bank loans, private equity, venture capital, and alternative financing sources

-Build, expand, and manage relationships with lenders, banks, private investors, and strategic financial partners

-Serve as the primary point of contact for all external funding sources

-Structure and negotiate loan and investment terms that protect company interests and maximize long-term value

-Identify opportunities to generate consistent weekly or monthly income through strategic capital placements or investment vehicles

-Monitor lending and investment markets to secure competitive rates, favorable terms, and high-value partnerships

-Create and deliver compelling investor pitches and presentations that clearly communicate Moe’s Group’s growth strategy and financial strength



What we’re looking for:

-3–5 years of experience in capital raising, investment banking, corporate finance, or a related field

-Proven track record of successfully securing funding or closing financial deals

-Strong existing network of lenders, banks, or private investors is highly preferred

-Resilience and persistence in navigating the high-rejection nature of fundraising

-Strong financial acumen and ability to simplify complex business models for investors

-Advanced negotiation skills with experience reviewing and structuring financial agreements



Why join us?

-High-impact role directly influencing company growth

-Opportunity to build and lead external capital strategy

-Long-term position with strong growth potential

-Collaborative leadership team and entrepreneurial environment

-Competitive compensation aligned with performance



-Learn more about our company by visiting our website:

title: Experienced Content Creator for DTC Brand
description:
The Role

As a Direct Response Video Editor, you will be instrumental in crafting compelling video

advertisements that capture attention, communicate value, and drive conversions for our


 products on platforms like
. You will be responsible for the video editing

lifecycle, from conceptualization and initial cuts to final delivery, with a keen focus on

performance metrics and direct response principles.



Key Responsibilities:

- Edit engaging and high-converting video ads optimized for
 and other social

media platforms.

- Transform raw footage, user-generated content (UGC), testimonials, and product

demonstrations into persuasive direct response creatives.

- Implement proven direct response techniques, including strong hooks, clear

calls-to-action, compelling pacing, and effective storytelling to maximize conversion

rates.

- Collaborate closely with the team to understand campaign objectives, target

audiences, and performance data to inform creative decisions.

- Iterate on existing video ads based on performance data and A/B testing results to

continuously improve campaign effectiveness.

- Ensure all video content aligns with brand guidelines and platform-specific best

practices.

- Manage and organize video assets efficiently.

Required Skills & Experience

- Minimum of 3 years of proven experience as a Video Editor, specifically collaborating

with international and/or American Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) brands.

- Fluent in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills, capable of

effective collaboration in an English-speaking environment.

- Currently engaged in an active video editing project for a DTC brand, demonstrating

ongoing relevance and expertise.

- Proficiency with Tryatria and Elevenlabs for advanced video and audio manipulation,

including AI-driven voiceovers and creative enhancements.

- Expert-level proficiency in industry-standard video editing software (e.g., Adobe

Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, CapCut).

- Demonstrable understanding of direct response marketing principles and how they

apply to video advertising for e-commerce.

- Strong portfolio showcasing successful direct response video ads that have driven

measurable results (e.g., ROAS, CTR, CVR).

- Experience with A/B testing creative variations and interpreting performance data to

inform future edits.

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment and manage multiple

projects simultaneously.

- Exceptional attention to detail, creativity, and a passion for crafting impactful visual

stories.



Bonus Points

- Experience with motion graphics and animation.

- Familiarity with various ad platforms beyond
 (e.g., TikTok, YouTube,

Snapchat).

- Knowledge of current trends in social media video content and advertising.



To Apply

If you are a results-oriented Video Editor with a passion for DTC e-commerce and direct

response marketing, we encourage you to apply! Please submit your resume, cover letter,

and a link to your portfolio demonstrating your direct response video editing work for DTC

brands. In your cover letter, please highlight your experience with Tryatria and Elevenlabs,

and briefly describe a current project you are working on.



We would like to have a discussion on how the rewarding will be done. Think of a packet pricing for 3-5 video’s. But we are open for suggestions!



We look forward to hearing from you!



Hatim & Larbi

Alignthera

Company Overview:



Alvita Care is a preferred provider of private home care services. We supply premier in-home care

services designed to enhance the well-being, independence & dignity of our clients across multiple

markets. We provide relief and assurance to family members who know that their loved ones are

happy, safe and cared for. We don’t believe in one-size fits all solutions and tailor our care plans to

each individual client’s needs.



It is our mission to ensure our clients are happy, safe, well cared for, and above all treated with

dignity and respect. Alvita is unique in its focus on the entire family unit, not just the senior with

whose care we are entrusted. In addition, we differentiate ourselves from competitors through 24/7

availability (never through an answering service), guaranteed compatibility between client and

caregiver, and RN oversite on every case.



What You Will Do

timely manner, while ensuring outstanding customer satisfaction.

• Communicate openly with other tea
mbers in the department regarding scheduling,

attendance, Client changes in condition, and escalating larger-scale issues as determined

for prompt resolution and follow up.

be able to prioritize staffing cases for no-shows, call-outs, or any missed visits based on the

Client’s needs of care

• Communicate with Clients and their families regarding appointment scheduling, plan of

care updates, any and all changes in schedule

• Maintain and document communication with all Clients in the specified home health

software

month

Department

Who You Are:

• History of achieving the high customer service satisfaction rates

title: RN Case Manager
description:
**To apply, please submit a 2–3-minute video highlighting your experience. 

**RN active New York License REQUIRED



We are seeking a dedicated and experienced Remote RN Case Manager to join our dynamic team. In this pivotal role, you will ensure the highest level of compliance and quality care for our clients. Your responsibilities will include overseeing clinical documentation, managing patient care updates, and supporting the onboarding process for new clients. You will work closely with our per diem RNs and clients to ensure continuity of care and optimal outcomes. As an integral part of our team, you will also play a key role in the recruitment and training of nurses, all while maintaining excellent communication and coordination with our clients.



What You Will Do:

As a member of the Clinical team at Alvita Care, the Remote RN Case Manager is expected to support Operations in the provision of home care for our clients.

• Ensure form compliance with IA and POC updates, and on RN hourly and SNV visits 

• Join New Jersey and Long Island daily market meetings 

• Conduct the clinical portion of the caregiver weekly orientation

• Join welcome calls for new clients 

• Manage clinical portion of all new SOCs for the first 14 days 

• Work with hospitals and sales to obtain any clinical/discharge paperwork

• Conduct clinical consultations for pre-SOC questions, especially for potential nursing clients  

• Manage and train per diem RNs doing IA and POC updates 

• Follow-up with per-dem nurses after client visits

• Assist in onboarding and training per diem nurses 

• Conduct NJ POC phone calls every 60 days for all clients 

• Provide oversight of care and communication to selected clients

• Clinical admin work as needed (e.g., form approvals) 

What You Will Need:

• Registered nurse (RN) with active, unencumbered licensure to practice professional nursing in the states of New Jersey and New York

• 4+ years of experience in acute care setting required

• Experience in home health, home care and/or hospice required

• A bachelor’s degree in nursing is preferred, but not required

title: Product Research Assistant (Simple & Ongoing Work)
description:
???? Product Research Assistant (Simple & Ongoing Work)

We are looking for a Product Research Assistant to help us find potential winning products that we can sell online.

This is a simple, structured, and repeatable role — but it requires real dedication and hard work. We are looking for someone who truly takes this seriously, puts in the effort every single day, and is committed to delivering results.

You will be given:

? Clear step-by-step instructions

? Access to all required tools

? Exact criteria to follow

If you can follow instructions, work consistently, and push yourself to perform — this is the role for you.



???? What You Will Do

Research and find potential products based on our criteria. Use our provided tools and systems. Follow a clear daily workflow. Submit findings and progress updates as instructed.



???? Tools You Will Use

Our internal research tools, ChatGPT, WinningHunter (experience is a plus, not required – training provided)



? Working Hours

Minimum 4 hours per day. Long-term position for the right candidate.



???? Salary & Growth System

We use a performance-based tier system. You start at the base level and can earn your way up by proving yourself:

Tier 1 (Starting): $1.00 USD per hour

Tier 2: $1.50 USD per hour — unlocked when you demonstrate a strong hit-rate on winning products

Tier 3: $2.50 USD per hour — for top performers who consistently deliver results

Paid weekly via PayPal. Please apply only if you fully agree with this structure and payment method.



?? Work Ethic & Expectations

This is not a passive role. We need someone who is:



Willing to put in real work and grind every single day

Open to receiving feedback and acting on it immediately

Easy to reach and responsive during working hours

Hungry to learn and improve



Our team is strict about making sure actual work is being done. If you're looking for something you can coast through, this is not for you. If you're ready to prove yourself and grow with us — we want to hear from you.



???? Monitoring & Reporting

We have a Chief Monitoring Officer who ensures work is being done correctly. You will be required to: send daily updates on your progress and completed work, provide up to 3 short reports per day, and be transparent and responsive during working hours.

Daily reporting is mandatory — we need to see consistent progress to make sure everything is on track.



? Requirements

Stable and reliable internet connection. Fast learner and able to follow instructions. Able to handle information and guidelines. Detail-oriented and consistent. Honest, disciplined, and reliable. Willingness to work hard and take the role seriously.



? Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience with product research. Experience using WinningHunter. Experience using ChatGPT for research tasks.



???? Important

We receive 80+ applications daily for this role. Only applicants who read and understand this post will be considered.



???? How to Apply

Please include: a short introduction about yourself, your internet speed, relevant experience (if any), and confirmation that you accept the tier-based pay system (starting at $1.00/hour), weekly PayPal payments, and daily reporting & monitoring.

This role is ideal for someone who wants simple, structured, long-term work — and is ready to earn their way to higher pay through real effort.

???? Apply now

Compensation

testing new creatives



d
 winners



scaling budgets



preventing creative fatigue

title: Creative strategist
description:
Do you have a passion for analyzing data, spotting trends, and creating ad concepts that actually convert?



Important: To be considered for this role, previous experience in a similar position is required. We are specifically looking for someone who is highly advanced in this field. Applications without strong, relevant experience will unfortunately not be reviewed. Please include clear information about your past roles and any work samples/case studies that demonstrate your expertise.



We’re looking for a Creative Strategist to join our team and help take our digital advertising to the next level!



About the Role



As a Creative Strategist, you’ll work closely with us and our video editors to develop and improve our advertising concepts. You will analyze our top-performing ads, research competitors and their strategies, and create ideas and rough drafts for new ad concepts that our editors will bring to life. The role requires strong communication skills, creative thinking, and a data-driven mindset.



Your Main Responsibilities



Analyze ad performance to identify what works best



Research competitors and map out their strategies



Develop ad concepts and draft creative ideas



Collaborate with editors to bring concepts to execution



Provide insights and strategies to improve ad performance



Use AI tools to streamline analysis, ideation, and research



We Believe You Are



Highly experienced – you’ve previously worked as a Creative Strategist, in performance marketing, or in a similar role, and possess advanced skills in this area (this is a requirement)



Creative & data-driven – you enjoy combining analysis with idea development



Communicative – you express yourself clearly and professionally



Structured – you can manage multiple projects at once and deliver on time



Tech-savvy – you’re curious about AI tools and know how to use them in your daily work



We Offer



A creative and growth-focused role with significant responsibility



A positive team with clear processes



Flexible remote work with freedom under responsibility



The opportunity to influence ad strategy in a growing company



Employment type: Part-time / Full-time

Work location: Remote

Working hours: Minimum 15 hours per week

Start date: Immediate



Job Type: Full-time, Part-time

title: Researcher / Admin
description:
About the Role



We are hiring a highly driven, detail-oriented Researcher / Admin to help support our operations and research team. This is a hands-on role for someone who works with urgency, takes ownership, and holds themselves to a high standard.



We are looking for someone who is accurate, fast, organized, and not afraid of hard work. The right person should be coachable but also strong-minded, able to receive direct feedback, improve quickly, and stay focused on hitting goals. This role requires someone who cares about getting things right, can think critically, and knows how to tell the difference between real information and bad information.



This is not a low-pressure role. We want someone with a strong work ethic who can move quickly, handle repetition without losing focus, and maintain high standards even under pressure. We are looking for someone proactive, reliable, and serious about growth within the company.



What You’ll Do



- Conduct research related to the entertainment industry

- Verify information for accuracy and determine what is credible and what is not

- Support admin and operational tasks tied to data quality and internal workflows

- Review information carefully and catch errors before they become bigger problems

- Maintain a high level of accuracy while working quickly

- Follow systems and processes while also noticing when something could be improved

- Assist with updating, organizing, and maintaining internal data

- Work alongside internal tools and AI systems as part of the workflow

- Help improve output by being consistent, thorough, and dependable

- Take feedback seriously and apply it quickly

- Contribute to a culture of high standards, urgency, and accountability



Who We’re Looking For



- Extremely detail-oriented and accurate

- Strong researcher who knows how to verify facts and assess source credibility

- Fast worker with a strong sense of urgency

- Highly organized and dependable

- Comfortable with direct feedback and able to improve quickly

- Strong work ethic and willing to put in the effort needed to get the job done

- Able to handle repetitive work without letting quality slip

- Self-motivated and does not need constant hand-holding

- Process-oriented but also able to think critically

- Serious, accountable, and focused on results

- Comfortable working outside normal hours or on weekends when needed



Preferred Background



- Experience in research, admin, operations support, or data entry and verification

- Strong online research skills

- Experience verifying information across multiple sources

- Entertainment industry knowledge is a plus

- Experience working with internal systems, databases, or AI tools is a plus

- Experience in fast-paced environments with high standards is a plus



What Success Looks Like in This Role



- Work is completed quickly and accurately

- Errors are caught before they create larger problems

- Information is verified carefully, not guessed

- Feedback is applied quickly and performance improves over time

- Tasks are handled with urgency, ownership, and consistency

- The person becomes someone the team can rely on completely



Candidate Profile



- Move fast without sacrificing quality

- Care about accuracy and getting the details right

- Are comfortable being held to a high standard

- Can take direct feedback without getting defensive

- Have a strong work ethic and do not make excuses

- Notice problems and take initiative

- Want to grow within a company that values performance

title: Creative Director - E-commerce (Luxury Brand)
description:
Before anything else…



We can definitely tell when a message feels overly dependent on or fully generated by AI. Nothing wrong with using AI (we all do!), but if you really want to stand out, we’d love to hear your voice. Your taste. Your thinking. Your creative energy.



!! How to Apply (Read Carefully) !!

Incomplete applications won’t be reviewed. If you’re applying for a Creative Director role, attention to detail and the ability to follow direction is kind of the bare minimum.



1. Use “Creative Director” as your
 subject line.

2. In your message, include: A short introduction about yourself

3. A link to your resume and portfolio

4. Your availability to start

5. Your desired starting rate ($/hour)



JOB TITLE: Creative Director



Key Responsibilities:

- Lead the creative direction and execution of Cabana’s visual identity across all platforms

- Drive the design of products, packaging, campaigns, website visuals, and digital content

- Collaborate cross-functionally to tell one cohesive brand story

- Review, refine, and elevate all creative output to ensure luxury-level consistency

- Translate strategy into stunning visuals that capture the heart of our audience

- Inspire and guide the design team while staying hands-on when needed



Bonus: Step in as Brand Designer for key campaigns or special projects



Qualifications:

- 2–3+ years of experience in art direction, brand design, or creative leadership

- Strong portfolio showcasing visual identity work across digital and print

- Mastery of design systems, typography, color, and composition

- Experience in lifestyle, luxury, or wellness brands

- Detail-oriented, collaborative, and obsessed with visual storytelling

- Strong project management skills — able to run projects end-to-end and keep timelines tight



Bonus:

- Good sense for copywriting (you think visually and verbally)

- Proficiency in Figma, Framer, or similar tools



Why Work with Cabana?

- Work from anywhere that sparks your creativity

- Flexible schedule (just a few shared US hours for collaboration)

- Paid Philippine holidays

- Supportive, no-drama team

- Build a luxury wellness brand that blends science with style



Role Overview:

At Cabana, design isn’t just how we look, it’s who we are.



As our Creative Director, you’ll shape and elevate Cabana’s visual world across every touchpoint — from our website and campaigns to packaging and branded experiences. This role is about bringing beauty, intention, and storytelling into every pixel.



You’ll collaborate closely with our Brand Designer, Front-End, and Web teams to bring our luxury wellness vision to life. Every detail should feel thoughtful, modern, and unmistakably Cabana.



Perfect for someone who lives for aesthetics, thrives on creative energy, and knows how to turn a brand into a feeling.





About Cabana:

Cabana is where science meets style, a modern luxury wellness brand redefining what it means to look and feel your best. We offer science-backed treatments like GLP-1s and hormone therapies, helping people live with more confidence, energy, and ease.



We’re building something beautiful. At Cabana, you won’t just design visuals, you’ll help shape a world where wellness feels elevated, effortless, and deeply personal.

title: Shopify Chargeback & Dispute Specialist – Low Base + HUGE Commission Upside
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company currently experiencing a high volume of chargebacks (specifically via Klarna and Shopify Payments). We are looking for two (2) highly experienced and analytical Virtual Assistants to join our team and focus 100% on managing, fighting, and winning these disputes.



The Pay Structure (Read Carefully):

We want to reward actual results.



Base Pay: $1/hour.



Performance Commission (The real money): We offer a very generous commission and tier-based growth structure. At the end of every month, we calculate the total amount of money you have saved us by successfully overturning and winning chargebacks. A significant percentage of those saved funds will be paid directly to you as a bonus.



In short: If you are an expert at winning chargebacks, you will make a lot of money with us. If you don't know what you are doing, this job is not for you.



Your Daily Responsibilities:



Monitor our Shopify dashboard daily for new chargebacks and disputes.



Systematically gather all necessary evidence for each case (tracking numbers, delivery confirmations, customer communication, risk analysis).



Submit highly professional and compelling evidence to Shopify Payments/Klarna to win the dispute.



Keep a detailed tracker (e.g., in Google Sheets) of all pending, won, and lost disputes.



Analyze the root causes of chargebacks and suggest operational improvements to prevent them.



What We Are Looking For:



Proven Experience: You MUST have prior experience working as a Customer Service Rep or E-commerce Manager handling chargebacks, specifically within Shopify.



Knowledge of the System: You understand how payment gateways (like Klarna and Stripe/Shopify Payments) evaluate evidence.



Attention to Detail: You know that a missing tracking link or a poorly written explanation can cost us a case.



How to Apply:

To filter out automated applications, please reply to this post and include the following:



Your Process: Walk us through your exact step-by-step process for fighting a "Product Not Received" chargeback versus a "Fraudulent Transaction" chargeback. What are your secret tricks to winning?



Your Data: What was your average "win rate" (%) at your previous jobs?



Your Experience: Tell us about your past roles handling Shopify disputes.



References: Please provide at least one reference (or case study/screenshot of past success) that can verify your skills.



Applications that do not answer these four points will be ignored. We are looking to hire and onboard immediately.

title: Real Estate Operations & Leasing Manager (Virtual)
description:
[ATTENTION: To be considered, please start your cover letter with the word "VALLEJO" in all caps.]



ABOUT THE ROLE: We are seeking a proactive, tech-savvy, and highly articulate Virtual Assistant to serve as the "Front Office" for a landmark 94-suite office building in Vallejo, CA. You will be the first point of contact for prospective tenants and the primary liaison for our existing business community.



This is not a simple data-entry job. You will be helping us execute a major modernization and rebranding of the property. You will manage the leasing pipeline, coordinate with our on-site manager, handle billing/operations, and drive our digital presence.



We are the new owners of this building and you will be in charge of the transition of data from previous systems to our new systems. This is a highly demanding job that requires focus, dedication, and hard work.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



1. Leasing & Prospect Management (Sales)



Act as the primary voice for all incoming leasing inquiries via phone and
.



Pre-qualify prospective tenants (asking about business type, move-in dates, and budget).



Schedule property tours for our On-Site Manager using a shared digital calendar (Calendly/Google Cal).



Follow up with leads post-showing to push for lease signatures.



2. Tenant Operations & Billing



Manage all existing tenant communications regarding billing, lease renewals, and rent collections.



Onboard new tenants into our Property Management Software (e.g., AppFolio/Buildium).



Coordinate maintenance requests: Receive the request, log it, and dispatch the On-Site Manager or vendors to resolve it.



3. Online Presence & Marketing



Maintain and update the property website (WordPress/Squarespace).



Manage our Google Business Profile to ensure high visibility and 5-star reviews.



Execute local SEO strategies to ensure we are the #1 search result for "Office space in Vallejo."



Draft and post available suites on LoopNet, Crexi, and social media.



4. Team Coordination



Daily "sync" with the On-Site Building Manager to ensure all physical tasks (showings, repairs, move-outs) are completed.



Provide weekly reports to Ownership on occupancy, lead volume, and collection status.



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE:



Fluent English: Must have near-native verbal and written English skills. You will be speaking with American business owners daily.



Property Management: 1–2 years of experience in property management or real estate is highly preferred (ideally commercial/office).



Tech Stack: Proficiency in Google Workspace, Property Management Software (AppFolio, Buildium, etc.), and basic Web Management (WordPress).



SEO/Digital Marketing: Proven experience improving search rankings or managing business social media accounts.



Work Ethic: Highly organized, able to manage 90+ individual tenant relationships without getting overwhelmed.



WHY JOIN US? You will be working directly with the owners during an exciting "Value-Add" phase of the property. We value autonomy, clear communication, and results. If you are someone who enjoys building systems and seeing a project grow, this is the role for you.
