title: LEGAL VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — JACKSON LAW FIRM, P.C.
description:
About Us

Jackson Law Firm, P.C. is a personal injury and workers' compensation law firm based in St. Louis, Missouri. We represent injured clients throughout the St. Louis area in automobile a
 cases, premises liability, workers' compensation, and related matters. We are growing and looking for a sharp, organized, and highly motivated Legal Virtual Assistant to join our team and deliver excellent service alongside our attorney.



What You Will Do

Answer all incoming calls via RingCentral; collect client information and connect calls to the attorney

Manage the attorney's Google Calendar — schedule consultations, client calls, court appearances, and depositions (no same-day scheduling without explicit attorney approval)

Triage and manage the firm's Gmail inbox; draft routine correspondence for attorney review and approval before sending

Order and track medical records using YoCierge, the firm's primary records retrieval platform; obtain attorney approval before submitting any order

Prepare medical authorization bundles for client signature using YoCierge's YoSign electronic authorization system, with paper backup authorizations available when needed

Organize and maintain all client files in CasePeer case management software using the firm's file naming conventions

Assist in migrating existing client files from Google Drive into CasePeer

Open insurance claims and send Letters of Representation (LORs) to adjusters for attorney review

Assist with bill verification and demand letter preparation

Submit a daily End of Day Report covering completed tasks, problems encountered, and incomplete items



Requirements

4-year university degree or international equivalent — required

Exceptional spoken and written English — clear, professional phone presence is non-negotiable

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple matters simultaneously

Proficiency in Google Suite — Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Google Docs

Ability to learn new software quickly — CasePeer and YoCierge training provided

High attention to detail — especially in document naming, file organization, and correspondence

Self-starter who follows through without constant supervision

Reliable high-speed internet connection and quiet, professional home office environment

Prior legal or medical administrative experience is a strong plus but not required







Compensation & Terms

Item

Details

Salary

$1,500/month

Schedule

Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

Annual Bonus

Eligible for annual performance bonus at attorney's discretion based on firm performance

Annual Raise

Annual salary review at end of each calendar year

Probationary Period

90 days with benchmark reviews at Day 30, 60, and 90

Vacation

15 working days per year

Sick Leave

Per applicable firm policy

Payment Method

Monthly via Wise (international bank transfer)





How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with subject line: Legal VA Application — [Your Name]



IMPORTANT — Read This Before Applying

To demonstrate your attention to detail, your application
 must begin with the following phrase:



     "Jackson Law Firm runs on excellence."



Applications that do not open with this exact phrase will not be reviewed.





Your resume or CV

A brief cover letter (3–5 sentences) explaining why you are a strong fit for this role

A 1-minute video introduction — upload to YouTube (unlisted) and include the link. Tell us who you are and why you want this role.

Answer these two questions in your
: (1) Describe a time you managed multiple urgent tasks at once — what did you do? (2) What experience do you have with legal or medical terminology?



We are reviewing applications on a rolling basis and looking to hire immediately. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: COST CONTROLLER – CONSTRUCTION
description:
Hey! I'm Jeff and have successfully hired, trained and worked with dozens of Filipinos. I live in America but sincerely love your country, your people and the kind heart your culture has. Please read on for more info about this job. Very excited to speak with you. 



I have not hired for a position like this before so I am not sure for salary. But the way I run things, I look to pay as much as I can not as little as I can. Also i'm happy to offer 13th month compensation and raises based on performance. God bless!



Full-Time | High Impact Role



THIS IS NOT AN ENTRY-LEVEL POSITION.



Our Construction company has been building in the Baton Rouge area for 28+ years. We have a strong reputation and a growing pipeline.



What we need now is someone who can PROTECT PROFIT.



If you don’t understand job costing at a deep level — this is not for you.



If you wait until month-end to find overruns — this is not for you.



If you’re afraid to question project managers or ownership about numbers — this is not for you.







WHAT YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR



• Knowing the financial status of every job at all times

• Tracking committed costs vs. actual costs daily

• Identifying budget leaks BEFORE they become losses

• Holding projects accountable to budget

• Reviewing every subcontractor invoice for accuracy

• Managing change order cost impact

• Weekly job cost reporting to ownership

• Cash flow forecasting

• Making sure every dollar is coded correctly



You will work directly with ownership. This role has visibility and authority.







WHAT WE EXPECT



• 3–7+ years construction job cost experience

• You understand WIP reporting and percent-complete accounting

• Strong Excel skills (pivot tables, forecasting, analysis)

• Experience with construction software (Buildertrend is a plus)

• You are comfortable having hard conversations

• You are proactive, not reactive







WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



• No surprise cost overruns

• Clear weekly financial visibility

• Improved gross profit margins

• Tight controls on subcontractor billing

• Clean, reliable financial reporting





COMPENSATION



Competitive salary based on experience.

High performers will be rewarded.







WHO SHOULD APPLY



Apply if you:

-Love clean numbers

- Hate waste

- Get satisfaction from tightening systems

- Think like an owner



Do NOT apply if:

- You need constant supervision

- You avoid confrontation

- You only want to “process paperwork”





HOW TO APPLY



Submit your resume and answer these three questions:

    1.    What was the annual revenue volume of the construction company you last worked for?

    2.    How did you identify and correct a cost overrun?

    3.    What KPIs do you track weekly on active construction projects?



We are serious about hiring the right person.



If you want to build systems, increase profit, and be part of a company that does what it says it’s going to do — apply.

title: Credit Repair Specialist
description:
Job Type: Part-Time (30-40 hours per week)

Starting Pay: $2.50/hour 



Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented, reliable, and motivated Credit Repair Specialist to join our growing team. As a Credit Repair Specialist, you’ll assist clients by reviewing their credit reports, identifying inaccurate or unverifiable information, and helping facilitate disputes to improve their credit standing. You will play a key role in transforming lives by helping clients build the credit they need for financial success.



Key Responsibilities:

* Review and analyze client credit reports (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)

* Identify errors, inaccuracies, or unverifiable items

* Prepare and submit disputes to credit bureaus and furnishers

* Maintain accurate documentation of all client interactions and updates

* Communicate with clients professionally via phone,
, and/or chat

* Follow up on disputes, update clients on progress, and educate them on next steps

* Collaborate with internal tea
mbers to ensure timely results



Requirements:

* Fluent in English (spoken and written)

* Reliable laptop or desktop computer with internet access

* Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

* Ability to work independently and manage time effectively

* Professional communication and a customer-first attitude



Preferred (Not Required):

* Prior experience in credit repair 

* Familiarity with DisputeFox software 

* Knowledge of FCRA and credit bureau processes

title: Remote Home Care Recruiter – Full Recruitment System Owner
description:
We are a licensed home care agency serving seniors in Minnesota. We hire caregivers who allow older adults to remain independent in their homes.



We are looking for a full-time remote recruiter with minimum 2 years experience, who will own the entire caregiver recruitment system from start to finish.



This is not a resume-reviewing role.

This is a systems role.



You will:

Forecast hiring needs by geographic area

Manage job postings and applicant flow

Answer incoming applicant phone calls

Screen and qualify candidates

Track pipeline metrics

Ensure we never run short on caregivers in key service areas

You will work directly with leadership, scheduling and HR.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Recruitment System Ownership

Maintain and improve our caregiver recruiting pipeline

Track KPIs: applicants per week, interviews scheduled, hires, cost per hire

Keep weekly recruiting dashboard updated

Identify bottlenecks and fix them



2. Applicant Handling

Answer inbound applicant phone calls (during defined hours)

Conduct structured phone screenings

Schedule interviews

Follow up with incomplete applicants



3. Forecasting & Workforce Planning

Review weekly scheduling data

Identify geographic gaps (city-level forecasting)

Recommend when and where to increase job ads

Anticipate shortages 30–60 days in advance



4. Job Advertising

Post and manage job ads (Indeed,
, local boards)

Test and improve ad copy

Track performance by source



5. Reporting

Weekly hiring report

Pipeline health report

Geographic coverage report



REQUIRED SKILLS

Mastery in English (written and spoken)

Comfortable handling  extensive phone calls daily

Experience recruiting hourly workers (healthcare preferred)

Strong spreadsheet skills (Google Sheets or Excel)

Organized and process-oriented

Comfortable working with metrics and data

Please respond with the word Gemini on the subject line when responding



WHAT WE VALUE

Ownership mentality

Clear communication

No drama, no excuses

Process improvement mindset

Data-driven decisions

title: Salesforcde Experince admin
description:
Here’s your final job ad with the test built in — clean, sharp, and filters out weak candidates immediately



Salesforce Admin / Automation Specialist (Part-Time

12



We’re a fast-moving UK promotional merchandise company working with major global brands. We are looking for a high-level Salesforce Admin who can go beyond basic admin and actively build, optimise, and automate workflows.



If you’re just doing data entry or basic CRM upkeep — this role is not for you.



?



What You’ll Be Doing:

   •   Designing and building automated workflows in Salesforce

   •   Creating systems that reduce manual work

   •   Cleaning and structuring data for automation readiness

   •   Building and maintaining reports, dashboards, and pipelines

   •   Managing integrations (Apollo, APIs, third-party tools)

   •   Identifying inefficiencies and fixing them proactively



?



What We’re Looking For:

   •   Strong experience with Salesforce automation (Flows, Process Builder, etc.)

   •   Ability to think commercially, not just technically

   •   Experience building end-to-end CRM workflows

   •   Confident working independently and making decisions

   •   High attention to detail

   •   Excellent written English



?



Bonus (Highly Valuable):

   •   Experience with 
 or outbound sales tools

   •   API / integration experience (Zapier, Make, etc.)

   •   Experience in sales-driven businesses



?



Hours & Pay:

   •   10–15 hours per week

   •   Flexible working hours

   •   Long-term role

   •   Pay reflects skill level — we want quality, not cheap



?



Test Task (Required – Do Not Skip)



We want to see how you think.



Scenario:

We generate leads via Apollo and import them into Salesforce.

The data is messy, duplicated, and not structured properly.



We want to:

   •   Clean the data automatically

   •   Assign leads to the correct salesperson

   •   Trigger follow-ups and tasks

   •   Track everything clearly in Salesforce



Your Task:

Explain briefly:

 1. How you would structure this workflow in Salesforce

 2. What automations (Flows/processes) you would build

 3. How you would handle duplicate data

 4. How you would assign leads automatically

 5. What key fields and stages you would create



Bonus:

Suggest improvements or tools you would use



Keep your answer concise. No generic answers.



?



To Apply:

Include:

 1. Your Salesforce experience (brief)

 2. Example of a workflow/automation you’ve built

 3. Your hourly rate

 4. The word “AUTOMATE” at the top of your application

 5. Your answer to the test task above



?



We’re looking for someone who can take ownership, build systems, and make the business more efficient — not someone who waits for instructions

title: Customer Communication & Operations Support
description:
Strive Sports and Health is a growing allied health clinic with locations in Sydney. We help people move better, recover properly, and stay active — not just get short-term pain relief.

 

We're looking for a Patient Communication & Online Presence Coordinator to manage our digital front door: patient messages, online reviews, and our Google presence.

 

This role directly affects how patients perceive us, whether they book, and whether they return.

 

This is not a "respond and forget" role.

This is not a temporary gig.

This is a long-term position for someone who wants to stay and grow.

 

 

WHAT YOU'LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR

 

Responding to Podiu
ssages promptly and professionally

Every message is a potential patient. You don't just reply — you guide conversations toward bookings and next steps.

 

Managing our Google My Business presence

Creating and scheduling regular GMB posts

Keeping our profile active and engaging

Maintaining our online visibility

 

Responding to Google reviews

Thanking positive reviews warmly

Addressing negative reviews professionally without being defensive

Showing potential patients we care about feedback

 

As you prove yourself, you'll take on:

Managing NPS score distribution and follow-up

Building Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) so the next person after you has a clear playbook

Other patient experience and operational tasks

The opportunity to shape how this role evolves

 

 

WORKING HOURS

 

38 hours per week

Monday–Friday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEST (7 hours/day)

Saturday: 3-hour morning shift

 

If you can't commit to this schedule consistently, don't apply.

 

 

COMPENSATION

 

Starting rate: $500 AUD per month while you prove yourself

 

This is intentionally set low to start. Here's why:

We've been burned by people who talk well in interviews and disappear after a month

We need to see reliability, quality, and consistency before we invest more

Show us you're excellent, and your pay will increase accordingly

 

If you're offended by this approach, this isn't the role for you.

If you understand it and are confident in your abilities, we'll reward that quickly.

 

 

WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

 

You will NOT just copy-paste template responses

You will NOT ignore messages and hope they go away

You will NOT say "Thank you for your message" and leave it at that

You will NOT treat this as a stepping stone to something else

You will NOT disappear after 2-3 months

 

If you're looking for a temporary position while you find "something better," move on.

 

 

WHO YOU ARE

 

You have excellent written English

Not just "good enough" — excellent. You're representing a healthcare business.

 

You're proactive, not passive

When someone asks a vague question, you ask follow-up questions to help them.

When someone says "I'll think about it," you don't just say "okay" — you help them d
.

 

You want a long-term position

You're tired of hopping between jobs. You want stability and the chance to grow somewhere.

 

You're reliable and self-motivated

You don't need someone checking on you every hour. You manage your time and get things done.

 

You're comfortable with feedback and improvement

We'll tell you when something needs to change. You don't take it personally — you adjust and improve.

 

You have a professional work setup

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, backup power if needed

 

 

EXPERIENCE WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 

Previous VA or admin experience (at least 1 year)

Experience managing customer/patient communication

Familiarity with Google My Business (preferred but not required)

Experience with review management (preferred but not required)

Healthcare or service industry background is a bonus

 

Mindset matters more than perfect credentials.

 

 

THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

 

You job-hop every 3-6 months

You need constant hand-holding

You're uncomfortable with the starting pay structure

You can't commit to the Saturday shift

You're applying to 50 jobs and hoping something sticks

You want to "try it out" and see how it goes

 

 

WHAT WE OFFER

 

Stable, long-term employment for the right person

Consistent schedule — no random hours or shift changes

Direct communication with management

Clear path for pay increases based on performance

Opportunity to grow your responsibilities and skills

Chance to help build something instead of just executing tasks

 

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

To prove you've read this entire post:

 

1. Start your message with "LONG-TERM READY"

2. Tell us about your longest VA or admin position: how long, what you did, why it ended

3. Describe a time you had to respond to an angry or negative review/message — what did you say?

4. Confirm you can commit to the full schedule (Mon-Fri 10-5 AEST + Saturday 3hrs)

5. Why are you looking for a long-term position specifically?

 

Applications that don't include these will be deleted without reading.

 

 

START DATE: Immediate (after interview process and trial period)

 

 

FINAL WORD

 

We're not looking for someone perfect.

We're looking for someone reliable, coachable, and committed.

 

If you want a long-term home where you can grow, prove yourself, and increase your income based on performance — this is it.

 

If you want a quick gig with no accountability, this isn't it.

title: Mechanical Explainer Video Editor (How Things Really Work Style)
description:
We're building a YouTube channel that explains how machines, vehicles, and industrial systems really work — from jet engines to tower cranes to garbage trucks.



We need an editor who knows how to:



- Research and source stock footage of machines, vehicles, and industrial systems independently

- Cut and combine footage into a clean, flowing narrative

- Add motion graphics: arrows, labels, and technical diagrams directly onto footage

- Create cutaway / X-ray overlay effects that show what's happening inside a machine

- Build smooth, retention-optimized pacing (no dead 
nts)

- Add immersive sound design for machines and mechanical systems

- Make complex systems feel visually simple and satisfying



You will receive:

- A finished script

- A voiceover file

- The topic & visual direction



Everything else — finding the right footage, building the visuals, assembling the video — is your responsibility.



Workload: Minimum 1 video per week. Consistent delivery is required.



The goal is simple: The video should NOT feel like raw clips slapped together.



We're aiming for documentary-quality explainer content — clean, professional, and visually satisfying. Think Discovery Channel meets modern YouTube packaging.



Budget: $50–70 per video (10–15 min). Long-term collaboration and bonuses possible.



If you:



 Have experience editing factual / educational / explainer content



Know how to source stock footage independently



Can add motion graphics and cutaway diagrams



 Can deliver minimum 1 video per week reliably



Can show past work in a similar style



D
 with your portfolio.



Serious editors only — quality and attention to mechanical detail matters more than speed.

title: AI-Native Retention & Lifecycle Marketing Operator — DTC Ecommerce (Full-Time, No Agencies)
description:
IMPORTANT: This is a full-time, dedicated position. We are not looking for agencies, freelancers juggling multiple clients, or part-time contractors. If you cannot commit full-time to one company, please do not apply.



The Company

We're a fast-scaling DTC company running two brands — one in pest control and one in sports & games — at a combined 8-figure annual run rate and growing 300–500%+ year over year. We operate with a lean, remote, global team and an AI-first culture where every tea
mber is expected to be on the cutting edge of agentic AI tools.

We've replaced the traditional model of separate
 designers, copywriters, and retention specialists with AI-native operators who use tools like Claude, Manus, and Cursor to own an entire channel end-to-end. If you think AI means "pasting a prompt into ChatGPT" — this isn't the role. If you're building agentic AI workflows that understand your customer avatars, product nuances, and awareness stages deeply enough to produce entire
 campaigns in hours — keep reading.

What This Role Actually Looks Like

You own
 and SMS as a revenue channel, end to end. No one is designing your
s for you. No one is writing your copy. You're the operator:



Building and optimising the full flow architecture — welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, winback, browse abandonment, sunset, VIP, and more

Planning and executing the campaign calendar — weekly/monthly sends tied to promotions, launches, and seasonal 
nts

Driving list growth through popup strategy, lead magnets, quiz funnels, and opt-in optimisation

Designing and writing every
 using AI tools to produce on-brand, high-converting content at speed

Building smart segments to increase relevance, boost engagement, and reduce unsubscribes

Working with the creative team to conceptualise new ad angles, scripts, and creative directions

Reporting on
/SMS as a % of total revenue, plus open rates, click rates, revenue per recipient, and list health

Supporting ad copy and landing page copy as a secondary responsibility



Who You Are



2–5+ years hands-on in DTC
/SMS marketing with proven revenue results (not just open rates)

You deploy agentic AI at a deep level — building AI workflows with rich context about your products, customer segments, purchase behaviour, and brand voice. Not just asking an LLM to "rewrite this
." You should be able to describe a specific agentic system you've built and the output it produced.

Deep experience with Klaviyo (or Omnisend, Postscript, Attentive)

Strong copywriting instincts — you understand direct response, storytelling, and what makes people click and buy

You know what great
 design looks like and can produce it using AI — you're the quality filter, not the pixel-pusher

Data-driven — you track your KPIs religiously and optimise based on performance, not gut feel

Self-starter who ships fast in a remote, async environment without needing to be managed



Bonus



Experience building quiz funnels or interactive lead magnets

SMS marketing experience (Postscript, Attentive, Klaviyo SMS)

Managed retention for brands doing $1M+/year

Worked in sports, outdoor, home, or pest control DTC brands



Details



Full-time remote position — this is not a freelance or agency engagement

Async-friendly global team across US, Europe, and Asia

$2,000–$4,000/month depending on experience and location

Two brands: 1 pest control, 1 sports & games — combined 8-figure annual run rate

Stack: Shopify, Klaviyo, Meta Ads, Asana, Slack, Claude, Notion

AI-first culture with a monthly AI challenge and the expectation that you're constantly pushing the boundaries



How to Apply

Send us:



A brief intro on why this role excites you

1–2 examples of
 flows or campaigns you've personally built (include revenue metrics if possible)

Describe the most effective way you've deployed agentic AI to multiply the volume and quality of your marketing output. Be specific — what was the system, what context did you feed it, what did it produce?

Confirm that you are available for a full-time, dedicated position (not freelance or agency)

Your salary expectations

title: Job Opportunity: Video Editor
description:
About Us:

Practice Acceleration is a healthcare business coaching agency dedicated to empowering healthcare business owners. Our mission? To help healthcare business owners double their income and halve their clinical hours.

We're seeking a talented Part-Time Video Editor to collaborate with our full-time editor in crafting compelling visual narratives for broadcasting and digital platforms.



Position Overview:

As a Video Editor, you'll play a vital role in assembling raw footage into polished, broadcast-ready content. From case study videos to organic reels and podcast audios, you'll bring our marketing campaigns to life through your editing prowess. This position reports directly to our Marketing Manager, and you’ll be working alongside our current full-time video editor, offering an exciting opportunity to contribute to our creative endeavors.



Key Responsibilities:

Edit and produce engaging case study videos, ensuring they align with our brand identity and marketing objectives.

Craft captivating organic reels that resonate with our target audience, driving engagement across social media platforms.

Collaborate with the marketing team to develop video content for various campaigns and initiatives.

Implement our organic content strategy across different digital channels, ensuring consistency and quality.

Contribute to
 ad creative, leveraging your editing skills to create eye-catching visuals that drive results.

Assist with editing YouTube videos, maintaining our channel's standards of excellence and viewer engagement.



Qualifications:

Proficiency in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro).

Strong understanding of visual storytelling principles and techniques.

Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.

Detail-oriented with a keen eye for aesthetics and design.

Prior experience in video editing or related field preferred.



Schedule and Compensation:

Part-time position: 20 hours per week. 8am to 4pm PH timezone

Monthly salary: $1400 AUD

Fully remote, contractor position



If you think this role is for you, please send me an
 with your most current Resume with your portfolio.



PS. Make sure you write “Master Editor” in the subject line of your
 for your Resume to be reviewed.

title: Lead Manager/Appointment Setter- Real Estate Sales
description:
We are actively looking to add a Lead Manager to our real estate investment firm.



This role involves speaking with both new and existing leads, with the primary goal of qualifying prospects and setting appointments for our acquisitions team to present offers.



Responsibilities include calling inbound and outbound leads using RingCentral and Wayv Dialer, following and internalizing a proven script, taking detailed notes during and after each conversation, and accurately categorizing and updating leads in our CRM (GoHighLevel). You will also be responsible for handling a high volume of calls, consistently following up with leads, and hitting daily KPIs and performance targets.



This position is ideal for someone who has strong English communication skills, confidence on the phone, a willingness to learn and improve daily, and a results-driven mindset. This is a performance-driven role where consistency, effort, and communication directly impact your success and income.



We offer a base salary along with performance-based bonuses for each contract signed and deal closed. This position will begin as part-time, with the opportunity to transition into a full-time role in the coming months based on performance and company growth. There is also clear potential for advancement into acquisitions or leadership roles for top performers.



We are a fast-paced, results-driven team focused on growth and continuous improvement, and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long term.





Hiring process includes 2-3 rounds of interviews. Start date: April 6th, 2026

title: Digital Marketing Appointment Setter
description:
Named one of Oregon’s 100 Best Companies to work for, Threo, is a rapidly growing company that helps executives thrive by unpacking their purpose. We are a recognized leader in providing digital marketing, business coaching and franchise consulting. We are looking for a Digital Marketing Appointment Setter to join our team. This will help us effectively accomplish our mission to help 1,000 families deliver their love letter to the world. Through providing the structure to support their purpose so that eternal profits are multiplied.



Role Overview

A Digital Marketing Appointment Setter will be focused on connecting with qualified prospects and scheduling appointments while training to become a Junior Franchise Consultant, Digital Marketing Closer or Recruiting Account Manager. 



Core Responsibilities



1. Lead Management & Appointment Setting

• Grow digital marketing and mastermind client base through outbound cold calling on business owners.

• Schedule qualified candidates with opportunity specialists



2. Sales Support & Development

• Join closing calls for franchise/marketing mastermind candidates

• Establish new client relationships

• Learn and execute qualification scripts

• Support senior sales team



Core Values and Principles



People-First Philosophy

• Prioritize health/relationships and people over profits, genuine care for clients' success, treasure and champion greatness in people



Integrity and Professional Standards

o Show integrity in all actions, 100% legal and ethical conduct, show up professionally, follow through on commitments



Track record of performance and excellence 

o Top performer while valuing work-life balance, you have an entrepreneurial spirit, and you can build business from scratch

What We Offer



Competitive Compensation 



Professional Development 

o Career growth opportunities as we will develop you to be a top producing:

? Executive Recruiter

? A Digital Marketing Sales Agent

? A Junior Franchise Consultant

? No prior franchise knowledge required - comprehensive training provided on our scripts and processes.



Work-Life Balance 

o No travel required

o Full or part-time position (minimum few hours daily between 8AM-8PM EST)

o No working nights, weekends, or holidays

title: Junior/Senior Recruiter & Franchise Appointment Setter
description:
About Us

Named one of Oregon’s 100 Best Companies to work for, Threo, is a rapidly growing company that helps executives thrive by unpacking their purpose. We are a recognized leader in providing franchises and executive recruitment. We are looking for both a Senior Recruiter and a Junior Recruiter/Franchise Appointment Setter to join our team. This will help us effectively accomplish our mission to help 1,000 families deliver their love letter to the world. Through providing the structure to support their purpose so that eternal profits are multiplied.

Having Recruiting experience would be AMAZING, as you could apply for the Senior Role, however you don’t need to know anything about recruiting or selling franchises before applying. 



Role Overview

A Junior Recruiter & Franchise Appointment Setter will be focused on connecting with qualified prospects and scheduling appointments while training to become a Junior Franchise Consultant. No prior franchise sales knowledge, or executive recruiting skills required as there is comprehensive training provided.

If you are interested in our Senior Recruiter role the main responsibility would be establishing and managing client relationships and leading the candidate sourcing team. 



Core Responsibilities

1. Lead Management & Appointment Setting

• Serve as primary point of contact for all incoming leads

• Screen and qualify inbound prospects

• Schedule qualified candidates with opportunity specialists

• Conduct initial screening calls

• Follow-up on sales presentations



2. Sales Support & Development

• Join closing calls for franchise/marketing mastermind candidates

• Establish new client relationships

• Learn and execute qualification scripts

• Support senior sales team



3. Business Development

• Grow recruiting client base through outbound calling on current hiring managers.

• Negotiate and close client service agreements



(FOR SENIOR RECRUITER) - Recruitment Leadership

• Manage full-cycle recruitment processes and team collaboration. 

o Provides guidance and mentorship to candidate sourcing team to ensure quality standards.

o Leads and manages recruiters guiding them to use proactive sourcing techniques and managing their KPIs. 

o Collaborates on job descriptions with hiring managers.



Core Values and Principles

People-First Philosophy

• Prioritize health/relationships and people over profits, genuine care for clients' success, treasure and champion greatness in people



Integrity and Professional Standards

o Show integrity in all actions, 100% legal and ethical conduct, show up professionally on Zoom and in person, follow through on commitments



Track record of performance and excellence 

o Top performer while valuing work-life balance, you have an entrepreneurial spirit, and you can build business from scratch



What We Offer

Competitive Compensation 



Professional Development 

o Career growth opportunities as we will develop you to be a top producer, as both an executive and franchise recruiter, as well as a Niche Mastermind group leader and business coach.

? No prior recruiting or franchise knowledge required - comprehensive training provided on our scripts and processes.



Work-Life Balance 

o No travel required

o Full or part-time position (minimum few hours daily between 8AM-8PM EST)

o No working nights, weekends, or holidays

description:

title: Social Media Content Creator & Video Editor (Reels, Posts, Veteran Brand)
description:
We are looking for a creative and reliable Social Media Content Creator to help turn our existing photos and videos into engaging social media content.



Our company, Veteran Command, is a veteran-owned brand focused on honoring the journeys of military service members. Our flagship product is the DTS Map (Deployments, Travels & Service Map), a personalized map that allows veterans to document where they have served, deployed, and traveled.



We already have a large library of photos, videos, and content. We need someone who can take this content and turn it into high-quality social media posts.



What You’ll Be Doing:



• Editing short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

• Creating image posts and carousel posts

• Designing simple quote graphics

• Cutting longer videos into short clips

• Highlighting the product in a natural, story-driven way



You are NOT creating content from scratch. You are repurposing and editing existing media.



Content Style:



We are NOT looking for generic or spammy content.



We want content that feels:



• Clean and modern

• Story-driven and engaging

• Authentic and meaningful

• Emotionally connected to military service



Brand Tagline:

Trails of Valor — Where Journeys Define Legacy



Weekly Output Expectations:



• 3–5 posts per week

• 2–3 short videos (Reels)



Tools You Can Use:



• Canva

• CapCut

• Adobe tools (optional)



Requirements:



• Experience creating social media content (Reels preferred)

• Ability to turn raw content into engaging posts

• Strong attention to detail

• Good English communication

• Reliable and consistent



Bonus (Not Required):



• Experience with military or veteran-related content

• Understanding of storytelling or brand marketing



IMPORTANT (READ CAREFULLY):



To apply, include the word ARES at the top of your application.



Also include:



• Links to content you’ve created

• Your favorite editing tool

• A short sentence explaining why you think you’d be a good fit



Applications without this will be ignored.



This is a long-term opportunity. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the brand.

title: Freight Sales Representative
description:
The primary responsibility of this role is to identify, develop, and manage shipper relationships to generate freight opportunities for our brokerage.

The ideal candidate has strong sales, negotiation, and communication skills, understands the U.S. freight and logistics industry, and can work efficiently during U.S. business hours.



Key Responsibilities



• Identify and prospect new U.S.-based shippers through cold calling,
 outreach, LinkedIn, and lead generation tools.

• Build and maintain a pipeline of potential shipping customers.

• Develop relationships with shippers to secure consistent freight opportunities.

• Present the company’s transportation services and solutions to potential clients.

• Grow existing shipper accounts.

• Provide excellent customer service and communication with clients.

• Monitor loads and ensure on-time pickup and delivery, when/if the freight coordinator is absent.

• Maintain accurate shipment information in the Transportation Management System (TMS) and CRM.

• Maintain accurate records of sales activities, calls, and prospects.

• Track performance metrics including calls made, loads secured, and revenue generated.

• Provide regular updates to management on sales progress and opportunities.



Qualifications

• Previous experience in freight brokerage or logistics sales is preferred.

• Experience selling U.S. transportation services is highly preferred.

• Strong English communication skills (spoken and written).

• Ability to work U.S. time zones.

• Proven ability to perform cold calls, sales outreach

• Strong negotiation and relationship-building skills.

• Self-motivated with the ability to work independently in a remote environment.



Technical Requirements

• Reliable high-speed internet connection.

• Quiet home office environment.

• Computer with headset for daily calls.

• CRM systems

• Transportation Management Systems (TMS)

•
 and communication tools (Microsoft Teams, Zoom, etc.)



Preferred Skills

• Knowledge of U.S. trucking lanes and freight rates.

• Experience with DAT, Truckstop, or similar load boards.

• Familiarity with carrier operations and freight brokerage processes.

• Background in B2B sales, logistics, and customer service.



Compensation

• Competitive base pay

• Performance-based commission

• Opportunity for long-term growth within a growing U.S. freight brokerage.



Why Join Us

• Work remotely with a growing U.S. logistics company.

• Performance-based earning potential.

• Supportive team environment

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
We are looking for a full time virtual executive assistant.  You will be fully trained but you will also own your responsibilities.  This means that we will train you, but you will be an integral part of our team who will be responsible to hit our targets.  



We are a real estate acquisition company and we buy houses in several markets in VA. You will be responsible for marketing, admin, management of leads, and other duties as assigned.  



We are not looking for a team member who just communicates by email. We are looking for a highly engaged team member who wants to be part of our team.  You must be available to work full time M-F 9a.m-6p.m eastern time.  You must be available to participate in web conference throughout the workday.  Our core values are important to us and if you think these represent you, we would love to interview you. Please take a look at the attached word document.  We will train you on all functions, but please familiarize yourself with job duties.



When applying, please write "I have reviewed the job description attached" in the first sentence of your application and add a smiley face.



Our Core Values Are:

• Ownership and Accountability: Take the INITIATIVE to bring about positive results and not waiting for others to act.

• Growth: We grow personally and professionally every day and push ourselves to the max

• Leadership: Become One, Mentor One...and if you don't want to lead anyone else, lead yourself

• Excellence through HABITS: Form the right habits, and excellence will follow



Project Type: Ongoing project



You will be asked to answer the following questions when submitting a proposal:

1. Are you available to work M-F 9a.m-6p.m eastern time?

2. Is your internet fast enough to participate in Zoom?

3. What is most appealing to you about this position?



DETAILS

Personal / Virtual Assistant



What will you do?

These are the standards a well-above-average performer will maintain or exceed

• Provide consistent availability to do tasks as needed



Essential Duties and Responsibilities

• Manage/sort & respond to emails

• Manage CRM

• Manage marketing campaigns for text, cold calling, and direct mail

• Help with transaction coordination and documentation

• Receipt management

• Attend zoom meetings with team leader and record notes

• Be available by zoom with minutes notice 8 hours a day to help with any random tasks

• Be prepared and knowledgeable to help with social media marketing and website administration

• Follow-up with clients and garner positive reviews

• Ensure all leads are followed up with daily

• Communicate with sellers and buyers

• Manage basic website and Google business profiles



Communications/Interactions

• Buyers/sellers/vendors – daily



Management Responsibilities

• Communicate daily or more often with team leader on responsibilities



Knowledge/Skills

• Excellent at building rapport

• People oriented

• Strong English written and verbal communication skills

• Good organizational skills

• Fast learner and able to teach yourself new systems and develop new processes

title: Outbound Reply & Appointment Setter
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce agency going into year 7 that helps DTC brands scale through paid ads,
/SMS, and user-generated content. We need someone who owns the inbox after a lead replies to our outbound campaigns. Your job is to respond fast, handle objections, book the sales call, and follow up until it's closed out.



Why You'll Love This Job



- Uncapped earning potential

- You'll own the booking pipeline: clear role, clear impact

- Work with proven scripts, sequences, and systems already in place

- Grow into a leadership role as our outbound operation scales

- Great work culture with a positive team





What You'll Do



- Respond to all positive replies within 5–10 minutes during working hours

- Handle objections in writing and move leads toward a booked call

- Execute follow-up sequences over a 90-day window for non-booked leads

- Track all conversations and outcomes in a shared system

- Work with the team lead to refine reply scripts over time





Who We're Looking For



- Minimum 1 year of appointment setting or SDR experience (mandatory)

- Proven ability to handle objections in writing

- Strong written English, clear, confident, and natural (not robotic)

- Reliable internet and availability during US Eastern or Pacific hours

- Experience in ecommerce or the marketing/agency space is a big plus





Hours & Location



- Remote

- Full-time (~40 hours/week)

- Must be available during US business hours





Compensation $300 USD/month base + $30 per qualified booking. OTE is $750–$900/month to start, with strong upside as call volume grows. Top performers can expect $1,100–$1,200/month+!



We're looking forward to meeting you!

title: Senior Media Buyer / Ad Specialist
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

We are No Problem Marketing, an Australian creative and digital solutions agency working across digital advertising, content, and web development. We move fast, value creativity, and focus on results.

We work with clients across automotive, real estate, and more. Every day is different. Our environment is fast paced, collaborative, and built around problem solving.





ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking a data-driven and proactive Senior Media Buyer to take full ownership of our paid acquisition channels. In this role, you won’t just be "pressing buttons"; you will be the strategic lead responsible for launching, managing, and scaling high-performance campaigns across Meta 
/Instagram), Google Ads, and Tiktok Ads.



The ideal candidate thrives on data, understands the nuances of direct-response creative, and is obsessed with tracking the entire customer journey from the first click to a booked leads or sales.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

*Campaign Management: Plan, build, and optimize full-funnel ad campaigns across Meta, Google, and Tiktok Ads to drive consistent conversions and revenue.

*Performance Monitoring: Conduct daily audits of campaign performance, monitoring key metrics including CPL, CTR, ROAS, and CPA to ensure maximum profitability.

*Creative Strategy: Lead the end-to-end creative iteration process by analyzing performance metrics and collaborating with copy and design teams to produce high-impact, data-driven assets.

*Testing & Scaling: Structure campaigns for aggressive creative testing and audience research. Identify winning strategies and scale budgets while maintaining efficiency.

*End-to-End Tracking: Monitor the lead flow from the initial ad click through to the final booked appointment, ensuring attribution accuracy and funnel health.

*Communication & Reporting: Participate in weekly strategy calls, provide proactive updates on issues, and deliver clear, insight-led reports (CPA, ROAS, MER, etc.) to stakeholders.





QUALIFICIATIONS

*Experience: Minimum 5 years of proven experience as a Media Buyer or Media Planner, preferably within the Australian (AU) market.

*Work Schedule: Fully available for the Australian Eastern Time (AET) business day (9AM to 6PM)

*Technical Proficiency: Deep understanding of media buying tools, platform algorithms, and industry best practices.

*Communication: Exceptional written and verbal communication skills; ability to explain "the why" behind the data.

*Problem Solving: A proactive mindset for troubleshooting underperforming campaigns and navigating compliance-sensitive niches.

*Negotiation: Demonstrated ability to build relationships and manage vendor/client interactions effectively.





WHY JOIN US?

*You will have the autonomy to drive results and the support of a creative team to bring your vision to life. We value transparency, proactive problem-solving, and a "win-fast, learn-faster" mentality.

*We operate in a dynamic, high-trust environment where proactive communication is the standard. This collaborative framework allows us to pivot quickly, align our vision across teams, and execute complex strategies with precision.

*We offer a highly competitive compensation package including a market-leading base salary and a performance-based incentive structure designed to reward high-impact results.



CONTRACT DETAILS

Full time contractor (40 hrs per week)

$2,000 AUD per month, paid via Wise

Work from home with overlap in AEST/AEDT hours

Paid PH public holidays + 20 paid leave days per year

Optional performance bonus tied to delivery metrics and client satisfaction



HOW TO APPLY

Send a link to your CV or Resume.

Loom video with a 1-2 minute introduction.

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
description:
"We are looking for a detail-oriented team player with a passion for technology..."   Yuck. Let's skip that.



We need a full stack engineer who can build anything we throw at them. Not a ticket-taker. Not someone who needs a Jira board and a standup to write a function. A builder. Someone who ships real products, solves real problems, and moves fast enough to make big teams jealous.



You should already be using AI tools to write and deploy code faster than anyone around you. If you're not prompting Cursor, Claude, or Copilot daily, you're already behind.



WE ARE NO PROBLEM

We're a young, fast-moving Australian team building performance-driven digital products and marketing for some of the hungriest automotive and real estate businesses in the country.



We don't just build websites. We build SaaS platforms, marketing tools, internal systems, and the infrastructure that holds it all together. Right now we're building marketing platforms for car dealers and real estate businesses. Both need serious engineering. APIs everywhere. Complex frontend. Database architecture. Payment systems. Notifications. The works.



On top of that, we run client websites, manage servers, and handle the full tech stack for the business. You'd be the technical backbone.



THE ROLE

This is a full stack, full ownership role. You will:

*Build and ship web applications from spec to production (Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Tailwind CSS)

*Design and integrate APIs - vehicle data, payment gateways, CRM/DMS systems, SMS and
 providers

*Own database architecture (PostgreSQL via Supabase - schema design, RLS, migrations, edge functions)

*Build frontend with modern React (TanStack Query, React Hook Form, Zod, Server Components)

*Create internal tools, dashboards, and admin panels

*Manage and update client websites (WordPress and custom)

*Handle VPS server admin - deployments, security, DNS, SSL, monitoring

*Domain management,
 config, hosting migrations

*General IT/sysadmin tasks. You're the tech person. If it's technical, it lands on your desk.

*This is not a 'build one component and wait for code review' role. This is a results role.





WHO IS THIS FOR

You'll thrive here if:

*You've got 3+ years building and shipping real web applications

*You're strong in TypeScript, React/Next.js, and PostgreSQL

*You've deployed full stack apps end-to-end, not just worked on pieces

*You're comfortable on Linux servers, SSH, Git, CI/CD, and cloud platforms (Vercel, AWS, DigitalOcean, whatever)

*You already use AI coding tools daily (Cursor, Claude, Copilot) to ship faster than anyone else

*You've got a portfolio, a GitHub, side projects, something - proof you have a passion for building things even in your spare time

*Your English is strong, written and verbal. You'll be working directly with the founder every day.

*You don't need hand-holding

*You care more about shipping great products than job titles or org charts



BONUS POINTS IF YOU HAVE:

*Experience with Supabase, TanStack Query, Zod, React Hook Form

*WordPress dev and management experience

*IT admin / sysadmin / hosting experience (VPS, cPanel, Cloudflare, DNS)

*Marketing experience or exposure to the digital marketing world

*Experience with marketing APIs (Meta/Facebook Ads API, Google Ads API, analytics platforms, CRM integrations)

*Stripe or Xero API integration experience

*Exposure to automotive, real estate, or lead generation industries

*Experience building AI-powered features (LLM APIs, embeddings, vector search, chatbots)

*UI/UX design skills or Figma experience

*We care more about hunger, ability to learn, and what you've actually built than how many years you've been in a seat.



If you're a wizard who picks up new languages and frameworks overnight because you understand the fundamentals deeply enough that syntax is just detail - we want to talk to you.



WHAT WE'LL GIVE YOU

*Real products to build, not busywork

*Direct access to the founder. No middle management. No layers.

*Autonomy. We set the direction, you figure out how to get there.

*As many Cursor, Claude, and Codex credits as you could ever need

*A fast-moving environment where your work actually matters

*Flexibility to work from anywhere in the Philippines



WHAT WE WON'T GIVE YOU

*Micromanagement

*Excuses

*Comfort zones

*A bloated sprint process



WORKING HOURS

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM - 6:00 PM Australian time (AEST/AEDT)

Remote - work from wherever you want in the Philippines

You need reliable internet and a backup connection. No exceptions.

Daily communication via WhatsApp and video calls

The Numbers

Here's the offer:

PHP 120,
,000/month (AUD ~$3,000/month)

Full-time contract, paid fortnightly

Compensation reviewed based on performance and contribution

HOW TO APPLY

Send us:

1. Link to Your CV/resume

2. A link to your portfolio, GitHub, or projects you've shipped. This is non-negotiable. No portfolio, no review.

3. A short note (2-3 sentences): What's the most interesting thing you've built recently? How are you using AI in your development workflow right now?



If you don't put effort into the application, don't bother.



***

If you want a slow, predictable, ticket-punching dev job - this isn't it.

If you want to build real products, move fast, and work with a team that rewards output - apply.

title: Lead Transactions Coordinator & Executive Assistant
description:
I’m a real estate entrepreneur based in Dallas, Texas, running two connected businesses: a real estate sales team that helps buyers and sellers, and a property management company that operates furnished co-living rentals. We use ClickUp for task and project management and Google Drive as our primary file system. We also use Buildium as our main property management tool.



I’m looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Transaction Coordinator to manage the flow of transactions from contract to close, making sure deadlines are met and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role combines transaction management with systems coordination. You’ll handle communication between agents, clients, title, and lenders — while also ensuring that files and documents for each transaction are organized and fully documented.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Manage all real estate transactions from contract to close

- Communicate with agents, clients, title companies, and lenders to ensure smooth closings

- Schedule showings, enter listings, and draft proposals

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and documentation compliance

- Create and update SOPs and workflow documentation for transaction processes

- Coordinate with automation partners for system improvements



YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF

- 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (or a similar role in real estate operations)

- You follow instructions exactly and don’t cut corners

- You write and speak clearly in English

- You stay calm managing many moving parts

- You take ownership and don’t need hand-holding

- You take initiative: you spot issues early, investigate, and propose next steps/solutions

- You use good judgment and can prioritize without being told every step

- You thrive in a fast-paced environment and can adapt quickly as priorities shift

- You are tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and reliable under deadlines

- Understanding of contract timelines, title/lender coordination, and client communication

- Flexibility to work some hours on weekends is preferred





ROLE DETAILS

- Full-time, remote

- Schedule: Mon–Fri, aligned with CST

- Pay: $5-7 USD/hour, based on experience

- Long-term role with growth and bonuses



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

We do not review platfor
ssages.

Applications that don’t follow instructions are disqualified.



STEP 1 —

1. Send an
 to 

2. Subject line: Lead Transactions Coordinator – [Full Name]

3.
 body must include only:

- A short greeting

- A Google Drive folder link

- Your answer to the Detail Check (see Step 3)



STEP 2 — GOOGLE DRIVE FOLDER

1. Create a folder named: [Your Full Name] — Lead Transactions Coordinator Application

2. Set sharing to “Anyone with the link can view.”

3. You can organize the folder however you think is best. I will be looking at both what you submit and how you organize it.

4. Include the following:

a. Resume (PDF)

b. Tech and Setup

   - Include a screenshot of your internet speed showing download and upload speeds. 

   - Include a screenshot of your computer specs showing RAM, processor, and OS.

   - Include one photo of your current workspace (desk and computer).

c. Written Answers (one Google Doc)

   - Transactions Coordinator Experience

      - Describe one property management role or company you worked with. Include:

      - Number of properties/units

      - Your day-to-day responsibilities

      - Tools you used 

   - Taking Ownership

      - We already have SOPs and systems, but they’re still improving.

      - What would you focus on in your first 2 weeks to keep operations running smoothly without needing constant supervision?

d. Systems Proof (2–4 screenshots)

   - At least 1 “HQ” or home base view you’ve built (for a founder/team)

      Example: a dashboard, control panel, or main view in ClickUp, Asana, Notion, etc.

   - At least 1 project management board or folder structure you created

      Example: a tool for maintenance tracking, tenant or leasing pipeline, or vendor coordination

   - For each screenshot, add a short caption (this can be in a small Google Doc or directly on the image as text), including:

      - What the system is used for

      - Which tool it’s in (ClickUp, Asana, Google Drive, Notion, etc.)

      - What part you personally designed or organized

   - If you cannot share screenshots from a previous client because of confidentiality, you may recreate a similar structure in a fresh workspace (with fake data) and take screenshots of that instead.

e. Video Introduction (2–4 minutes)

   - Who you are and where you’re based

   - Your Transactions Coordinator experience (+team leading)

   - Example of handling multiple stakeholders at once

   - How you personally stay organized



STEP 3 — DETAIL CHECK

At the very bottom of your
 (under the Drive link), write only the price per square foot for this property:



3384 P Avenue, Plano, TX 75074 – Sold for 255,555 USD.



Just include the final price per square foot number, with no explanation.



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT

-
 application screen

- Systems portfolio review

- Paid sample task (1-2 hours)

- Interview

- Hire

title: We're Hiring: AI-First Developer to Build Chatbots, Automations & Scalable Tools
description:

What You'll Be Working On





Hybrid Chatbot with AI Mode



Build a chatbot that blends logic-driven chat flows ("if this, then that") with an AI-powered Q&A mode

AI mode should stay focused on conversion—guiding users toward booking consultations

Think: smart, smooth, user-friendly, and conversion-focused



Process Automation



Help us streamline business ops using a mix of tools and custom code

You'll work with 
, Zapier, n8n, or write your own lightweight logic where needed

Where possible, we want AI integrated into processes to handle repetitive tasks or intelligent decision-making



Productised Marketing Tools



Help us turn our marketing know-how into scalable SaaS-style tools

Build internal or customer-facing apps that allow smaller clients to self-serve ads, lead tracking, or reporting

This will be a key part of our long-term growth strategy





Tech Stack & Tools We Love (and hope you do too)



AI-first development (ChatGPT, Copilot, Replit Ghostwriter, etc.)

Replit (for rapid prototyping and deployment)

Vercel (for front-end hosting and serverless functions)

Supabase (for instant backends, auth, and real-time databases)

Familiarity with APIs, webhooks, low-code tools, and modern dev workflows is a big plus





Who We're Looking For



A technical problem solver with a startup mindset and a builder’s instinct

Someone who embraces AI-assisted coding to build faster and smarter

You’ve got live project examples to share—and are happy to take on a small trial task to show what you can do

You move fast, love feedback, and care more about results than writing code "the old-fashioned way"

Bonus points if you’ve worked on chatbots, SaaS tools, automations, or client dashboards





What You’ll Get



Fair pay from day one

A chance to build products with purpose

A long-term partnership opportunity where we grow (and earn) together

A team that values creativity, contribution, and moving quickly toward real impact





Ready to Show Us What You Can Do?



Drop us some live project links, tell us what AI tools you use, and if it feels like a fit, we’ll give you a quick test project to kick things off.



Let’s build smart, fast, and together.

title: Executive Operations Coordinator/ VA
description:
About Winston Gray:



Winston Gray is a boutique business transformation firm working with founders, CEOs, and leadership teams navigating growth, complexity, and change. Our work re-creates and re-defines businesses by creating operational efficiencies, removing bottlenecks and streamlining processes. 



Winston Gray is one of the fastest growing business transformation firms in Australia, working with medium to extra large commercial companies.

We value, calm, disciplined, and clear individuals that are eager to grow, improve, and share best practices from their experiences. 



Position Overview:



The Executive Operations Coordinator provides structured operational and administrative support to the Founder to ensure the smooth running of sales processes, meetings, hiring logistics, and internal business systems.

This role is execution-focused and requires strong organisational capability, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently. The position does not involve strategic decision-making or client advisory work. The primary objective is to ensure operational flow, coordination and follow-through across the business.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Sales & Pipeline Administration

• Coordinate scheduling for prospect and client meetings

• Prepare meeting logistics including calendar invites, video links, and documentation

• Send follow-up communications after meetings as directed

• Issue proposals and supporting documents

• Maintain CRM records and pipeline tracking

• Monitor open sales items and ensure timely follow-up



2. Meeting Coordination & Follow-Through

• Draft and distribute meeting agendas where required

• Capture meeting actions and decisions

• Circulate concise post-meeting summaries

• Track and monitor completion of agreed actions



3. Hiring & Contractor Administration

• Coordinate interview scheduling

• Prepare and track contractor agreements and NDAs

• Support onboarding logistics including access, folders and tool setup

• Maintain organised hiring documentation



4. Business Operations & Systems Administration

• Maintain structured digital filing systems

• Ensure contracts and key documents are stored correctly



5. Calendar & Capacity Management

• Manage Founder calendar in line with agreed scheduling principles

• Protect meeting buffers and prevent unnecessary clustering

• Coordinate scheduling adjustments as required

• Flag capacity or scheduling risks proactively



Required Experience & Skills:

• Minimum 3 years’ experience in an Executive Assistant, Operations Coordinator or equivalent senior administrative role

• Experience supporting founders, executives or senior leaders

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills

• High level of organisational discipline and attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple priorities independently

• Professional discretion and confidentiality

• Familiarity with a CRM system and/or project management tool e.g 
, Asana, etc.



Growth Opportunity:



As Winston Gray grows, this role has the potential to expand into a broader Operations Manager or Chief of Staff like position, subject to performance and business needs.

description:
We are currently looking for a remote Acquisition Assistant to support our operations in California. This role will play a key part in assisting the acquisitions team with day-to-day administrative and operational tasks. 1. Direct mail marketing.

2. Online marketing (social media).

- Respond to all leads in a timely manner to drive business forward.

purchase agreement and other business administration paperwork in advance of real estate transactions.

title: Real Estate Lead Manager
description:
Lead Manager (Follow Up Boss Specialist)

Location: Remote (U.S. hours preferred)

Company: The Melissa Miller Group | eXp Realty

Compensation: Base + Performance Bonuses (based on appointments set & pipeline performance)

Position Overview

The Melissa Miller Group is seeking a highly organized, proactive Real Estate Admin Assistant / Lead Manager with direct experience supporting a real estate team and working inside Follow Up Boss (FUB).

This role is critical to the growth of our business. You will be responsible for ensuring every lead in our database is properly managed, followed up with, and converted into qualified appointments.

Our agents focus on showings, negotiations, and closings—you will ensure the pipeline stays active, organized, and moving.

Key Responsibilities

1. Lead Management & CRM Oversight (Follow Up Boss)

Manage and maintain all leads within Follow Up Boss

Ensure 100% of new leads are contacted quickly and properly categorized

Update lead statuses, notes, and next actions daily

Monitor and clean up:

“New” leads

“Attempted contact”

Stale or inactive leads

Ensure no lead is left untouched or without a follow-up plan

2. Lead Engagement & Appointment Setting

Respond to and follow up with:

New inbound leads (Zillow, website, ads, etc.)

Existing database leads

Conduct initial outreach via:

Calls

Text messages

s

Qualify leads based on:

Timeline

Motivation

Buying power

Set appointments directly on agent calendars

3. Database Activation & Lead Nurture

Re-engage cold and dormant leads

Implement follow-up campaigns and drip systems

Identify opportunities within the database to generate new business

Increase overall database activity and engagement

4. Lender Coordination

Connect qualified buyers with our preferred lender

Track pre-approval progress

Follow up with leads to ensure financing steps are completed

5. Agent Support & Accountability

Monitor agent pipelines within Follow Up Boss

Identify:

Missed follow-ups

Incorrect statuses

Leads needing attention

Update CRM on behalf of agents when necessary

Communicate regularly with agents regarding lead status and next steps

6. Reporting & KPI Tracking

Track and report daily/weekly metrics:

Leads contacted

Conversations

Appointments set

Lender introductions

Maintain CRM accuracy and performance visibility

Required Qualifications

2+ years experience working with a real estate team

Hands-on experience using Follow Up Boss (REQUIRED)

Proven experience in:

Lead management

Inside sales or ISA role

Appointment setting

Strong understanding of:

Real estate sales pipeline

Buyer journey (lead ? appointment ? contract ? close)

Excellent communication skills (phone, text,
)

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Ability to multitask and prioritize in a fast-paced environment

Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with:

Zillow Flex / Premier leads

CRM automations and drip campaigns

Bilingual (English/Spanish) is a plus

Experience supporting high-volume real estate teams

Key Traits for Success

Proactive (does not wait to be told what to do)

Results-driven and accountable to metrics

Strong sense of urgency (speed-to-lead mindset)

Problem-solver and critical thinker

Team-oriented with a positive attitude

Performance Expectations

Success in this role is measured by:

Speed and consistency of lead follow-up

Number of appointments set

Database activity and cleanliness

Improvement in lead-to-appointment conversion rates

Why Join The Melissa Miller Group?

High-performing, growth-focused real estate team

Strong lead flow and proven systems

Opportunity for growth and increased responsibility

Performance-based bonuses tied to results

How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume

A short video (2–3 minutes) explaining:

Your experience with Follow Up Boss

Your approach to lead follow-up and conversion

Any relevant performance metrics (appointments set, conversion rates, etc.)

Final Note (This Matters)

This is not a passive admin role.

We are looking for someone who will:

Take ownership of the database

Drive activity

Help convert opportunities into closings

If you are highly organized but also results-driven and comfortable working with leads, this is the role for you.

title: Dental Billing Specialist (Remote, Pacific Time Hours)
description:

Our leadership team includes a Harvard MBA and a Stanford MBA, both with deep experience in private equity and business operations, as well as a dentist with over 15 years of clinical and management experience.



We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented tea
mber to support our dental billing operations. Experience with dental billing is required, and familiarity with Medi-Cal Dental (Denti-Cal) is a plus. This is a remote, part-time role starting at 20 hours per week, with the opportunity to ramp up to 40 hours per week over time.



You will work directly with our principals and operations team. This position requires availability during Pacific Time business hours (7a to 3p PT / 11p to 7a PH)



To verify you read the application carefully, please include the name of the Los Angeles-based Major League Baseball team in the subject line of your application.



Responsibilities:

- Follow up on outstanding claims and resolve denials or rejections

- Coordinate with front office and clinical teams to ensure accurate coding and documentation

- Track accounts receivable and report on collection status

- Maintain organized and accurate billing records

- Support related administrative or financial tasks as needed



Qualifications:

- 2+ years of dental billing experience required

- Strong understanding of U.S. dental insurance systems and claim workflows

- Experience with Medi-Cal Dental (Denti-Cal) is a plus

- High attention to detail and excellent organizational skills

- Excellent written and spoken English communication

- Proficiency with dental billing software and Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel

- Comfort working independently and reliably during Pacific Time business hours



Expectations:

- Part-time (20 hours/week) to start, with ramp-up to full-time (40 hours/week)

- Availability during Pacific Time business hours

- Daily updates and communication with the team

- Must have reliable internet and a computer with video call capability



Strong work ethic and commitment to high-quality work



We’re looking for someone who is trustworthy, self-motivated, and eager to be part of a small, high-performance team. We treat our tea
mbers well and hope to build a long-term working relationship.



For qualified candidates who interview, we are happy to provide references to a previous virtual assistant who worked with our team.

title: Level 2 Help Desk Technician
description:
Summary  

A Level 2 Help Desk Technician will handle everything from routine troubleshooting to complex escalations. In addition, you’ll act as a Project Engineer, providing technical support, working on assigned IT projects end-to-end, and driving the successful onboarding of both client and internal systems.  

 

Key Responsibilities  



Help Desk & Customer Support  

- Respond to customer inquiries via phone,
, or chat.  

- Diagnose and resolve issues related to hardware, software, and network connectivity.  

- Guide customers step-by-step to resolve technical problems using remote-desktop tools and help-desk software.  

- Document and track all interactions and resolutions in the ticketing system and knowledge base.  

- Escalate unresolved or high-priority i
 to Level 3 support and follow up to ensure a timely resolution.  

- Maintain professional, courteous communication to uphold high customer satisfaction.  



Technical & Project Engineering  

- Provide technical support to guide customers remotely, including installation, configuration, and maintenance of computer systems, networks, and peripherals.  

- Perform scheduled maintenance and software updates to ensure systems run optimally. 

- Participate in small- to mid-scale IT projects—from involved in the planning through execution and close-out—ensuring scope, budget, and timelines are met. 

- Collaborate with the remote support team to transition complex i
 into formal service requests or project tasks.  

- Use project management tools to track deliverables, report status, and communicate with stakeholders. 

- Oversee the onboarding of new internal systems—developing processes, conducting user training, and ensuring seamless integration.  

- Educate client IT staff on best practices for IT security, maintenance, and system administration.  



Qualifications  

- High school diploma or equivalent; some college coursework or technical certifications preferred (e.g., CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft Certified Professional). 

- 2+ years of experience in a helpdesk or in an MSP environment.  

- Hands-on experience as a technician or project engineer supporting Windows Server, Microsoft 365, and common IT systems.  

- Solid understanding of computer hardware, mobile devices, networking fundamentals, and basic cybersecurity principles.  

- Familiarity with remote-desktop applications, helpdesk/ticketing software, and project management platforms.  

- Strong document-creation skills, with emphasis on developing clear, step-by-step SOPs and How-To Guides for both internal teams and end-users.  

- Excellent troubleshooting, problem-solving, and documentation skills. 

- Excellent English verbal and written communication; able to translate technical concepts for non-technical audiences. Meaning you can speak Human and Tech and make it understandable to others who are not tech-savvy.  

- Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a distributed remote team.  



Preferred Skills  

- AI-Enabled and for working with large language Models for troubleshooting and engineering.  

- Experience scripting for deployment of tools and updates in RMM (e.g., Datto RMM, EDR) and MDM (e.g., Microsoft Intune) environments.  

- Experience supporting macOS and Linux endpoints.  

- Hands-on knowledge of Azure AD, Okta, and other identity-management platforms.  

- Exposure to server virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) and basic cloud infrastructure. 

- Understanding of Google Workspace administration. 

- Prior experience managing end-to-end IT projects, including stakeholder coordination and change management.  

- Certification or coursework in cybersecurity fundamentals (e.g., Security+, CISSP Associate).  



Why You’ll Love Working with Us  

You’ll join a dynamic team where your technical expertise and project-engineering skills will directly impact customer satisfaction and successful IT outcomes. We offer continual learning opportunities, certification support, and a collaborative environment that values innovation and professional growth.



Notes: When reaching out, please include your CV and your DISC assessment, thanks!
