title: Graphic Designer & Creative Strategist to Increase Sales (Amazon & Walmart)
description:
Our Mission:



Our mission is to Help, Improve, and Enrich people’s lives. We believe Moms are the world's heroes! We serve moms who care about their homes, value a great night’s sleep, and crave comfort, style, and efficiency. We create high-quality bedding that feels soft and amazing, helping our favorite moms create a haven of restful peace.



We aren't just looking for someone to "edit photos." We are looking for a creative partner who understands buyer behavior, researches the competition, and can turn a standard product listing into a "clean, modern, and high-converting" masterpiece.



The Opportunity: Bring Your Creative Art to Life



We are looking for a long-term relationship with a skilled designer who doesn't just "make images," but understands style and buyer behavior to increase sales conversions. 



Do you enjoy using your creativity to help people solve pain points and make smart purchasing decisions?

Do you want to work in an environment where you are appreciated for bringing your art to life?

Can you look at the competition, find the "status quo," and make it 10x better?



Your Role Responsibilities



You will be responsible for the visual identity of our listings on Amazon FBA and Walmart. This is a long-term relationship where you will:



Plan & Vision: Create a vision and sketch out plans for high-converting image stacks.



Execute & Sourced: Use a mix of stock imagery, photography, and the latest AI technology to create premium lifestyle and infographic scenes.



Market Mastery: Research like-for-like competitors to ensure our listings are the best in the category.



Conversion Focus: Use fonts, colors, and layout to highlight pain points (like fit and softness) and drive sales.



What We’re Looking For



Hard Skills:



E-commerce Mastery: Expertise in creating Amazon/Walmart 7-image stacks (Main, Infographics, Lifestyle, etc.).



AI Power User: Fluent in using AI tools to enhance imagery and move with speed.



Visual Communication: A deep understanding of how typography and color psychology influence "Moms" as a target demographic.



Research-Driven: Ability to look at a category and identify exactly what is missing visually.



Soft Skills:



Communication: Ability to describe a future vision and explain the "why" behind your art.



Efficiency: Ability to forecast project timelines and move with speed without sacrificing quality.



Ownership: A "Solution-Oriented" mindset—you prioritize action over theory.



Our Core Values



Goal Oriented: We value those who are committed, driven, and take responsibility.

Solution-Oriented: We prioritize action and results over theory and perfectionism.

Integrity: We always do the right thing with honesty.

Have FUN: We love what we do and want you to enjoy the process too!



Ready to apply? Start the 4 section application below.





#1 - Getting to know you.

#2 - Your General Graphics Style and work.

#3 - Your understanding of our category.

#4 - Exercise Samples.

title: SEO / GEO Specialist
description:
FULL-TIME REMOTE: SEO/GEO Specialist for US-Based Marketing Team



Company: Drivers 1st (Remote)



About the Role:



Drivers 1st is seeking an experienced, detail-oriented SEO/GEO (Search Engine Optimization/Answer Engine Optimization) Specialist to join our remote Marketing Team on a full-time basis. You will be responsible for developing and implementing strategies to dramatically improve our organic search visibility and maximize the effectiveness of our content across all digital platforms. This is a critical role focused on optimizing our web content for both traditional SEO and modern Answer Engine Optimization (GEO) features, such as featured snippets, voice search, and knowledge panels, to capture high-intent users in the competitive driver recruitment market.



Key Responsibilities:



Strategy and Optimization

• Develop and execute comprehensive SEO/GEO strategies, including keyword research, content gap analysis, competitive auditing, and technical optimizations.

• Perform regular technical SEO audits on 
 and related sites, identifying and resolving issues related to crawlability, indexation, site speed, and structured data.

• Conduct in-depth keyword research tailored to recruitment, carrier opportunities, and hiring maps to capture driver-specific search intent.

• Optimize website content, meta tags, headers, images, and internal linking structures to enhance organic rankings.



Content and Performance

• Collaborate with the content team to ensure all new recruiting scripts, job descriptions, and web pages are created with SEO/GEO best practices in mind.

• Monitor, track, and report on key KPIs (organic traffic, rankings, CTR, conversions) using Google Analytics, Google Search • • • • Console, and proprietary SEO software.

• Analyze search query data to identify opportunities for achieving "Position Zero" (featured snippets) and better serving voice search queries.

• Proactively stay current with search engine algorithm updates, industry trends, and new GEO features.



Technical and Link Building

• Develop and manage strategies for acquiring high-quality backlinks and improving overall site authority.

• Ensure proper implementation of schema markup and other structured data formats.

• Manage and monitor all website redirects and error pages.



Required Qualifications and Skills:

• Experience: Minimum of 5 years of proven experience specifically managing and executing successful SEO and GEO campaigns with a proven track record of growing site traffic, backlinks, and ranking keywords.

• Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field preferred.

• Technical Proficiency: Expert-level proficiency with SEO tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, Screaming Frog).

• Extensive experience with web analytics platforms (Google Analytics 4) and search console tools (Google Search Console).

• Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript as they relate to SEO best practices and site performance.

• Hands-on experience implementing and troubleshooting various forms of Structured Data (Schema Markup).

• GoHighLevel experience a plus

• Core Competencies: Exceptional analytical thinking, strong problem-solving ability for technical SEO issues, excellent communication skills, and meticulous attention to detail.

• Adaptability: Must be able to quickly adjust strategies in response to algorithm changes.



Work Environment Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

• Internet: Fast and reliable internet (minimum 100mbps) and a backup internet solution.

• Power: Backup generator capable of powering computer equipment for 8 hours in case of power outage.

• Workstation: Quiet, professional workspace free from background noise.

• Equipment: Noise-canceling microphone/headset, camera capabilities for internal meetings, and a capable smartphone.



How to Apply:

Qualified candidates are encouraged to apply by submitting their resume to 
 include "SEO/GEO Specialist Application" in the subject line. If you have project examples or screenshots of websites you've helped grow traffic for, we would love to see them!

title: Cold Outreach & Lead Generation VA — SaaS (eBay/Amazon Sellers)
description:

title: AI Tech Executive Admin (Full-time/WFH)
description:
We are a growth-focused US-based company looking for a long-term Filipino teammate who loves technology, learns fast, and enjoys using AI to make work easier and smarter.



If you’re the kind of person who figures out new tools on your own, helps others when they get stuck, and likes making systems run smoothly, this role is for you.



About the Role

You will be our internal “tech systems owner” and AI champion. You don’t need to code, but you must be very comfortable with software, platforms, and AI tools.



Technology & Systems Management

• Administer Microsoft 365 
, Word, SharePoint, OneDrive).

• Add/remove users and manage permissions across systems.

• Maintain internal access controls and basic security settings.



Zoom & Communication Systems

• Manage company Zoom accounts (phone and video).

• Set up new tea
mbers with the correct settings.

• Adjust recordings, permissions, and integrations as needed.



CRM & Platform Support

• Learn and support our CRM (HubSpot, Keap, or similar).

• Troubleshoot basic CRM issues, especially for sales.

• Help keep data clean and users properly set up.



AI & Productivity Tools

• Administer tools like ChatGPT, Otter AI, DocuSign, and similar.

• Set up new users, remove access when people leave.

• Help teammates troubleshoot issues and suggest ways to use AI to improve workflows.



Team Tech Support & Onboarding

• Be the internal go-to person for “How do I…?” tech questions.

• Assist with setup, access, and basic troubleshooting.

• Follow onboarding checklists to set up systems for new hires.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong comfort with technology and remote platforms.

• Genuine excitement about AI tools and emerging technologies.

• Fast learner who can figure out new platforms independently.

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

• Organized and able to manage multiple systems at once.

• Excellent communication skills.

• Advantage if you have experience with: Microsoft 365, Zoom, CRMs, and AI tools.



We are not looking for someone who is just “trying this out.” We want someone who sees this as a long-term professional home, wants to grow with the company, and takes ownership of their work.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

• Work directly with a growth-focused leadership team.

• Be at the forefront of integrating AI into daily operations.

• Help build smarter systems that support a high-performing remote team.

• Stable, long-term, full-time role (not project-based).

• Weekends off and respect for work–life balance.



What’s on Offer

• Basic salary (paid on time, every time).

• Weekends off.

• Paid holidays & paid time off.

• HMO (after 1 year).

• Tech incentive.

• Referral incentive.



Required Tools & Setup (Non-Negotiable)

• Computer: Laptop/desktop less than 3 years old.

• CPU: Intel i5 (10th-gen or newer) or AMD Ryzen 5+.

• RAM: At least 8GB.

• Internet: 50–100 Mbps (with a backup connection).

• Audio/Video: Working webcam, microphone, and headset.

• Quiet, professional workspace for calls and focused work.



How to Apply (Please Follow Instructions Carefully): To help us see that you pay attention to detail and follow directions (which is very important in this role), please follow all steps below:

1.
 your application to: 
 

2. Subject line: AI Tech Executive Admin

3. Attach your updated resume (PDF preferred).

4. In the body of your
, answer these questions briefly:

1–2 sentences: Why do you enjoy working with technology and AI tools?

List 2–4 AI tools you currently use and 1–2 sentences on how each helps you work better.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered. This helps us find someone who is careful, reliable, and detail-oriented—exactly who we want to invest in long-term.

title: Excel and Data Expert | Operations Manager (Amazon FBA Logistics)
description:
About us: 

We are a young, growing energetic USA Company selling online home category mainly on Amazon FBA.



Our mission:

Help, Improve, and Enrich people's lives!

(read more at the end)



About this role:

Are you an Excel whiz who thrives on compiling data, creating calculations and formulas, and turning them into actionable insights through analytical thinking and problem-solving?  If you're a data-driven individual who enjoys managing operations with data, then this role is perfect for you!  Here, you'll have the opportunity to use your data-driven, analytical skills and problem-solving abilities to make a real impact on our growing business.



Leverage your Excel and data analysis expertise to optimize all aspects of our FBA logistics operations, including purchase orders, while ensuring we are always well stocked and not overstocked.  As the Operations Manager, you will also oversee billing, and customer support, and ensure all Amazon compliance.  You'll streamline processes, identify areas for improvement, grow sales through data analytics and generate actionable insights to ensure efficient and cost-effective operations.



You will be able to use your hard skills and expertise in Excel and data analysis combined with your soft skills such as communication, organization, streamlining processes, and being on top of multiple functions of the business. 



Fill out the form at the end to apply!



Required Skills:



Hard Skills:

- Advanced Excel skills, like vlookup, sumifs, forecasting, and formulas.

- Strong analytical thinking skills to analyze sales data, identify trends, and forecast future demand.

- Experience with inventory management concepts, including stock level optimization and lead time considerations.

- Combine and Analyze large datasets, simplifying them to make the data understandable.



Soft Skills

- Great leadership and management skills. Organized and in control of many moving parts of the business.

- Coordinate shipping schedules with suppliers, warehouses, and truckers and follow all the platform requirements and regulations. 

- Basic knowledge of the Amazon platform on how to create shipments. Prevent and resolve issues.

- Take ownership and responsibility for the projects and roles they are working on.



Applicant should provide a written document on how success is defined for:

- Role of Operations Manager.

- Each Job function. 

- Required KPIs to monitor for success.



Job Details:



FBA / WFS - Ensure we are well stocked (enough) and not overstocked:

- Weekly restock FBA / WFS

- Shipment Performance: Ensure there are no errors, if errors occur resolve them immediately.

- FBA Scorecards KPI: Update scorecards to ensure proper monitoring. 

- Review FBA inaccurate charges (like oversize) and create cases. 

- Update the Inventory monitoring app



PO’s - Ensure we have enough stock:

- Review biweekly inventory

- Prepare PO quantity files

- Coordinate shipping schedule 

- Schedule and review inspections



Billing - Ensure billing is correct and monitored:



- Update all billing

- Review FBA refunds



Customer Service - Resolve customer issues and make them happy:



- Respond to all customer service inquiries from all platforms

- Ensure responses are all on time. 

- Keep scorecard track

- Organize and create a list of issues



P&L KPI Scorecard - monitor sales and profitability:

- Scorecards



Feedback and Reviews:

- Remove negative reviews and feedback

- Scorecard for removal and issues



Our Company Core Values:

- Goal Oriented - Accomplish your dreams.

- Be Committed, Driven, and persevere. Take responsibility and ownership. 

- Solution-oriented, prioritize, and action-oriented over perfection and theory. 

- Do the right thing - with Honesty & Integrity.

- Have FUN - Enjoy yourself in the business- Make the best with what you have.



About our company | Vision Statement :



What we do: 

We create high-quality bedding products, we present them nicely and sell them online.



Who we serve: 

Moms who care about their homes and design, moms who value a good night's sleep.



How we do it: 

We create quality bedding that feels soft and amazing, with a good fit so it fits perfectly on their beds. So they can feel cherished and pampered and get the rest they deserve. 



Moms are our heroes!

We cherish the world's best Moms so we create for them bedding that feels super soft and is easy to care for.

We create sizes that fit perfectly so they stay neat on the bed and will not roll off and disturb your sleep. 

We present it nicely in packaging and images to help our favorite Moms make easy and informative purchasing decisions. 



We empower moms who crave comfort, style, and efficiency to create a haven of restful peace in their homes.



Core Focus:

Purpose: Improve and Enrich people's lives. 

Niche: We help Mom’s be happier by sleeping better with perfect fit bedding! 



Fill out this form to apply for this Job: 





We Wish you good Luck!

- Thank you!

description:

mber to support our dental billing operations. Experience with dental billing is required, and familiarity with Medi-Cal Dental (Denti-Cal) is a plus. This is a remote, full time role.

- 2+ years of dental billing experience required

- High attention to detail and excellent organizational skills

- Excellent written and spoken English communication

- Comfort working independently and reliably during Pacific Time business hours



Expectations:

- Full-time (40 hours/week)

- Must have reliable internet and a computer with video call capability



Strong work ethic and commitment to high-quality work



We’re looking for someone who is trustworthy, self-motivated, and eager to be part of a small, high-performance team. We treat our tea
mbers well and hope to build a long-term working relationship.

title: Sales Representative

title: Outbound Sales Caller (Virtual Assistant) – Print & Marketing Company
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:



We are looking for a results-driven outbound caller to help generate new business for our fast-growing print and marketing company.



Your job is simple:

???? Call businesses

???? Build quick rapport

???? Identify needs

???? Pass qualified leads or close small deals



This is NOT customer service — this is sales-focused outbound calling.



We provide:



Lead lists



Script



Training



Clear daily targets



We are rebuilding and scaling quickly and expect to grow to $50K+/month, so this role has long-term opportunity and growth.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



Make 100–200 outbound calls per day



Speak with business owners or decision-makers



Introduce our services (printing, banners, apparel, signage, etc.)



Qualify leads and gather basic info



Set callbacks OR pass hot leads to sales team



Track calls and outcomes



REQUIREMENTS:



Strong English communication (clear and confident)



Comfortable on the phone (this is REQUIRED)



Sales mindset (not just reading a script)



Reliable internet + quiet workspace



Able to follow instructions and hit daily targets



PAY:



Base pay + performance bonuses



Opportunity to increase pay based on results



WORK HOURS:



Must be available during U.S. business hours (Arizona time preferred)



HOW TO APPLY:



Reply with:



A short voice recording introducing yourself



Your experience with outbound calling or sales



How many calls you can make per day



Your internet speed screenshot



IMPORTANT:



We are only looking for serious applicants who want to work and make money.

If you are consistent and perform, this can turn into a long-term position.

description:

This role combines creative vision, leadership, and tech-savvy system management to keep our brand consistent, innovative, and impactful.

- Strong eye for branding and design consistency.

- Experience managing marketing and digital teams.

- Hands-on knowledge of Odoo (or similar ERP/CRM systems).

- Tech-savvy with Microsoft 365, SharePoint, and digital tools.

- Creative problem-solver with excellent organizational skills.



Why Join Us?

You’ll play a key leadership role in shaping Cube Care’s brand and driving growth. If you’re ready to bring fresh ideas, collaborate across teams, and make an impact, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Lead Generation - Permanent WFH
description:
We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to drive consistent and high-quality leads from hospitals across the United States. This in-house role will be responsible for

identifying, researching, and engaging decision-makers in the healthcare industry to support our sales and marketing goals. 



The ideal candidate has experience in
 outreach, understands hospital industry dynamics, and is capable of creating and executing campaigns that align with our brand voice while building trust and opening conversations with qualified prospects. 



 



???? Key Responsibilities: 



Identify and build lists of verified hospital contacts based on our target audience (specific roles, titles, and regions). 

Conduct manual research to validate contact information and relevance. 

Develop tailored outreach messaging based on pain points and campaign objectives. 

Execute
 campaigns using platforms like SendGrid (aligned with Odoo). 

Monitor, manage, and respond to lead replies to nurture them through the pipeline. 

Maintain a consistent tone and messaging aligned with the Cube Care brand. 

Track campaign performance and report on lead quality, objections, and interest. 

Collaborate with sales and marketing to refine messaging and target segments. 

Ensure compliance with
 marketing best practices to avoid blacklisting, especially with healthcare servers. 

 



???? Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): 



Number of verified hospital contacts added monthly (target: 300+). 

Number of high-quality, engaged leads generated (target: 10–15 per month). 

 open rate (target: >35%) and reply rate (target: >8%). 

Number of
 campaigns executed per quarter (target: 2–3). 

Conversion rate from lead to opportunity (measured jointly with sales). 

Timely reporting and insights provided weekly. 

Consistency in messaging and alignment with brand tone and values. 

 



???? Requirements: 



Proven experience in lead generation, sales development, or
 outreach (healthcare industry preferred). 

Strong research skills and attention to detail. 

Familiarity with tools like SendGrid, Odoo (or similar CRM) 

Clear, persuasive written communication skills. 

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively. 

Comfortable handling large data lists and segmenting based on target criteria. 

 



???? Preferred: 



Prior experience generating leads within hospitals or the healthcare industry. 

Experience integrating CRM data for outreach and reporting. 







System Requirements:



Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant
description:
Reporting to: CEO / Brand Operations Manager

Employment Type: Part-time (with potential to grow into full-time)

Location: Remote

Work Hours: 9am–5pm MST, with some availability during Chinese business hours



_______________________________________________________

ABOUT XOXO PARENTS



XOXO Parents is a fast-growing e-commerce brand focused on creating innovative, parent-designed products that make life easier for families. Since 2018, we’ve been committed to building helpful products that save time, strengthen connection, and bring more joy to everyday parenting.



We are looking for a sharp, proactive, and highly organized Amazon Virtual Assistant to support our growing Amazon business. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced remote environment, takes ownership, follows through, and enjoys creating order through systems, reporting, and execution.



_______________________________________________________

ROLE OVERVIEW



??This is an Amazon-focused support role that combines operations, inventory coordination, listing support, reporting, and day-to-day account maintenance. You will work closely with the CEO and Operations Manager to help keep our Amazon business running smoothly and profitably.



Your primary responsibility is to help manage the moving parts behind our Amazon operations, including Seller Central tasks, reporting, inventory tracking, supplier coordination, listing updates, and support for launches, promotions, and marketing initiatives.



_______________________________________________________

RESPONSIBILITIES



Amazon Operations Support

- Manage day-to-day tasks inside Amazon Seller Central

- Monitor account issues and escalate problems quickly

- Submit and track cases with Amazon Support

- Help maintain listing accuracy, backend details, and variation structure

- Upload and update product content, images, bullet points, A+ content, and keywords when needed

- Monitor suppressed listings, stranded inventory, pricing issues, and other account alerts

- Assist with flat files, listing edits, and catalog troubleshooting



Inventory & Supply Chain Coordination

- Track inventory levels across Amazon, warehouse/3PL, and incoming shipments

- Help maintain reorder timelines and replenishment forecasts

- Collaborate with supply and chain manager for freight partners, and 3PLs to support on-time inventory movement

- Help prepare and send purchase orders

- Maintain organized records of supplier communication, lead times, and order history

- Monitor inventory health to avoid stockouts, excess inventory, and IPI-related issues



Reporting & Admin

- Create weekly and monthly reports from Amazon Seller Central and other internal systems

- Track important KPIs such as sales, inventory status, ad performance support metrics, returns, and account health indicators

- Organize tasks, SOPs, and project updates in ClickUp

- Maintain clean documentation and ensure recurring tasks are completed on time



Amazon Marketing Support

- Support product launches, promotions, coupons, and deal setup

- Help track listing performance and conversion-related metrics

- Assist with keyword research and competitor monitoring

- Pull PPC reports and organize campaign data for review

- Support the team with content updates that improve visibility and conversion

- Help monitor customer feedback, reviews trends, and listing quality issues



Expected Results

- Amazon reports are delivered accurately and on time

- Inventory is tracked well and stockouts are minimized

- Reorders and supplier follow-up happen on schedule

- Seller Central issues are identified and handled quickly

- Listings stay updated, accurate, and properly organized

- Promotions and launches are executed with fewer errors

- Account health remains stable and operational issues are resolved fast

- The team has better visibility into sales, inventory, and Amazon performance



_______________________________________________________

REQUIREMENTS

Must-Have Skills

- Excellent written and verbal English

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

- Ability to manage multiple tasks and follow through without constant supervision

- Experience working with Amazon Seller Central

- Experience with inventory tracking, replenishment planning, and supplier coordination

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to troubleshoot operational issues

- Comfortable communicating during both US and Chinese business hours when needed

- Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently in a remote environment

- Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT and automation platforms to work more efficiently, while using good judgment and fact-checking outputs



Tech & Tools

- Amazon Seller Central

- Amazon Campaign Manager

- Helium 10

- Titan Tool (Preferred but not Required)

- ClickUp

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Excel or Google Sheets for inventory and reporting

- Canva for simple graphics or listing support

- Capcut for simple video or listing support

- WhatsApp and other remote communication tools



Nice to Have

- Experience supporting Amazon PPC reporting or campaign organization

- Experience with Amazon listing optimization

- Experience with flat files and variation setup

- Familiarity with 3PLs, freight forwarding, and shipment coordination

- Experience working with Chinese suppliers or manufacturers

- E-commerce brand experience, especially with physical products



_______________________________________________________

HOW TO APPLY

If you're ready to grow with a fun, passionate brand—and you love making things happen—we want to hear from you!



Complete all 3 steps:

1. Fill out the form: 

2. Submit your resume in this posting

3. Add the word EXPERT to your subject line



Let’s build something amazing together!

title: Executive Assistant (Project Manangement)- Real Estate
description:
The Swick Real Estate Group & Downsize Allies | Centerville, OH



Our fast-growing real estate team is seeking a dependable and self-motivated Executive Assistant w/ project management experience to support our agents and clients through the downsizing and transaction process. This virtual role is essential in providing organized, compassionate, and professional support to homeowners and families during an important life transition. This position works directly with the President and has the ability to organize and complete efficiently and effectively a variety of recurring and new assignments.  Someone that is solution oriented to complete projects. Due to our clientele an expert command of the English language with little to no accent is very important of our perfect hire.



We are a highly productive team working full 8-hour days in a fast-paced environment. This role requires strong focus, ownership, and attention to detail, with the goal of fully managing transaction and administrative responsibilities so the team can perform at a high level.



Key Responsibilities

- Manage daily calendars, meetings, and
 correspondence

- Oversee scheduling and customer service for Airbnb, Furnished Finders, and rental properties

- Coordinate with vendors and manage business-related purchases

- Perform daily reconciliation for property redevelopment projects

- Manage transaction timelines, deadlines, and related tasks efficiently

- Communicate clearly and professionally with clients, agents, vendors, and stakeholders

- Prepare, review, and submit transaction documents accurately and on time

- Coordinate inspections, repairs, and closing-related appointments

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in the CRM/database

- Ensure file compliance, accuracy, and quality control

- Conduct daily check-ins on active listings, contracts, and assigned projects



Qualifications

- Executive Assistant and Project Management experience preferred

- Strong organizational, communication, and time-management skills

- Detail-oriented, proactive, and solution-focused

- Project management knowledge (a plus)

- Construction background and familiarity with AI tools (Claude, HeyGen, Gamini, Nano, ChatGPT) (a plus)

- Coachable, dependable, and interested in long-term growth

- High proficiency in U.S. English



About Us:

With over 30 years of real estate experience, The Swick Real Estate Group & Downsize Allies provides an all-inclusive downsizing and estate transition service. Our mission is to remove stress and simplify the process through personalized, insight-driven solutions—while working hard, working smart, and enjoying what we do.



Compensation & Schedule:

$7.00–$9.00 per hour (USD) full-time

1. Send a 2–3 minute video sharing your skills;

2. Why this role matters to you?

3. Your interest in a long-term career?

title: Country Real Estate Video Editor
description:
I’m a YouTube consultant working with a nationally ranked real estate agent in the United States Pacific Northwest who specializes in rural, ranch, and lifestyle horse properties. The two of us have been building this channel for two years and are now ready to expand the team.



We are looking for a video editor who can create longform YouTube real estate video content. You will be responsible for editing videos in a timely manner to maintain a consistent weekly release schedule. 



This position will start on a per-video basis and include training via Looms or YouTube videos I record, with the potential to become part-time in the future as I train you. 



I'll be hiring a few editors for an initial paid project. From there, I'll be choosing who to continue working with on an ongoing basis. This is also your chance to see if you'd enjoy this type of work and whether we communicate well together.



When you apply, please format your subject as “Video Editor Application-[Your Name Here]”



Position Overview

Your role will be editing longform real estate talking-head and property tour content in Descript and DaVinci Resolve:



• Use Descript’s AI features to build the initial edit of the video

• For talking head videos, edit the video according to a provided script 

• For property tour videos, edit to show the complete property

• Bring video into DaVinci Resolve to apply b-roll, graphics, and templated slides before rendering a final output. (B-roll will be provided through Envato Elements and our own stock footage)

• Write content for slides that summarize key points or statistics using bullet points

• Use Dropbox for file management and to connect to a Davinci Resolve library outside of Descript



For now, your workflow is partly in Resolve, but I am trying to move it fully into Descript.



Skills Needed

• Some basic DaVinci Resolve experience, or experience working with another non-linear editor app like Final Cut Pro or Adobe Premiere

• Ability to use Descript

• Proficiency in English grammar

• Being comfortable with writing lists in English that can sometimes include a lot of numbers like the cost of gas, price of groceries, home values, etc.



Qualities Needed to Be Successful

We can learn and perfect skills over time. Most importantly, I am looking for three qualities: 



Integrity – You’re a good fit if you can be honest with me when you need something or don’t know something or can’t hit a deadline. Open communication and honesty are very important to me. Everyone makes mistakes and I don’t expect perfection. 



Commitment – I value loyalty very highly and would love to find someone who can commit to a long-term working relationship. I understand that it might be a big ask with gig work. As the company grows, my commitment is to bring on a successful editor to part-time status if you're able to make that transition.



Desire to Learn – We are all learning. I want people who are open to learning new skills and taking on new projects.



Strong Moral Foundation – If you believe in treating others the way you want to be treated and you try to live that out, you'll fit right in here.



If this sounds like you, please apply below and I’ll personally read your application and view your work samples and answer any questions you might have. Please ask any questions you may have about the position, myself, or the agent.

title: Operations Assistant (Virtual)
description:
Operations Assistant (Virtual) Part-Time / Fully Remote



PLEASE SEND RESUME



MUST HAVE REQUIRED EXPERIENCE, ENGLISH FLUENCY AND STABLE HIGH SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION





Description



We’re an online brand redefining automotive accessories with luxury, custom-fit interior solutions designed for the discerning vehicle owner. As a growing ecommerce brand, we are looking for a sharp, reliable Virtual Operations Assistant to support our Head of Operations with the day-to-day management of our US operations. This role is central to keeping our inventory model accurate, our sales data current, and our reporting consistent. You'll work closely with the Head of Operations primarily through Slack,
, and periodic Google Meet check-ins, with clear deliverables and a structured set of recurring responsibilities.

This is a great fit for someone who thrives in a lean, fast-moving ecommerce environment and takes pride in clean data and reliable reporting.

Essential Functions

Own daily sales data entry and ensure model integrity across all US operations

Build and deliver daily sales reports with variance analysis against forecasted totals

Take full ownership of weekly and monthly SKU-level unit comparisons, including SKU mix and variance tracking

Manage end-of-month inventory hardcount reporting and lead variance analysis between actuals and projections

Proactively flag discrepancies and escalate to the Head of Operations when SKU performance exceeds defined thresholds

Execute SKU mix and forecast updates as directed, and monitor downstream impact on future inventory

Track and maintain daily average unit values across D2C and B2B channels

Surface potential purchase order implications following inventory model changes

Competencies

Analytically minded with a strong comfort working with numbers, spreadsheets, and data models

Strong attention to detail and data accuracy

Fluent in English

Ability to manage recurring tasks independently with minimal supervision

Clear and professional written communication in English

Comfortable working across multiple platforms and tools simultaneously

Proactive in flagging issues and following up without being prompted

Organized, deadline-driven, and reliable

Genuine curiosity about ecommerce operations and how data drives business decisions

title: Media Specialist
description:
Job Title: Media Specialist

Location: Remote (Working Hours: 9 AM – 6 PM PST Monday to Friday)



Position Summary

We’re expanding our media team and looking for experienced, results-driven individuals ready to thrive in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. This is a unique opportunity to work closely with our in-house U.S. marketing team and support digital campaigns for some of the biggest car manufacturers in the world.



As a Media Specialist, you will play a key role in executing, monitoring, and optimizing paid media campaigns across Google, Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok, and more. This position offers hands-on exposure to high-budget accounts, advanced campaign strategies, and collaboration with a top-tier team.

We are seeking candidates with at least 3 years of paid media experience who are detail-oriented, accountable, and eager to contribute to a collaborative team.



Key Responsibilities

? Manage and optimize paid media campaigns across platforms (Google, Meta, TikTok, etc.)

? Pull, analyze, and update daily campaign performance reports

? Monitor budgets, pacing, and bidding strategies to ensure efficiency and strong ROI

? Support A/B testing and creative optimization to improve campaign results

? Collaborate with U.S.-based marketing and creative teams

? Follow established workflows and ensure quality assurance in campaign execution



Requirements

? Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience managing paid media campaigns across Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, etc.

? Strong attention to detail and ability to follow directions precisely

? Analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and optimize accordingly

? Proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel for tracking and reporting

? Familiarity with ad tracking (UTM parameters, Meta Pixel, GA4, etc.)

? Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

? Must be available to work 9 AM – 6 PM PST, Monday to Friday



What We Offer

? Opportunity for overtime work and performance-based bonuses

? Training on internal tools, reporting processes, and workflow systems

? Work with a highly experienced U.S. marketing team and major global brands

? Clear path for career growth and skill development within a fast-growing company

Ready to join a high-performing digital media team?

Apply today and bring your skills to an exciting, fast-moving industry.

title: Ecommerce Accountant / Financial Operations Manager (DTC Brand)
description:
???? About Us:



We are a fast-growing ecommerce wellness brand focused on building a premium product in the health & wellness space. We currently sell on Amazon, Shopify, and TikTok Shop, and are scaling aggressively over the next 6–12 months.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented, proactive financial operator who can take ownership of our numbers and help us build a clean, scalable financial system.



This is not just bookkeeping,  we want someone who thinks like an operator.



???? Role Overview:



You will be responsible for managing and organizing the financial backbone of the business, ensuring accurate reporting, clean books, and actionable insights across all sales channels.



Your work will directly impact decision-making across marketing, inventory, and growth.



???? Key Responsibilities:

1. Bookkeeping & Financial Management

Maintain accurate books using QuickBooks & Finaloop

Reconcile all accounts (bank, credit cards, payment processors)

Ensure clean categorization of all transactions

Manage monthly close process



2. Channel-Level Financial Reporting

Create monthly P&Ls broken down by channel:

Amazon

Shopify

TikTok Shop



Track key metrics:

Revenue

COGS

CM1

CM2

Contribution margin

CAC





3. Financial Insights & Analysis

Provide clear breakdowns of:

Profitability by channel

CAC vs LTV (if data available)

Trends month-over-month

Highlight opportunities to improve margins and reduce costs



4. Inventory & COGS Tracking

Track inventory costs and landed COGS

Work with operations to ensure accurate inventory accounting

Monitor stock levels vs financial reporting



5. Systems & Organization

Help build a clean financial dashboard/reporting system

Improve workflows between:

Finance

Operations

Marketing



? Requirements:

Must-Have

Proven experience working with ecommerce / DTC brands



Strong experience with:

QuickBooks

Finaloop (preferred, but not required if fast learner)

Experience handling multi-channel e-commerce finances



Strong understanding of:

Ecommerce P&Ls

COGS & landed costs

Platform fees (Amazon, Shopify, TikTok)



Nice-to-Have (High Value)

Experience with Amazon accounting (FBA fees, settlements, etc.)

Familiarity with Shopify & TikTok Shop reporting

Understanding of cash flow management & forecasting

Experience supporting brands doing $800k+/month



???? Who You Are:

Extremely detail-oriented (nothing slips through)

Proactive — you don’t just report problems, you solve them

Organized and process-driven

Strong communicator (clear, concise reporting)

Thinks like an owner/operator, not just a bookkeeper



???? Growth Opportunity:



This role can grow into a Head of Finance / Strategic Finance role as the company scales. You’ll work closely with the founder and be a key part of scaling to $1M+/month.



???? Compensation:



Competitive (based on experience)

Long-term opportunity with room for growth



???? To Apply:



Please send:

A short intro about your experience with ecommerce brands

Examples of P&L reports you’ve created (if possible)

What platforms you’ve worked with (Amazon, Shopify, etc.)

Why you’re a strong fit for this role

title: Video Editor + Social Media Manager (Long-Term Position with Room for Growth)
description:
ABOUT ROOFIGNITE



RoofIgnite is a fast-growing performance marketing agency based in Toronto, Canada. We help residential roofing contractors across the United States generate qualified homeowner leads through
 Ads and a lead qualification system we run on their behalf.



We produce talking-head video ads, long-form YouTube content, short-form organic clips, and other marketing videos to grow our brand and bring in new clients. We're building out our content team and need someone to own the editing production and publishing side of our operation.



We are also expanding our sister brand, ContractorsIgnite, which will allow us to help more than just roofing contractors - more deserving contractors in other industries who need our help finding more customers so they can continue doing great work.



????????????????????????????????????????



THE ROLE



You'll be editing all of our video content and managing our social media presence across YouTube, Instagram, and
. Every upload, caption, and comment response is part of how RoofIgnite shows up in the market.



The editing side is roughly 10–20 hours per week. The social media and comment management side is lighter but needs to happen consistently, every day. We have SOPs, clear briefs, and examples for everything. Your job is to execute on time and at a high standard, following SOPs and processes.



????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Video Editing

- Edit talking-head
/Meta ads - cut to script, add captions, remove retakes and dead air, export in the correct format

- Edit long-form YouTube videos (10–20 minutes) recorded by our team once or twice per week

- Pull the best 
nts from long-form videos and edit them into short-form clips (60–90 seconds) for Instagram,
, and YouTube Shorts

- Edit Q&A and VSL videos for our landing pages

- Design YouTube thumbnails

- Organize all completed files in Google Drive following our naming conventions

- Keep projects organized within our project management software, Asana



Social Media Management

- Post 2–3 short-form videos per week across Instagram,
, and YouTube Shorts with optimized titles, descriptions, and tags

- Upload long-form YouTube videos with SEO-optimized titles and descriptions

- Moderate comments daily using 
 and Metricool



????????????????????????????????????????



WHO YOU ARE



Experience You Need

- 2+ years of hands-on video editing experience

- Proficient in CapCut (required) and Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred)

- Experience editing talking-head content - tight cuts, clean captions, solid pacing

- Experience managing YouTube, Instagram, and
 pages

- Comfortable using Google Drive, Slack, and Asana

- Strong written and verbal English



How You Work

- You hit deadlines with ease, but if something comes up, you communicate early

- You follow SOPs, ask questions when something is unclear, and keep your project tracker updated without being reminded

- You ask questions and take proactive action

- You want stable, long-term work and treat this like a professional role

- This is your primary commitment



Nice to Have

- Experience with direct response or marketing agency content

- YouTube SEO knowledge

- Thumbnail design experience

- Familiarity with CommentGuard & Metricool or similar comment moderation tools



????????????????????????????????????????



WORKING ENVIRONMENT



- Location: Fully Remote

- Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

- Hours: 25–35 hours per week, flexible schedule - deadlines & results matter, not when or how many hours you work

- Communication: Slack, Monday–Friday, 9AM–6PM EST. Weekends may occasionally have communication within a reasonable timeline - being fully transparent

- Team: You'll work directly with our marketing manager and founders



????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT WE OFFER



- Salary: $900–$1300 USD/month based on experience

- Rush bonuses for fast turnarounds on larger batches

- Growth opportunities as the company scales - volume, responsibilities, and pay all increase together

- Long-term stability: we're building a real long-term team and are looking for world-class talent



????????????????????????????????????????



APPLICATION PROCESS



To apply, please provide all of the following:



1. Speed Test

Run a test at speedtest.net and paste a screenshot of your result.



2. 60–90 Second Voice Introduction (required)

Record using 
 and answer:

- Your name and where you are from

- What makes you different from other candidates?

- Your editing experience with specific examples

- The tools you use day-to-day

- Why do you want to work with RoofIgnite?



3. Edit Test (completing this gives you a 90% greater chance of being interviewed)

Download the raw footage and script here:





Context: this is for an ad of a talking-head style video that would be posted on Meta, calling out our ideal customers who we want to attract: roofing business owners. They're pretty serious, but at the same time, casual people who tend also to be very analytical and critical, so attention to detail is important.



Edit it as follows:

- Cut tightly to the script and remove all retakes and dead air

- Add captions

- Transitions/fx if necessary

- Export as MP4, 9:16, 1080x1920

- Upload your finished edit to Google Drive and link it in your application



4. BONUS: Work Samples

Share a Google Drive folder or links to 2–3 videos you have edited. Short-form preferred.



Include the phrase "I SAW THE FULL POST" in your application.



????????????????????????????????????????



WHY JOIN ROOFIGNITE



- You'll own the content production and brand presence of a fast-growing agency from day one

- We're scaling aggressively and this role grows with the company

- Clear expectations, clear feedback, and fast communication

- Direct, non-corporate team that moves fast

- Strong performers get rewarded more

- Young, entrepreneurial, hungry, and growth-minded environment



????????????????????????????????????????



NEXT STEPS



- Submit your full application with all requirements fulfilled

- Our team will review candidates and typically respond within 48–72 hours

- First call: Quick 15-minute intro call

- Second call: Technical evaluation - we'll look at existing editing work together and assess your analytical skills and attention to detail

- Third call: Hiring and expectation setting

- Offer and onboarding: 5–7 days

- Start Date: ASAP

title: US Tax Preparer & Coordinator
description:
Tax Preparer / U.S. Business Tax Coordinator



Employment Type: Full-Time (Independent Contract)



Location: Remote - WFH



Job Summary



We are seeking an experienced Tax Preparer / Business Tax Specialist with strong practical knowledge of U.S. business taxes. This role focuses on preparing and supporting federal, state, and local tax filings for our business clients.



This position does not require a PTIN, EFIN, CPA, or EA, but does require demonstrated hands-on experience preparing business tax filings, payroll-related tax forms, and compliance reports. The ideal candidate understands how business operations connect to tax reporting and can work accurately under deadlines.



Key Responsibilities



Business Income Tax Preparation



    Prepare and review federal business tax returns, including:

    Schedule C (Sole Proprietors)

    Form 1065 (Partnerships)

    Form 1120-S (S Corporations)

    Form 1120 (C Corporations)

    Assist with state business income and franchise tax filings

    Support preparation of quarterly estimated tax calculations



Payroll & Employment Tax Support



    Prepare and review payroll-related tax filings, including:

    Form 941 (Quarterly Payroll Tax Returns)

    Form 940 (FUTA)

    W-2 and W-3 forms

    State payroll and unemployment filings

    Assist with payroll tax reconciliations

    Respond to IRS and state payroll notices



Sales Tax & State Compliance



    Prepare state and local sales tax returns (monthly or quarterly)

    Assist with sales tax reconciliations

    Support multi-state sales tax compliance when applicable

    Identify basic sales tax nexus considerations



Year-End & Compliance Filings



    Prepare information returns, including:

    Form 1099-NEC

    Form 1099-MISC

    Assist with amended returns and corrections

    Support compliance tracking and filing deadlines

    Maintain organized workpapers and supporting documentation



Required Knowledge & Experience



    Demonstrated experience preparing U.S. business tax filings

    Strong understanding of:

    Business income taxation

    Payroll and employment taxes

    Sales tax reporting

    Quarterly estimated taxes

    Ability to read and interpret IRS and state tax notices

    Experience working with accounting records and financial statements

    High attention to detail and deadline management



Preferred (But Not Required)



    Experience working in a tax firm or accounting practice

    Familiarity with (QuickBooks Online)

    Basic bookkeeping or accounting knowledge

    Experience supporting small to mid-sized businesses



Remote Setup Requirements



    Stable, high-speed internet connection

    Quiet and dedicated work-from-home environment

    Dual monitors strongly preferred



Schedule



    US Arizona business hours (11:00pm to 8:00am Philippines time)



Please share a link of your resume or send to

title: VA Accountant
description:
We are looking for a VA Accountant with experience in U.S. tax accounting to prepare and review individual and business tax returns, ensure IRS compliance, and support tax planning and financial reporting. The role requires strong knowledge of QuickBooks and SAGE Intacct, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently in a remote setting while collaborating with the finance team during PST business hours.



Responsibilities:

-Prepare and review tax returns for individuals and businesses.

-Ensure all filings meet U.S. tax regulations and requirements.

-Assist in tax strategy development to boost financial efficiency.

-Stay on top of tax law changes and conduct research as needed.

-Support financial reporting for audits and tax-related documentation.

-Collaborate with the finance team to manage inquiries and ensure smooth operations.

-Keep accurate and organized financial records.



Qualifications:

-Proficiency in QuickBooks and SAGE Intacct is a must; CPA certification is a big plus.

-Solid experience in U.S. tax accounting (corporate & individual).

-Familiarity with tax software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAGE).

-Strong knowledge of IRS regulations and tax compliance.

-Detail-oriented, with excellent problem-solving skills.

-Strong communication skills (written & verbal).

-Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a remote setting.

-3-5 years of relevant experience in tax accounting (preferred)

title: Paid Ads Specialist (Google, Meta & Local Services Ads)
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven Paid Ads Specialist to manage and scale lead-generation campaigns across Google Ads, Meta 
 & Instagram), and Local Services Ads (LSA). This role focuses on lead quality, efficiency, and real business growth — not just traffic or vanity metrics. If you are analytical, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple client accounts, we’d love to hear from you.



What You’ll Do

- Build, manage, and optimize Google Search, Performance Max, Meta Ads, and LSA campaigns

- Monitor CPA, ROAS, lead quality, and performance trends

- Structure campaigns by intent, service, and location

- Launch full-funnel strategies (prospecting, retargeting, conversion optimization)

- Write and test ad copy and creatives (RSAs, Meta creatives)

- Manage budgets, pacing, and scaling strategies

- Monitor search terms, negatives, and lead quality signals

- Create clear performance reports and insights for the team



Requirements

1. 3+ years experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads

2. Hands-on experience with Local Services Ads (LSA)

3. Strong knowledge of Search campaigns, smart bidding, and keyword strategy

4. Experience with Meta audiences, testing, and scaling

5. Familiar with GA4, Google Tag Manager, and conversion tracking

6. Comfortable handling multiple client accounts

7. Data-driven and detail-oriented



Tools You’ll Use

- Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Local Services Ads

- Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Google Tag Manager

- Looker Studio, Google Sheets / Excel

- CRM & call tracking tools (GoHighLevel experience is a BIG plus)



Nice to Have

- Agency or multi-account experience

- Lead-generation background (healthcare, home services, local businesses)

- Experience improving lead quality, not just increasing volume



What We Offer

1. Full-time, long-term remote role

2. Stable workload with growth opportunities

3. Competitive salary (based on experience)

4. Supportive, results-focused team environment

5. Opportunity to manage high-impact ad accounts



How to Apply:

Please send the following to 

1. Your updated resume

2. A short video introduction highlighting your relevant experiences

3. Portfolio



Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a short practical assessment.

title: Executive Assistant & Client Operations Manager
description:
About Us

SelfDeveloped LLC is a U.S.-based growth marketing and systems agency. We help real estate educators, home service companies, and coaching businesses build full-funnel marketing systems — ads, copywriting, GHL automations,
/SMS sequences, and ongoing campaign management. Our founder has generated $50M+ in client results across 120+ clients over 10+ years.

We're growing fast and need someone who can help keep everything running smoothly behind the scenes so our clients feel taken care of and nothing falls through the cracks.



The Role

This is not a task-list job. We're looking for a sharp, proactive Executive Assistant and Client Operations Manager who can operate as a true right hand to the founder.

You'll be the connective tissue between the founder, clients, and vendors. You'll own communication, follow-through, and organization so the founder can stay focused on strategy and delivery.

If you're the kind of person who notices what needs to happen before being asked, follows up without being reminded, and takes pride in making other people's lives easier — this role was built for you.



What You'll Be Doing



Managing the founder's calendar, scheduling calls, and sending reminders

Handling client check-ins and follow-ups via
 and DM on behalf of the founder

Sending contracts, proposals, and onboarding documents using our templates

Making edits and updates to documents, SOPs, and client-facing materials

Pulling reports, screenshots, or data from tools like GHL, Google Drive, and ad platforms when needed

Drafting and sending
s or messages as directed

Organizing files, inboxes, and project notes to keep everything clean and accessible

Flagging anything that needs the founder's attention before it becomes a problem





You're a Great Fit If You:



Have at least 1–2 years supporting a U.S.-based agency, coach, or online business owner

Write professional, clear English — clients will see your messages

Are comfortable inside tools like GoHighLevel (GHL), Google Workspace, and Slack or similar

Are highly organized and detail-oriented without needing to be micromanaged

Are proactive — you bring solutions, not just updates

Are available during overlapping U.S. Central Time hours (Nashville, TN)

Are reliable, loyal, and looking for a long-term home, not just your next gig





Bonus Points If You Have:



Experience inside a marketing or funnel agency

Familiarity with ClickFunnels, Meta Ads Manager, or
 platforms

Experience managing client communications on behalf of a founder



To Apply

Record a short 1–3 minute Loom video introducing yourself and answering this question:

"Tell me about a time you caught something falling through the cracks for someone you supported — what happened and how did you handle it?"

Include the video link along with your resume and a list of tools you're comfortable working in. Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Assistant for US Business
description:
PART-TIME VIRTUAL ASSISTANT – High Conflict Resolutions, LLC



PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE POST before applying as we are looking for a very specific fit, and if you don't meet the criteria, we won't be able to conduct an interview.  If you haven't responded specifically to the questions below, I won't respond to your application.  





About the Role



We are a growing U.S.-based coaching and business specializing in high-conflict co-parenting. We are looking for a highly experienced, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our founder on a part-time, flexible basis — approximately 2–3 hours per day. This is not a fixed-schedule role. You should already be working with other clients throughout the day and available to complete tasks as they come in, with reasonable turnaround times. Over time, as the business continues to grow, the number of hours can grow as well.



This role is primarily administrative and operational. You will not be speaking with clients on the phone, but you WILL be writing
s on behalf of the founder to clients and professional referral partners. Exceptional written English is non-negotiable.



IMPORTANT: We will train you on how we do things in our business. We will NOT be training you on the tools themselves. You must arrive fully proficient in every skill listed below. Please do not apply if you are still learning these platforms.





What You'll Do



— Lead the migration of existing client accounts from our current CRM (17hats) to a new platform, ensuring no data loss and clean record organization throughout the transition

— Onboard new clients in our CRM (set up profiles, send coaching agreements, intake questionnaires, and welcome
s)

— Monitor the founder's calendar daily and send Zoom links and session reminders to clients

— Set up and manage automated reminders so clients receive notifications ahead of coaching sessions

— Draft and send professional
s to clients and referral partners using approved language and templates

— Post approved social media content across multiple platforms or schedule via Later (or similar scheduling tool). Posting to Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube,
, and TikTok.

— Edit and manage short-form video content inside Riverside.fm (willingness to learn this specific platform is required — all other tools must already be mastered)

— Support general business operations in Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

— Communicate with the team via Slack and manage appointment scheduling through Calendly

— Use AI tools such as Claude or ChatGPT as efficiency aids for drafting, formatting, and organizing work

— Identify podcast hosts and outreach opportunities to position the Founder as a guest, then send approved outreach messages

— Identify guest writing and blog contribution opportunities relevant to our field

— Research applicable grants and submit approved applications on the founder's behalf





What We're Looking For



— Exceptional written English — this is the most critical requirement; your
s will represent our brand to clients and professional referral partners

— Minimum 2 years of VA experience working with U.S.-based clients

— Proven, hands-on experience with CRM platforms — please name the specific platforms you've used and for how long

— Experience with CRM migration or platform transitions strongly preferred; must be comfortable owning a data migration project from start to finish

— Proficiency in: Google Workspace, Zoom, Slack, Calendly, and social media scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, or similar)

— Comfortable using Claude (Anthropic) or ChatGPT as a daily efficiency tool — this is expected, not optional

— Strong attention to detail; we work with clients navigating high-stakes family situations and errors are not acceptable

— Self-motivated, reliable, and able to manage tasks asynchronously without hand-holding

— Available to respond and complete tasks during U.S. Pacific business hours (flexibility within those hours is fine)





What This Is NOT



This is not a content creation role. You will not be writing social media captions from scratch or developing strategy. Content is provided to you — your job is to execute it accurately and on time. This is also not an entry-level role. If you are still building your VA skills, this is not the right fit.





Hours & Pay



2–3 hours per day, flexible scheduling

Please include your hourly rate when you apply.





How to Apply



Please send a brief introduction that includes all five of the following — applications missing any item will not be reviewed:



1. The CRM platforms you have used, how long you used each, and whether you have managed a CRM migration

2. A short writing sample — an example of a professional
 you wrote for a U.S.-based client (do not use AI to write this sample — we will know)

3. Which AI tools you currently use in your work and specifically how you use them

4. Your current client load and general daily availability

5. Have you ever migrated client records from one CRM to another? If so, which platforms were involved and how did you manage the transition?

title: Appointment Setter & Cold Caller — U.S. Marketing Agency
description:
About Us

SelfDeveloped LLC is a U.S.-based growth marketing and systems agency. We help real estate educators, home service businesses, and high-ticket coaches build full-funnel marketing systems. Our founder has 10+ years of experience and has helped clients generate $50M+ in results across 120+ businesses.

We're running paid ads and need a sharp, persistent appointment setter to turn inbound and cold leads into booked calls.

The Role

You'll be working warm and cold lists, following up aggressively, handling objections confidently, and booking qualified prospects onto the founder's calendar. This is a performance role — your income grows with your output.

What You'll Be Doing



Calling inbound leads from
 and Instagram ads within the first 5 minutes of opt-in

Cold calling targeted prospect lists in real estate, home services, and coaching niches

Following up via phone, SMS, and
 inside GoHighLevel until leads book, decline, or go cold

Qualifying prospects before booking — no tire kickers on the calendar

Handling objections around price, timing, and trust

Logging all activity and call outcomes inside the CRM

Sending confirmation and reminder messages to reduce no-shows

Reporting weekly on dials, contacts made, appointments set, and show rates



What We're Looking For



Proven experience as an appointment setter, cold caller, or SDR

Strong spoken and written English — you'll be speaking with U.S. business owners

Comfortable making 50–100 outbound dials per day when needed

Resilient and coachable — rejection doesn't shake you

Familiar with GoHighLevel or similar CRM tools

Available during U.S. business hours (Central Time preferred)

Hungry — you want to earn and understand your output determines your income



Compensation



Base + commision

Strong performers earn significantly above base



To Apply

Submit a 1–3 minute Loom video doing two things:



Walk us through your appointment setting or cold calling experience

Give a 30-second mock cold call pitch as if you're calling a home service business owner who just opted in for a free marketing consultation



Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.

title: IT Specialist (Philippines)
description:
Job Title: IT Specialist (Philippines)

Company: RoofTop

o

title: GoHighLevel Funnel Builder & Automation Specialist
description:
About Us

SelfDeveloped LLC is a U.S.-based growth marketing and systems agency. We build full-funnel marketing systems for real estate educators, home service companies, and high-ticket coaching businesses. Our founder has 10+ years of experience and has generated $50M+ in results across 120+ clients.

We need a skilled GHL builder who can take copy and creative assets and build them out cleanly and accurately — without hand-holding.

The Role

We do the strategy. You build it. You'll receive copy, brand assets, and build briefs and bring them to life inside GHL — funnels, automations,
/SMS sequences, pipelines, and more. Fast, accurate, and detail-oriented is the standard.

What You'll Be Building



Multi-step funnel pages (opt-in, bridge, upsell, downsell, thank-you)

 and SMS nurture sequences and automation workflows

GHL pipelines and CRM setup for client accounts

Calendar integrations and booking confirmation flows

Sub-account setup and configuration

Form and survey builds

Webhook and third-party integrations (Zapier, Meta CAPI, etc.)

Mobile optimization and brand alignment across all pages



What We're Looking For



Minimum 1–2 years of real, hands-on GoHighLevel experience

Strong understanding of GHL automation logic — triggers, conditions, wait steps, goals, branching

Ability to work from a written brief without needing a call to get started

Clean build habits — labeled workflows, logical naming, no spaghetti automations

Eye for layout and brand consistency

Responsive and able to flag issues before they become problems



Bonus Points:



Experience building inside agency sub-accounts

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager and CAPI integration

Webinar funnel and registration flow experience

Basic Canva or design skills for asset formatting



To Apply

Submit:



A portfolio of GHL builds — funnels, automations, sub-account setups. Screenshots, Loom walkthroughs, or a short doc all work.

A 1–2 minute Loom answering: "Walk me through a GHL automation you built from scratch — what was the trigger, what did it do, and what was the outcome?"



No Loom, no review.

title: Bookkeeper for HVAC, Plumbing and Electrical Companies
description:
We are a U.S.-based fractional CFO firm serving growing HVAC, plumbing, and electrical companies. We are hiring a strong bookkeeper to support our CFO work. This is not a full-charge role. You will not manage clients independently. Your job is to keep the books clean, accurate, and accrual-based so the CFO can provide high-level guidance.



This is an after-the-fact accounting role. Clean up, reconcile, document, and prepare reliable financials.



**Must Have Experience**



* 3+ years of U.S. bookkeeping or accounting experience

* Daily QuickBooks Online usage

* Strong accrual accounting knowledge

* Confident balance sheet reconciliations

* Payroll journal entries and allocations

* Clear understanding of COGS vs operating expenses

* Experience with HVAC, plumbing, or electrical companies required

* ServiceTitan experience is a strong bonus

* Experience supporting multiple clients inside a firm environment preferred

* Reliable high-speed internet



**What You’ll Do**



* Maintain clean accrual-based books in QuickBooks Online

* Reconcile bank and credit card accounts monthly

* Review and post payroll entries properly

* Keep the chart of accounts structured and consistent

* Identify errors, inconsistencies, and unusual activity

* Prepare financials for monthly CFO review



**Schedule**

Monday through Friday, East Coast USA business hours, non-negotiable.



**To Apply**



Submit:



* A resume link (Google Drive or Dropbox)

* Confirmation you can work East Coast hours

* Confirmation of 3+ years U.S. accounting experience

* Brief note describing your experience with HVAC, plumbing, or electrical clients



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: CX Care Coordinator – Growth & Systems | Health / Weight Loss Program
description:
We are a growing health company focused on helping people lose weight and improve their health through modern telehealth programs.



We are looking for a highly capable CX Care Coordinator who will work closely with the founder to support patient experience, community growth, and internal systems.



This role requires someone who is smart, technical, detail-oriented, and proactive. You will become the founder’s right hand in helping manage patient experience, growth initiatives, and operational systems.



Key Requirements (Important)

We are specifically looking for someone who has:

• Experience with GLP-1 weight loss programs (Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, etc.)

• Strong design sense (Canva or similar tools)

• A sharp eye for detail

• Excellent written English and communication

• Comfort working with modern tools and systems



This is not just a support role. We want someone who can think, suggest improvements, and help build systems.



What You’ll Do

Patient Experience (CX)

• Respond to patient questions via chat,
, and messaging

• Help guide patients through onboarding and program questions

• Follow up with leads who expressed interest but didn’t sign up

• Ensure patients feel supported throughout their journey



Growth & Community

• Help improve patient engagement and retention

• Assist with community engagement initiatives

• Identify testimonials and patient success stories

• Suggest improvements to the patient journey



Design & Content

• Create social media graphics and visual content

• Prepare content for community posts and marketing

• Maintain strong visual consistency and quality

• Ensure marketing materials look professional and polished



Systems & Operations

• Help manage and improve CX systems such as:

• Intercom

• 

• CRM tools



automation workflows

• Help identify friction points in onboarding and support

•Work closely with the founder to improve internal processes



Who This Role Is Perfect For

Someone who:

• Has worked with GLP-1 or weight loss programs before

• Has a good design eye and attention to detail

• Is comfortable working with modern software tools

• Enjoys solving problems and improving systems

• Can take initiative and ownership



You should be someone who enjoys helping customers while also thinking about how to improve the overall experience.



Why This Role Is Unique

You will work directly with the founder and help build systems for a growing health company. This role offers long-term growth and the opportunity to become a key part of the company.



How to Apply:

Fill out this quick form: (Do not send
s or messages. Only applications through this form will be considered)

mber!

title: Social Media Content Manager (Offshore)
description:
Global Essence Travel is seeking a creative, detail-oriented, and proactive Social Media Content Manager to support the daily execution and growth of our social media platforms.



We are a luxury travel brand specializing in curated group travel experiences for accomplished professionals, couples, and retirees. Our content must reflect an elevated, warm, intentional, and inclusive “travel family” brand voice while driving engagement and bookings.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Content Creation & Caption Writing

- Write compelling, storytelling captions aligned with brand voice

- Create approximately 10 posts per week

- Ensure posts fit into categories: Travel Family, Editorial, Authority, Offer, Engagement





2. Content Scheduling & Publishing

- Schedule content using Content 360

- Maintain consistent posting schedule

- Plan content 7–10 days in advance



3. Canva Design & Brand Consistency

- Create graphics, carousels, flyers

- Maintain brand colors, fonts, templates



4. TikTok & Reels Support

- Create/edit short-form content using stock footage

- Add hooks and captions



5. Engagement & Lead Identification

- Set up automated responses

- Monitor comments and DMs

- Flag potential leads



6. Analytics & Reporting

- Track weekly metrics

- Identify top-performing content

- Provide reports and insights



7. Content Planning & Strategy

- Maintain 30-day content calendar

- Ensure weekly mix of content categories

- Minimum 2 offer posts and 2 engagement posts per week



Required Skills:

- Strong English writing skills

- Canva proficiency

- Social media platform knowledge

- Basic analytics understanding

- Organized and proactive



Content Style Guidelines:

- Elevated, warm, intentional, community-driven

- Luxury brand tone



Performance Expectations:

- 10 posts per week

- Content scheduled in advance

- Increased engagement and inquiries



Workflow:

Phase 1: Approval required

Phase 2: Weekly review



Application Requirements:

- Portfolio

- Sample captions

- Canva samples

- Scheduling experience
