title: Marketing Assistant (CST Time Needed)
description:
To apply, begin your application message with: "I read the full JD and I am detail-oriented."



About Core Group Resources

Core Group Resources (CGR) is a staffing and workforce solutions firm specializing in maritime, energy, oil and gas, and IT sectors. We operate across the United States, Trinidad, Guyana, and Suriname, connecting top talent with industry-leading clients around the world.

We move fast, communicate clearly, and take our brand seriously. We are looking for a Marketing Assistant who brings the same standard to everything they touch.



Role Overview

This is a remote, full-time position supporting CGR's marketing and communications function. You will work closely with the marketing lead to execute content, manage social media, support
 campaigns, and help keep our digital presence sharp across all business entities under the CGR umbrella.

The right person for this role is organized, proactive, and comfortable working independently. You follow instructions carefully, deliver clean work, and communicate well when you have questions.



What You Will Be Doing

Video Editing and Publishing

• Edit and format short-form and long-form video content for social media distribution

• Publish videos using HubSpot's social media scheduling tool (familiarity with HubSpot is a plus but not required)

• Ensure all published videos meet platform specs and brand guidelines

Graphic Design

• Create daily social media graphics using Canva or similar tools

• Maintain visual consistency with CGR brand colors, fonts, and style

• Design supporting assets for campaigns, events, and announcements as needed

SEO Content Creation

• Write and optimize blog posts, website copy, and other digital content using provided keyword lists

• Implement on-page SEO including meta titles, meta descriptions, header structure, and keyword placement

• Build and manage internal linking across pages and posts

• Ensure all images have descriptive alt text

• Audit existing content for SEO gaps and flag improvements to the marketing lead

Social Media Calendar Management

• Develop and maintain a monthly social media content calendar across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram

• Schedule and publish posts using HubSpot

• Track engagement and surface performance observations to the team

 Marketing

• Assist with the development of drip campaign content and
 sequences

• Help write, format, and schedule marketing
s

• Support list management and segmentation as directed

Cold
 Outreach

• Help draft and refine cold outreach scripts targeting new business and talent pipelines

• Assist with campaign setup and list preparation

• Track campaign performance and report key metrics

General Marketing Support

• Apply all of the above across CGR's affiliated business entities as directed

• Assist with internal communications, announcements, and other marketing deliverables

• Be resourceful, communicate proactively, and flag blockers early

Web Design

• Develop, design, and publish pages using Squarespace and Squarekicker 



What We Are Looking For

• At least 1 to 2 years of marketing, content, or social media experience

• Strong written English communication skills

• Working knowledge of Canva for graphic creation

• Basic understanding of SEO principles including on-page optimization

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks without constant supervision

• Attention to detail and a habit of double-checking your work before submitting

• Comfortable with tools like HubSpot, Google Docs, and social media platforms

• Video editing experience is a plus (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Premiere, or similar)



What We Offer

• Fully remote position with a Monday through Friday schedule

• Stable, long-term opportunity with a growing company

• Clear direction and a collaborative team environment

• Room to grow as the marketing function expands



How to Apply

Submit your application through OnlineJobs.ph. In your cover message, include examples of past marketing work if available (social posts, graphics, writing samples, etc.).

Remember: your application must begin with the phrase noted at the top of this job listing. Applications that do not include it will not be reviewed.

title: Property Management Operations Specialist
description:
EXPERIENCED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VA (BUILDIUM REQUIRED – READ BEFORE APPLYING)

Pacific Homefront Property Management (California, USA)



We are hiring ONE experienced Virtual Assistant with real, hands-on Buildium experience to support and help improve our property management operations.



IMPORTANT:

If you do NOT have actual experience using Buildium in a property management role, do not apply.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can operate independently, solve problems, and help improve systems.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Manage property operations inside Buildium



Tenant communication, rent tracking, and delinquency follow-ups



Maintenance coordination and vendor communication



Lease tracking, move-ins and move-outs



Identify issues and propose improvements to workflows



Support owner communication and reporting



Help maintain and improve SOPs and systems



REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Minimum 3+ years U.S. property management experience



Hands-on Buildium experience (not just “familiar with it”)



Strong understanding of rent collection, maintenance coordination, and leasing processes



Ability to work without constant supervision



Strong English communication (written and verbal)



Stable internet and professional work setup



DO NOT APPLY IF



You have never used Buildium in real work



You need step-by-step instructions for everything



You are applying to multiple jobs without reading this post



WHAT WE VALUE



Initiative (you identify problems before we do)



Accountability (you own results, not just tasks)



Organization and attention to detail



Ability to think and make decisions independently



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY

This role can grow into a Team Lead or Operations Manager position based on performance.



HOW TO APPLY (MANDATORY)

To be considered, your application MUST include:



The word HOMEFRONT at the top of your application



A brief summary of your Buildium experience (specific tasks you performed)



Your years of U.S. property management experience



A short example of a time you solved a problem without being told



Your current number of clients or jobs



Applications that do not follow ALL instructions will be ignored.



COMPENSATION

Based on experience and skill level, with opportunity for long-term growth.



If you are looking for a serious role where you can grow, take ownership, and help build a strong operation, we want to hear from you.

title: Community Relationship Builder (Calls + Discord Engagement)
description:
HOURS 10AM EST to 8PM EST STANDARD TIME

If you can not do these hours, do not apply!



Read carefully before applying:

This role requires daily social outreach inside 
 communities, voice calls, detailed Google Sheet tracking, and consistent follow-up across 300+ active relationships. This is not a passive VA role.





We are hiring a highly fluent English speaker to build relationships and generate qualified leads through 
, voice calls, and structured follow-ups.



This is NOT a hard sales role.

You are NOT closing deals.

You are also NOT cold messaging strangers.



This is a high-activity, structured role for someone who is charismatic, highly organized, and consistent.



------------------------

WHAT YOU WILL ACTUALLY DO

------------------------



1. Join active 
 communities

- Be active in public chat

- Engage naturally in conversations

- Become someone people want to talk to

- Build familiarity and trust inside the community



2. Get people to come to you

- Your job is NOT to cold DM random people

- Instead, you will communicate well in public chats so people want to message you, reply to you, and build a connection with you

- You may also continue conversations with people who are already warm and responsive



3. Build real relationships

- Add people as friends when appropriate

- Continue conversations in DMs only when natural

- Make people feel comfortable, understood, and interested in talking more

- Your goal is to make people like you and trust you



4. Get on voice calls

- Speak with prospects casually

- These are not aggressive sales calls

- Ask questions, build rapport, and understand their goals

- Help them feel comfortable enough to take the next step



5. Guide qualified people forward

- Naturally guide interested people toward our program

- Move serious people to the next step

- Get qualified people into our 
/system

- Encourage them to complete an application if they are a fit



6. Track and follow up at high volume

- You will manage 300+ active relationships/leads at once

- Every person must be tracked in a Google Sheet

- You will log notes, status, last contact date, and next follow-up date

- Consistent follow-up is a major part of this role

- This is detailed, repetitive work and must be done properly



------------------------

IMPORTANT: THIS ROLE IS HIGH VOLUME

------------------------



- You will be talking to many people every day

- You will manage hundreds of ongoing conversations

- You must stay organized and follow up consistently

- This is not passive work

- This is not a casual chatting role

- This is not a role for someone who avoids structure



If you do not like repetition, detailed tracking, follow-up work, or managing a large number of relationships, this role is not for you.



------------------------

COMPENSATION

------------------------



This role pays:

- A small hourly base

- Plus performance pay per lead / qualified result



This is not a large fixed salary role.

The upside comes from performance.



Example:

One current tea
mber is earning around $1,460 USD/month through lead-based performance.



The better you perform, the more you can earn.



------------------------

YOU ARE A GOOD FIT IF:

------------------------



- Your English is extremely clear and natural

- You are easy to understand on calls

- You are charismatic and know how to make friends quickly

- You are comfortable in 
 communities

- You are comfortable getting on calls

- You can handle high-volume follow-up work

- You are organized and consistent

- You can manage a Google Sheet every day without losing track of people



------------------------

YOU ARE NOT A GOOD FIT IF:

------------------------



- You want to cold message strangers

- You avoid calls

- You prefer low-effort chat support work

- You dislike repetitive follow-ups

- You are disorganized

- You cannot manage many conversations at once

- Your English is not strong enough for natural conversation



------------------------

NOT REQUIRED

------------------------



- Sales experience

- Closing experience



We care more about:

- communication

- charisma

- consistency

- organization

- follow-through



------------------------

TO APPLY, YOU MUST SEND:

------------------------



1. A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself

2. A 2-minute mock call:

   “You are meeting someone new and building rapport”

3. A screenshot of your internet speed

4. A short written answer:

   “How would you get people in a 
 community to want to talk to you without cold DMing them?”



Applications without these will be ignored.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
Part-Time Cold Calling Sales Rep / Real Estate (Land)



3-Month Contract | 20 hrs/week | Opportunity to Extend



We’re not looking for average — we’re looking for someone who thrives on outperforming targets and turning discipline into results.



At our company, we operate by three core values: Relentless Excellence, Disciplined Results, and Continuous Innovation. These aren’t just words — they guide how we work every day.



This role is focused primarily on cold calling landowners, identifying selling opportunities, and qualifying motivated sellers to keep our acquisition pipeline strong. If you’re competitive, organized, and enjoy conversations that lead to deals, this role could be a strong fit.



This is a part-time contract role for 3 months with the opportunity to extend based on performance.



Please follow the application process



Do NOT call,
, or DM about this role



JOB DESCRIPTION Video: 
/share/9d
beb2407d1ef59b12

- Contract: 3-month contract with opportunity to extend

)

Cold Calling (Primary Focus)

Attendance & Performance

Role Requirements:



Experience

Reliable Work Setup

title: Weekly Paid Graphic Designer – Video Production & Creative Agency
description:
Schedule: Part-time / Full-time Available



About Us



We are a high-growth Videography and Production Company. We produce everything from music videos and commercials to viral YouTube series like "Spill It." We are looking for a "Go-To" Graphic Designer who can match our cinematic, urban, and high-energy aesthetic.



What You Will Be Doing



Because we are a production house, your work will be diverse and exciting. You won't just be making logos; you will be helping build the visual world of our videos.



High-Conversion YouTube Thumbnails: Creating "clickable" designs for our series (Retention-focused).



Production Pitch Decks: Designing "Director's Treatments" and PDFs to help us win big clients.



Merch Mock-ups: Creating realistic mock-ups for apparel, hats, and accessories.



Event & Social Media Flyers: Bold, "Streetwear" style flyers for our shoots and events.



Video Assets: Designing "Lower Thirds," title cards, and end screens for our editors to use in 4K videos.



Logo & Branding: Full brand kits for new series and client projects.



Requirements



Expert Level: Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator (InDesign or Canva is a plus).



Visual Style: You must be able to do "Cinematic," "Gritty," and "Modern" designs. No basic corporate templates.



Mock-up Mastery: You must know how to make digital designs look like real products (T-shirts, hoodies, etc.).



Communication: Must be responsive and able to work in a fast-paced environment.



Reliability: We pay weekly and expect consistent, high-quality output.



Why Join Our Team?



Weekly Pay: We value your work and ensure you are paid every single week.



Creative Growth: You’ll be designing for real film sets and viral content.



Long-term Role: We are looking for a partner to grow with our agency, not just a one-time freelancer.



How to Apply (MUST FOLLOW)



Send a link to your Portfolio (Be sure to include any YouTube thumbnails or flyer work).



Briefly explain your experience working with Video Production or YouTube brands.



Confirm you are comfortable with Weekly Payments.



Type the word "CREATIVE" at the very top of your application so we know you read the full post.

title: E-commerce Supply Chain Operations VA / Manager (Remote)
description:
E-commerce Supply Chain Operations VA / Manager - 20-30 hours per week or more



THIS IS A REMOTE POSITION - PLEASE SEND RESUME



MUST HAVE REQUIRED EXPERIENCE, ENGLISH FLUENCY AND STABLE HIGH SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION





Description



As a growing ecommerce brand, we are looking for an experienced, detail-obsessed Supply Chain Operations Manager who wants to own something that matters.

You will be responsible for ensuring our inventory model is accurate, purchase orders are placed and tracked with precision, and international vendor relationships are managed proactively. Your work will have direct, visible impact on the business, and you will report directly to the Head of Operations with full visibility into the decisions your data drives.

If you thrive in a lean, high-accountability environment and take genuine pride in airtight execution, this role was built for you.





Essential Functions



Own the full-year PO planning process, calculating unit needs per SKU to ensure inventory never reaches zero

Translate PO needs into the Product Calendar, incorporating lead times across multiple international manufacturing partners

Serve as the primary point of contact for international manufacturing partners, maintaining consistent daily communication to manage production timelines, flag delays, resolve discrepancies, and ensure POs move through production, shipping, and arrival without gaps

Maintain and update the PO Log in ClickUp, including placement timelines, reminders, and status tracking through production, shipping, and arrival

Manage PO reception reconciliation — comparing ordered volume against received volume and reporting discrepancies to the Head of Operations and factory partners

Update inventory projection models to reflect real received quantities and flag any downstream impact on future POs

Surface potential out-of-stock risks proactively and escalate to the Head of Operations for decision-making

Coordinate with the warehouse team to verify incoming shipments align with what was ordered

Maintain familiarity with customs documentation including Bills of Lading, Commercial Invoices, and customs fee structures

Report twice weekly to the Head of Operations with structured updates on PO status, inventory projections, and any items requiring decisions or escalation





Competencies



Deep analytical capability, mainly in excel and google sheets, and comfort managing complex, interdependent data models

Exceptional attention to detail — this role directly impacts inventory levels and business continuity

Strong communication skills. Fluency in English language is a must

Strong understanding of international supply chain operations and procurement cycles

Experienced and confident managing direct relationships with international manufacturing partners — professional, proactive, and capable of holding vendors accountable across cultures and time zones

Ability to manage multiple time-sensitive workstreams independently with minimal supervision

Clear, professional, and proactive communicator across internal teams and external vendor partners

Highly organized with a systematic approach to tracking, updating, and escalating

Comfortable operating across multiple platforms simultaneously in a fast-moving environment

Genuine ownership mentality — treats inventory health as a direct reflection of their work





Education & Experience



Bachelor's degree required; Master's degree a plus; degree in Supply Chain, Logistics, Operations is a huge plus.

Minimum 3–5 years of experience in supply chain, procurement, or operations

Experience supporting a DTC or ecommerce brand is a must

Fluent in written and spoken English; Mandarin proficiency a plus

Proficiency in Excel, Google Sheets, and ClickUp required; familiarity with Shopify and Expeditors platform a plus

Direct experience managing international vendor relationships and PO cycles required

Familiarity with customs documentation (BOL, Commercial Invoices, customs fees) required





Hourly Pay/Workload



$12/hour

20-30 hours per week

title: Remote Travel & Accommodation Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a fast and driven operators to help us connect companies with suitable accommodation across Europe.

You will work with real, active cases and be responsible for moving deals from first contact to confirmed booking.

title: E-commerce PPC & Keyword Strategist (Amazon Seller Central)
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven, proactive and dedicated Amazon PPC & Account Manager to take ownership of our Amazon Seller Central account, with a primary focus on pay-per-click (PPC) campaign management, keyword research, and data-driven decision-making.



If you’re passionate about leveraging analytics, optimizing campaigns, and growing product visibility and sales on Amazon, we’d love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

-Manage and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, etc.)

-Conduct in-depth keyword research to improve organic and paid rankings

-Analyze performance metrics (ACoS, TACoS, ROAS, CTR, CVR, etc.) and provide actionable insights

-Execute product listings optimizations (titles, bullets, backend keywords, etc.)

-Monitor and respond to account health issues, policy violations, and customer feedback

-Stay up-to-date on Amazon’s latest advertising features and platform changes

-Collaborate with internal team or clients on strategy, budgets, and reporting

-Perform competitor analysis to understand market trends and adapt PPC strategies accordingly.

-Generate detailed reports on campaign performance, interpreting key metrics to drive decisions and refine future strategies.



Requirements:

-Proven experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts

-Expertise in Parent-Child relationships within Amazon Seller Central to optimize product listings and variations.

-Hands-on experience with Amazon Ads and campaign optimization

-Strong proficiency in keyword tools (e.g., Helium 10, Jungle Scout, DataDive, etc.)

-Analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

-Ability to interpret data and translate it into performance improvements

-Excellent communication and time management skills

-Detail-oriented, proactive, and results-driven with the ability to work independently.



Preferred Qualifications:

3+ years of experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts, with a focus on PPC, keyword research, and listing optimization.

In-depth knowledge of Amazon advertising tools, including Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display.

Experience with international Amazon marketplaces (UK, Canada, etc.) is a MUST.



Schedule is 9AM-6PM PST

title: Growth Creative Designer (DTC Beauty)
description:
We’re looking for a Growth Creative Designer who combines strong creative instincts with a sharp understanding of what drives results.



This role is ideal for someone who wants real ownership within a fast-growing, venture-backed startup. You’ll work closely with the founder and growth team to create and iterate on performance-driven creative while helping shape and strengthen the brand over time.



This isn’t just about making things look good — it’s about making them work.

Requirements:

title: Accounting Manager
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Accounting Manager to support a portfolio of founder-led consumer product brands across e-commerce, retail, and CPG.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys owning the full accounting function while working closely with founders and operators. You’ll be responsible for maintaining accurate financials, driving strong processes, and delivering insights that support better decision-making.



You’ll operate with a high level of autonomy, manage a small team, and play a key role in maintaining financial clarity across multiple brands.



Responsibilities

• Own and execute month-end close and financial reporting

• Manage inventory accounting, including subledger to GL reconciliations, write-offs, and accuracy checks

• Oversee AP/AR processes, bill payments, and payroll entries

• Prepare and review financial packages (P&L, Balance Sheet, trend analysis)

• Deliver financial insights and recommendations to founders and internal stakeholders

• Act as the primary point of contact for financial matters (calls, presentations, ongoing communication)

• Manage and mentor 1–2 bookkeepers

• Oversee a portfolio of 5–6 brands



Requirements:

• 5+ years of full-cycle accounting experience

• 2+ years working in multi-entity or fast-paced environments (e.g., supporting multiple brands or business units)

• Proven ability to own accounting end-to-end (Controller-level capability)

• Experience managing 1–2 direct reports (bookkeepers)

• Strong experience communicating financial information clearly (calls, presentations, async updates)

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting

• Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

• Strong experience in e-commerce accounting

• Hands-on experience with Shopify and Amazon reconciliations

• Proven ability to independently manage the full accounting cycle

• Strong understanding of financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet)

• Direct ownership of inventory accounting (not just exposure)

• Experience working across multiple entities simultaneously

• Advanced Excel skills



Nice to have:

• Experience with NetSuite

• Familiarity with fintech and accounting tools such as 
, Ramp, Mercury, Rho, Settle, Wayflyer, Gusto, Deel, and JustWorks

• Experience with inventory systems such as CIN7, Fishbowl, Katana, or ApparelMagic

• Familiarity with wholesale tools (SPS Commerce is a strong plus)

title: WordPress Designer/Developer
description:
We are looking for a talented Web Designer to join our team. The ideal candidate will possess a strong proficiency in CSS, WordPress, Blocks, GeneratePress, and Advanced Custom Fields, with a keen eye for creating visually appealing and user-friendly web designs. Additionally, experience in creating dynamic media sites will be highly valued. An understanding of PHP and web hosting-related skills is helpful.



Training for GeneratePress and Blocks is available, but a good sense of CSS is a must. We are also in the process of moving towards the Etch Page builder in the near future. 



Responsibilities:



* Developed and customize WordPress websites using Generate Press, Advanced Custom Fields and Blocks.

* Use the WordPress Block Editor (Gutenberg) to create and modify layouts, ensuring seamless content integration and an exceptional user experience.

* Use GeneratePress, including theme setup, customization, and optimization, to achieve desired design and functionality outcomes.

* Implement and extend Advanced Custom Fields (ACF) to create dynamic and flexible content structures, allowing for easy content management and updates.

* Maintain and update existing websites, troubleshoot issues, and implement enhancements as needed.

* Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, and design techniques, and contribute innovative ideas to projects.

* You will be working on a base theme from GeneratePress to build websites

* Help build a better base theme and faster workflow for quick website builds.





Requirements:



* Expert knowledge of CSS, HTML, and responsive web design principles.

* Strong expertise in WordPress, including theme customization, plugin integration, and content management.

* Familiarity with the WordPress Block Editor (Gutenberg) and its application in building dynamic and flexible web layouts.

* Prior experience with the GeneratePress theme, including setup, configuration, and design customization not required but a bonus. Training will be provided if needed.

* Proficiency in Advanced Custom Fields (ACF) and their implementation for creating dynamic content structures.

* Graphic design skills are a plus, but not mandatory.

* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues related to web design and development.

* Excellent time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.

* A portfolio showcasing past projects demonstrating your skills in CSS, WordPress, Blocks, GeneratePress, Advanced Custom Fields, and dynamic media integration (design samples, if available).

* Continuous learning attitude and a desire to stay updated on the latest web design trends, tools, and technologies.

Benefits:



Competitive salary and benefits package.



* Professional development and growth opportunities.

* Chance to contribute to a diverse range of projects, including dynamic media sites.

* Flexible work arrangements

* Training and ongoing education will be offered.



If you are a highly motivated Web Designer with a strong foundation in CSS, WordPress, Blocks, GeneratePress, Advanced Custom Fields, and a flair for creating dynamic media-rich sites, we encourage you to apply and share your expertise with us.



Please note: We will not be using Elementor or other similar page builders. If your skill is only in that page builder, please don't apply.

title: Social Media Content & Marketing Specialist
description:
NewDay Child Coaching is an online coaching practice — not a clinic — built on something we believe no one else is doing quite like this. We are a Physical Therapist, an Occupational Therapist, and a Speech-Language Pathologist. Three disciplines. Three professional lenses. Three distinct voices — unified into one warm, expert, parent-first brand.

We serve families during the critical 0–36 month developmental window, empowering parents to become the expert for their own child. We are actively launching a new developmental coaching framework and a corresponding app — and we need our social media presence to grow alongside that mission so more families can find us.

Our community of NewDawns™ — that's what we call our families — spans
 (16,000+ followers), Instagram, TikTok, Threads, and YouTube. If you believe the right message, on the right platform, at the right time can genuinely change a family's life — we want to talk to you.



The Role

Position: Social Media Content & Marketing Specialist

Hours: 15–20 hours/week to start

Rate: $4.00 USD/hour starting rate, with increases tied to performance and results

Schedule: Flexible within your timezone; some overlap with US Pacific hours preferred

Type: Part-Time Independent Contractor | Long-term potential



This is not a posting role. This is a relationship-building, brand-nurturing, community-growing role. You'll work directly from a detailed Social Media Strategy Toolkit we've already built — executing content plans, engaging with our community, and keeping our brand voice consistent and warm across every channel.

A key priority of this role is growing our
 subscriber base — converting our 16,000+ followers into an active, subscribed audience that hears from us first and stays connected to our mission long-term.



What You'll Do



Execute weekly and monthly content calendars across
, Instagram, TikTok, Threads, and YouTube

Create and schedule posts — graphics, captions, short-form and long-form video concepts — using our provided tools and brand guidelines



Engage meaningfully with comments, DMs, and community posts, especially on our
 page and
 Channel

Actively implement strategies that convert followers into subscribers

Adapt content per platform: 
munity building, TikTok trends and short-form video, Instagram Reels and Stories, Threads conversational content, YouTube Shorts and long-form

Repurpose long-form content (blog posts, course material) into snackable social posts

Draft captions in our established brand voice — warm, expert, parent-first

Monitor trends and flag relevant opportunities for timely content

Compile a simple weekly performance snapshot (engagement, reach, follower growth)

Collaborate with our founder in weekly check-in meetings via video call

Support giveaway campaigns, product launches, and community events



Tools You'll Use

Canva: Graphics and visual content (required)

CapCutShort-form video editing (minimum bar)

DaVinci Resolve / Adobe Premiere ProVideo editing (moves you to the top of our list)

Meta Business Suite / Buffer / Later

Trello Task tracking

JibbleTime tracking (required — non-negotiable)

WisePayment processing



What We're Looking For

Required:

Proven experience managing social media for a business or brand (links and portfolio required)

Deep understanding of platform-specific strategies — you know
 is NOT 
, and you create accordingly

Proficiency in Canva and CapCut for graphics and design

Strong written English — warm, clear, and conversational (Grammarly use is welcome and encouraged)

Reliable internet and a consistent work schedule

Comfortable working independently using provided systems and strategy guides

Strong attention to detail — brand consistency matters deeply to us



Nice to Have (will move you to the top of our list):

Experience in health, wellness, parenting, or early childhood content

Video editing skills beyond CapCut — DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro

Demonstrated knowledge of
 subscriber/follower growth strategies

Experience managing
 Groups, Community pages, or
 Channels

YouTube channel growth experience — Shorts, SEO for video, community tab

Experience using AI tools to accelerate content creation



Pay, Hours & Time Tracking

Starting rate: $4.00 USD/hour

This is an honest starting point for a new contractor relationship. Your rate grows with demonstrated results — platform knowledge, consistent delivery, real engagement growth, and strong communication will be rewarded.

Hours: 15–20 hours/week



Content planning and calendar management: ~3–4 hrs/week

Content creation (graphics, captions, repurposing): ~4–6 hrs/week

Scheduling and posting: ~2–3 hrs/week

Community engagement (comments, DMs, group interaction): ~3–4 hrs/week

Performance tracking and weekly reporting: ~1–2 hrs/week

Weekly team check-in: ~1 hr/week



Time tracking: Jibble is required. You are paid for the hours you work — no more, no less.

Payment: Twice monthly via Wise — on the 15th and the 30th.

Before you can begin work, you must:



Provide a valid BIR-TIN (Bureau of Internal Revenue Tax Identification Number)

Complete and submit a W-8BEN form (Certificate of Foreign Status for U.S. tax purposes)

These are non-negotiable requirements and must be completed prior to your start date.



Trial Period

Because this role is vital to the success of our business, we begin all new contractors with a 2-week to 1-month paid trial period. During this time, we'll evaluate communication, consistency, content quality, and early engagement results together. If things go well on both sides — and we expect they will — we'll move forward with a long-term offer. We want someone who is also evaluating us, not just the other way around.



Our Culture & What We Expect

We are a small but mighty team. Everyone on the NewDay team shows up with heart, communicates proactively, and cares deeply about our families — our NewDawns™.



We are looking for someone in it for the long haul. If you want a quick gig, this is not the right fit.

Reliability is non-negotiable. We do not work with people who ghost or stop communicating. If something comes up, you talk to us — that's how a team works.

Social media marketing must be your genuine passion — not just a job you fell into.

We provide detailed systems, strategy guides, and brand toolkits. You will never be left guessing.

We value creativity within structure. We have a brand voice and visual identity; we want you to bring it to life, not reinvent it.

We expect timely responses within 24 hours on business days.



How to Apply

Please submit all five of the following. Applications missing any item will not be reviewed — this is our first test of your attention to detail.

1. A brief introduction (3–5 sentences)

Who are you, and why is this role a genuine fit for you?

2. Links to 2–3 social media accounts you've managed

Business or brand pages only — not personal accounts. Include any growth metrics you're proud of.

3. A platform strategy answer

In 2–4 sentences: What makes
 content strategy different from 
 content strategy?

4. A social media audit of NewDay Child Coaching

Before applying, review our presence on
, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, and 
 200–400 words, tell us:



What is working well and what needs improvement across our platforms?

What specific changes would you make to grow our followers and engagement?

What is your strategy for converting our 16,000+
 followers into paying subscribers?



You may use AI tools to help formulate and polish your response — we use AI ourselves and we're not testing your typing. We are testing your strategy and creative vision.

5. Your availability and timezone



Subject line for your application: Social Media Specialist Application — [Your Name]

Send to: 

This position is open until filled. We review applications on a rolling basis. Serious inquiries only.



NewDay Child Coaching | Nurturing NewDawns. Illuminating NewWays.™

title: Shoe Sourcing Expert
description:
Looking for a talented Online Arbitrage (OA) Virtual Assistant (VA) for long-term work and growth. We are specifically looking for a shoe sourcing specialist/expert. We expect you to be pre trained and have prior experience sourcing shoes.



We are a US-based e-commerce company doing multi-millions in sales per year on Amazon. We have been consistently scaling for 5 years. We have a strong and collaborative team that values consistency and results.



POSITION DETAILS:

- Pay: $1000/month (PHP 60,000) + opportunities for bonuses

- WORK FROM HOME (flexible schedule)

- Full-time: 40 hours/week

- Pay schedule: Bi-weekly



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Source profitable online arbitrage products for Amazon (manual sourcing)

- Record leads in Google Sheets (clean and organized)

- Evaluate deals quickly and accurately (profitability + competition)



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Amazon Product Sourcing / Deal Sourcing

- SellerAmp / Keepa

- Fast and reliable internet connection

- Sourcing Shoes

title: Creative Researcher / Strategy Assistant (E-commerce Ads | Meta)
description:
About Us



We are an e-commerce creative agency focused on performance-driven ads for brands spending serious money on Meta.

We don’t just design ads — we build winning creatives based on psychology, angles, and data.

We are looking for a smart, detail-oriented researcher to help us find winning patterns and support our creative strategy.



Your Role



You will support our team by researching ads from competitors of our clients, identifying patterns, and organizing insights that lead to high-performing creatives.



This is not a generic VA job — you will learn how high-level advertising works.



Your Responsibilities



- Research ads using Meta Ad Library

- Find 20–50 relevant ads for our clients

- Document findings in spreadsheets



Break down ads into:



Hook

Angle

Format

Awareness level  (we can train you in this)



Find and track competitors and identify:



- What they are testing

 -Which ads keep running (important signal)

- Organize everything into our database (Notion/Airtable/spreadsheets)



Suggest basic creative ideas based on patterns



What We’re Looking For



Strong English

High attention to detail

Fast learner

Organized and structured



Interested in marketing / advertising



You don’t need years of experience — mindset matters more



Not Required (but helpful):



Experience with Meta ads

Experience with e-commerce



Work Setup



Part-time: 10–15 hours per week

Flexible schedule (but consistent output required)



Salary



$5–6/hour (depending on experience)



Growth Opportunity



If you perform well, you can grow into:



- Creative strategist

- More responsibility

- Higher pay



Application Task  (takes max. 5 minutes)



To apply, complete this short task:



- Go to Meta Ad Library

- Search for a brand in fitness, fashion, or cosmetics

 - Find 2–3 ads



For each ad, answer:



What is the first thing you notice in this ad?

What do you think the ad is trying to sell or communicate?

Why do you think this ad could work well?

(think about what angle they use, why it works etc)



you can give me the adlibrary link of the specific ad + your answer on above questions



- There are no “perfect answers” — we are looking at how you think

- This helps us see how you think



To Apply



Start your application with:

“AdLab Researcher”



And include:



- Your answer to the test task

- Your experience (if any)

- Why you want this role



Thanks for reading and we can't wait to hear from you :)

title: TikTok / Short-form Video Editor - DIY & Renovation content
description:
Hi! I’m looking for a skilled video editor to help me create engaging TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts focused on UK house renovation content.



You’ll receive raw footage each evening (9-10pm UK time) via WeTransfer, and your job is to edit it into 2-3 minute videos that match my current editing style and personality - fast-paced, dynamic, and engaging. Most clips should appear on screen for less than 0.8 seconds unless I’m speaking or there’s a key action like singing or dancing.



Videos are posted daily, with up to 10 videos some weeks. You must deliver each edited video within 12 hours of receiving the footage (by 9-10am UK time the next day).



What you’ll do:

- Cut longer raw house renovation footage into punchy, engaging short-form videos.

- Follow my existing editing style but always look for ways to make the content better.

- Deliver final videos via WeTransfer within the strict turnaround time.

- Communicate clearly about progress and revisions.



What I’m looking for:

- Experience editing viral short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube Shorts.

- Ability to work under tight deadlines, 7 days a week.

- Proficient with any adobe premiere pro

- MUST be able to edit 360 footage from an Insta360 camera

- Great attention to detail and reliability.

- Strong English comprehension for following instructions and communication.



Hours & Pay:

- Up to 7-10 videos per week, about 1-2 hours editing per video.

- Max 15 hours per week.

- Pay rate: $5 USD/hour.



How to apply:

- Please send a brief summary of your experience editing short-form content, links to your previous work or portfolio. Include "Benje I want to edit your content" in your application. Do not apply if you can't edit 360 footage.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
The Role

We're looking for a self-sufficient Remote SEO Specialist who lives and breathes search — not just traditional SEO, but the emerging world of AI-driven search and Generative Engine Optimization. You'll work directly on dealership accounts, developing strategies, creating SOPs, executing technical work, and helping shape how our agency approaches SEO and GEO for a competitive industry.



This isn't a "set it and forget it" role. You'll be expected to think, build, and improve — and you'll have the tools and autonomy to do it.



What You'll Do

SEO Strategy & Execution

• Manage on-page, technical, and local SEO for automotive dealership clients

• Conduct keyword research with a focus on intent, AI Overview triggers, and dealer-relevant queries

• Audit and improve site structure, internal linking, HTML markup, and schema

• Optimize Google Business Profile listings for local visibility and engagement

• Monitor and report on keyword rankings, GBP actions, VDP views, and branded search volume growth



Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

• Execute content and citation strategies designed to increase AI Overview appearances

• Build brand authority through content distribution across LinkedIn, Medium, Reddit, YouTube, and industry forums

• Research and monitor how AI search engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity) surface dealership content

• Stay current with AI search ranking signals and adapt strategies accordingly



Content & Technical

• Write and publish SEO-optimized content for dealership websites (models, geo pages, FAQs, buying guides)

• Apply basic HTML and on-page markup — you know what a title tag, H-tag hierarchy, and schema look like in the wild

• Identify and resolve crawl issues, redirect chains, duplicate content, and Core Web Vital problems

• Bonus: Assist with light web development tasks or CMS-level page builds when needed



Process, Systems & Innovation

• Create and maintain SOPs for repeatable SEO and GEO tasks

• Use AI tools (especially Claude / Claude Code) to automate reporting, content drafts, research, and workflow steps

• Proactively identify inefficiencies and propose — then build — better ways of doing things

• Bring ideas to tea
etings; we want to hear what you're reading, testing, and thinking



What We're Looking For

Required

• 2+ years of hands-on SEO experience (agency or in-house)

• Proficiency with Ahrefs — keyword research, backlink analysis, site audits, rank tracking

• Working knowledge of HTML — enough to edit source, identify issues, and implement fixes

• Familiarity with AI tools — specifically Claude or Claude Code for research, content, and automation

• Strong understanding of Google Search Console and GA4 for performance analysis

• Self-starter mentality — you figure things out, you don't wait to be told

• Ability to write clear SOPs and document your processes

• Strong written communication skills



Preferred / Bonus

• Experience in automotive SEO or dealer digital marketing

• Understanding of GEO concepts — AI Overview optimization, entity-based SEO, citation building

• Web development skills (HTML/CSS, basic JS, CMS platforms like WordPress or 
)

• Experience building or using prompt-based AI workflows for agency tasks

• Familiarity with Looker Studio, Data Studio, or similar reporting tools



You'll Thrive Here If You...

• Love being at the intersection of SEO and AI — and you're curious about what comes next

• Get excited about building systems, not just completing tasks

• Read SEO blogs, Reddit threads, and AI newsletters because you genuinely want to

• Can manage multiple client accounts without needing hand-holding on every step

• Bring solutions to the table, not just problems

• Understand that in automotive SEO, branded keyword growth and GBP actions often matter more than raw traffic



Tools You'll Use

Ahrefs  •  Claude / Claude Code  •  Google Search Console  •  Google Analytics 4  •  Google Business Profile  •  Looker Studio  •  WordPress / Dealer CMS platforms  •  Slack  •  Google Workspace

title: Phone-Based Appointment Setter / SDR – US Home Care Clients (GoHighLevel)
description:
ABOUT US


 is a US-based growth agency that helps home care agencies get more clients through
 advertising. Our clients provide in-home care to elderly and disabled individuals across the United States. We're a small, fast-moving team hiring our first dedicated Appointment Setter / SDR.



THE ROLE

You will call
 leads within 5 minutes of them filling out a form asking about home care services. On that call, you will build trust, pre-qualify their needs, and book them directly for a free in-home consultation with our client's care team.

This is not a handoff role. You qualify AND book the appointment in one call. The funnel you own:

New Lead ? You Call & Qualify ? You Book the In-Home Assessment ? Assessment Happens



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY



Call every new lead within 5 minutes of form submission (triple-dial on first attempt)

Pre-qualify prospects using our BANT framework (care needs, timeline, decision-maker, service area)

Book in-home consultations directly into the agency's calendar in GoHighLevel while on the phone

Handle objections: "I don't want someone in my house," "Just send me info," "How much does it cost?"

Follow up relentlessly: up to 7 dials on Day 1, morning and evening calls for 14 days, strategic texts and voice notes

Log every call in GoHighLevel with notes, tags, and correct pipeline stage

Send personalized voice notes and texts between call blocks

Ask if the family decision-maker can be present at the home visit (increases close rate)



WHAT YOU ARE NOT DOING



No cold calling — every lead already filled out a form asking for help

No closing or discussing pricing — the care specialist handles that at the home visit

No Medicaid paperwork — for Medicaid leads, you pre-qualify and schedule into the intake coordinator's calendar

No admin, data entry, social media, or tasks outside of calling and scheduling



DAILY TARGETS



50-80 outbound call attempts

15-20 live conversations

7-10 in-home assessments booked

100% of new leads called within 5 minutes

Every call logged in GHL with notes



COMPENSATION



Base: $10/hour + bonuses + incentives 



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS (Non-Negotiable)



Near-native English fluency with a neutral or American accent. You will be calling elderly Americans and their worried adult children. Any noticeable accent will break trust immediately.



1+ year of phone-based SDR, appointment setting, or outbound sales experience. You must be comfortable calling strangers, handling rejection, and following a script while sounding natural.



Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL). You must already know how to navigate contacts, update pipeline stages, use the calendar/booking system, send texts, and manage tags. We will not train you on GHL basics.



Reliable internet (minimum 25 Mbps) and a completely quiet workspace. No background noise during calls. Your environment must sound professional.



Available for US Central Time business hours: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM CST, Mon

day through Friday.



Genuine empathy and patience. You are calling someone's grandmother or someone's stressed-out daughter. If you can't slow down, listen, and make people feel safe, this role is not for you.



Comfortable booking in-home visits, not just phone calls. You're scheduling a real person to enter someone's home. You must be able to position this as safe, free, and no-obligation.



NICE-TO-HAVE (Strong Preference)



Background in healthcare, home care, or senior services

Experience responding to
 lead ads or warm inbound leads

Background as a licensed English teacher or call center trainer

Experience sending personalized voice notes as part of a follow-up cadence

Familiarity with US geography and culture



TOOLS YOU'LL USE



GoHighLevel (GHL) — CRM, dialer, texting, pipeline, calendar booking

Google Workspace — Calendar, Sheets, Docs

Loom — Call recording and coaching reviews

Slack or WhatsApp — Team communication



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



Every lead is warm (they asked for help, you're not cold calling)

You own the full outcome from first call to booked appointment

Full training provided: call scripts, objection guides, follow-up cadences

Your earnings grow as we add clients



Path to team lead as we scale and hire additional SDRs



1-WEEK PAID TRIAL



All new hires start with a 1-week paid trial at full base rate ($5/hr x 40 hrs = $200). You'll complete training, practice calls, and start making live calls under coaching. At the end of the week, we both d
 if it's a fit.



HOW TO APPLY

Your application MUST include all four of the following or it will not be reviewed:



1. A 60-second voice recording introducing yourself in English. Tell us your name, where you're from, your SDR experience, and why you want this role. Use Loom, Vocaroo, or a voice memo and include the link. APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A VOICE RECORDING WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



2. Your GHL experience in detail. What did you use it for? Which features (pipelines, calendars, workflows, dialer, texting)? How many months? Rate yourself 1-10.



3. Your previous SDR or appointment setting results. How many calls per day? Appointment set rate? What industry? How long in the role?



4. Your availability and workspace. What US hours can you work? Describe your workspace. What is your internet speed?



We review applications within 48 hours. Qualified candidates receive a 15-minute phone screen including a live mock objection scenario.

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
DESCRIPTION:

The primary objective of the patient care coordinator is to ensure that patients are properly attended to and assisted throughout their journey through the system by calling leads and scheduling appointments with providers.

The patient care coordinator must assist the patient in any informational or administrative issues that they may come in contact with.



The patient care coordinator owns all aspects of the patient journey. They are responsible for answering questions, interpreting responses, and evaluating improvements based on their experience with their patient’s needs.

The patient care coordinator must primarily support the patient’s journey while at the same time taking part in process improvement initiatives. They must be able to act autonomously, with minimal supervision, executing tasks based on company directives and goals under fast-paced timelines.



QUALIFICATIONS:

Excellent verbal and written English communication skills [C2(Advanced/Mastery) preferred]

Be extremely organized, positive, and uplifting. The patient care coordinator is the second face of the company (after the website / sign-up app)!

Proper patient intake / after appointment coordination

Proper execution of emerging patient roadblocks and challenges

Proactive management of the patient journey

Knowledge of EMR and privacy requirements in the Canada/USA (HIPAA, PHIPA, PIPEDA)

Business and tech-savvy acumen

Engagement with the product development team for process improvement initiatives

Maintain a professional and respectful relationship with all patients & MD correspondence

Support cross-functional projects relating to but not directly supported by the patient intake team

Ability to work with confidential company information.

Be flexible with your available workday/times. Overnight work might be required due to the time difference.



EDUCATION / EXPERIENCE:

Bachelor’s Degree, Healthcare Management, Nursing, Patient Care, Public Health

Minimum of 2 years related experience

Customer care industry experience

Experience within the healthcare and/or cloud computing industries is desired

Basic mathematical and computer skills

Google & Microsoft Office Suite

Experience working with and improving standard procedures & processes

Demonstrated ability to learn new skills and interact with new systems/ procedures

Presentation experience

Strong interpersonal skills



ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS:

Assist patients in the USA / Canada.

Must be able to adequately perform the above duties with reasonable accommodation.

Must have a stable internet connection and a quiet place to work.



If interested, please include a link to your updated resume as well as link to a 3-5 minute video introduction to your message/application and send it to jobs [at] rocketdoctor [d0t] io.

 provided in this manner to avoid masking and save interested candidate effort of having to register or log in to OnlineJobs.

We are seeking a proactive and people-focused Caregiver Relationship Coordinator to join the team remotely from the Philippines as an Independent Contractor.

This role plays a key part in facilitating communication, addressing workforce concerns, and supporting performance improvement initiatives. title: AI Specialist (Content, Data & Automation)
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, analytical, and forward-thinking AI Specialist who understands content, data, and digital systems—and knows how to turn insights into action. If you love working with data, writing with purpose, optimizing systems, and using AI tools to create smarter workflows… keep reading. This role is perfect for someone who blends sports analytics, risk analysis, content creation, and AI-powered automation into one powerful skill set.



About the Role

You’ll help us build and optimize AI-driven systems that support content creation, data analysis, research, and digital growth.

This is not just about using ChatGPT. We want someone who understands: Data, Logic, SEO, Automation, Risk analysis, Algorithm-driven thinking. Someone who can think critically, write clearly, and build smarter workflows using AI tools.



Key Responsibilities

• Use AI tools to generate, refine, and optimize written content (blogs, newsletters, scripts, guides).

• Analyze data and turn it into meaningful insights.

• Support SEO strategy using AI-assisted research and optimization.

• Create structured prompts and workflows for AI systems.

• Assist with algorithmic content development and structured logic writing.

• Help improve internal systems through automation and AI tools.

• Conduct research and transform findings into clear, organized outputs.

• Support social media and digital marketing efforts using AI-driven strategies.

• Monitor trends in sports, betting, analytics, and AI applications.



We sometimes ask for flexible support on related tasks, but nothing outside your skill set—and always with clear communication.

, Instagram, YouTube)

title: DTC Ads Specialist
description:
Job Overview:



Sequence Commerce is hiring a DTC Ads Manager to lead paid media strategy and execution for direct-to-consumer brands. This role is responsible for planning, launching, optimizing, and reporting on performance campaigns that drive traffic, revenue, and profitable growth across major paid channels.



The ideal candidate has strong hands-on experience managing DTC ad accounts, understands full-funnel acquisition, and knows how to balance creative testing, audience strategy, and performance efficiency.





Key Responsibilities:



- Manage paid media campaigns across channels such as Google, Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, and other relevant traffic sources

- Build campaign structures for prospecting, retargeting, and conversion-focused growth

- Launch, monitor, and optimize campaigns based on revenue, ROAS, CPA, MER, and customer acquisition goals

- Analyze account performance and identify opportunities to scale winning campaigns or improve underperforming areas

- Work closely with creative, strategy, and account teams to develop testing roadmaps and performance insights

- Audit client accounts and create strategic recommendations for growth

- Manage budgets, pacing, bid strategies, audience segmentation, and feed-based campaign performance

- Prepare clear client-facing reports, performance summaries, and action plans

- Support onboarding of new clients through account audits, setup reviews, and launch planning

- Stay current on platform changes, attribution trends, creative best practices, and DTC growth strategies



Requirements:

- 3+ years of hands-on paid media experience in DTC or ecommerce advertising

- Strong experience with Meta Ads and Google Ads

- Working knowledge of TikTok Ads, YouTube Ads, and Pinterest Ads is preferred

- Proven ability to manage campaigns focused on ecommerce revenue growth, not just lead generation

- Strong understanding of attribution, pixel tracking, conversion events, product feeds, and analytics

- Comfortable interpreting performance data and translating it into action

- Experience managing multiple client accounts at once

- Strong communication and presentation skills

- Highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



Preferred Qualifications

- Agency experience managing multiple ecommerce brands

- Experience with Amazon or Walmart advertising is a plus

- Familiarity with creative testing frameworks and landing page performance analysis

- Experience with reporting tools, GA4, Shopify analytics, and feed management tools

- Ability to think strategically while also executing day-to-day account work



Success in This Role

- A strong DTC Ads Manager in this role will:

- Improve account efficiency and revenue performance across client portfolios

- Build clear testing plans and optimization roadmaps

- Communicate confidently with internal teams and clients

- Identify growth opportunities quickly and act on them

- Maintain strong attention to detail while managing multiple moving parts



Compensation and Structure

- Full-time role

- Remote or hybrid depending on company preference

- Compensation based on experience

- Performance incentives can be added based on client growth and retention



Why Join Sequence Commerce

- Work with a team deeply specialized in ecommerce growth

- Help scale brands across major digital channels

- Collaborate with experienced operators, strategists, and marketplace experts

- Be part of a fast-growing agency with strong performance standards and meaningful client impact



Please send your resume and Ads Portfolio to: 
 and

title: Accountant
description:
Privately Held Investment & Wealth Management Firm



Our finance team plays a central role in the business, ensuring leadership has clear, accurate financial information to guide strategic decisions.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented accounting professional who takes pride in maintaining clean books, building structured processes, and delivering consistent, dependable work. This role owns core accounting operations and is responsible for maintaining accuracy and discipline across recurring monthly cycles.



You’ll work directly with leadership and operate with a high level of autonomy. Success in this role requires strong judgment, follow-through, and comfort managing both day-to-day accounting and critical monthly deliverables in a fast-moving but well-structured environment.



What You’ll Own

• Day-to-day accounting operations across multiple entities

• Timely and accurate month-end close processes

• Account reconciliations and financial reporting

• Payroll processing (Gusto)

• Commission calculations tied to assets under management

• Maintaining organized and reliable financial data

• Preparing account summaries and supporting leadership reporting



What We’re Looking For

• 2+ years of experience as an Accountant or Senior Accountant

• Experience with QuickBooks and Gusto

• Strong Excel proficiency, including working within shared spreadsheets

• Experience in wealth management, financial planning, or financial services

• Prior experience working for a U.S.-based financial company

• Experience calculating commissions and performing reconciliations

• Strong understanding of accounting principles, financial reporting, and compliance (GAAP/IFRS, tax, audits)

• Experience preparing account summaries

• Familiarity with tax reduction strategies is a plus

• CPA preferred, but not required

• Willing and able to complete a background check requiring fingerprinting



How You Work

• Comfortable navigating shared file systems and cloud-based environments

• Confident working directly in shared documents without relying on local downloads

• Quick learner who adapts easily to new systems and processes

• Proactive communicator, comfortable engaging directly with leadership (Slack-based communication)

• Confident asking questions and seeking clarification

• Reliable, analytical, and highly detail-oriented

title: Business Development Representative
description:
We are hiring a Remote Business Development Representative (BDR) to help us book qualified sales calls with Amazon brands that fit our ideal client profile.



Role Overview:

You will be responsible for outbound prospecting, lead qualification, and booking discovery calls for our sales team. This is a performance-driven role with a clear short-term target and long-term growth opportunity.



About Us:

Sequence Commerce is a full-service e-commerce advertising agency that helps brands grow on Amazon and Walmart through strategy, advertising, and account management.



We work with emerging DTC brands, established enterprises, and high-growth companies looking to scale profitably in marketplace ecosystems.



What You’ll Do:

- Research and identify Amazon brands that match our ideal customer profile

- Build lead lists and find the right decision-makers

- Reach out through
, LinkedIn, and other outbound channels

- Start conversations and qualify prospects based on our criteria

- Book sales calls with qualified leads for our team

- Keep prospect data organized and updated

- Follow outreach processes consistently and hit weekly activity goals



Target for First Month:



To be considered successful in this trial role, you must:

1. Book 10 qualified calls within your first month

2. Those calls must show up

3. Leads must match our ideal customer profile



Compensation:

- Trial / Performance-Based Phase - $100 CAD per qualified booked call that shows up



Full-Time Opportunity:

If you perform well and are a strong fit, we may offer a full-time role with:

- $500 CAD base pay

- $100 CAD per qualified booked call that matches ICP



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:

- Has experience in B2B lead generation, appointment setting, or sales development

- Is confident writing clear, personalized outreach messages

- Can research companies and decision-makers effectively

- Understands how to qualify leads before booking calls

- Is organized, proactive, and results-driven

- Is comfortable working remotely and independently

- Has strong English communication skills



Bonus If You Have

- Experience prospecting e-commerce or Amazon brands

- Experience using LinkedIn,
 outreach tools, or CRM systems

- Experience booking calls for agencies or service businesses

- Familiarity with Amazon sellers, marketplace brands, or e-commerce growth services



Ideal Prospect Profile:

You will be targeting Amazon brands that are likely to need help with growth, advertising, and marketplace strategy.



We are generally looking for brands that:

- Sell on Amazon (Any marketplace)

- Need better advertising performance, growth strategy, or marketplace support

- Are a fit for a professional agency relationship

- Revenues over $50,000 USD/month or $500,000 Per Year



How We Measure Success

We care about results, not just activity. Success in this role is based on:

- Number of qualified calls booked

- Show-up rate

- Lead quality

- Consistency of outreach and follow-up

- Ability to generate real pipeline opportunities



To Apply Please include:

- A short summary of your BDR or appointment-setting experience

- Examples of industries or clients you have booked calls for

- Your approach to finding and qualifying leads

- Why you are a good fit for this role

- Your availability and timezone



Important Note:

This role is ideal for someone who is confident in outbound prospecting and wants to earn based on performance first, with the opportunity to grow into a longer-term position.

s (order status, sizing, returns, etc.)

title: Customer Support Gorgias Chat
description:
Customer Support Specialist (Gorgias + AI Agent Integration)

Remote | Contract-to-Hire



6FT CLUB is looking for a proactive and tech-savvy Customer Support Specialist with hands-on experience using Gorgias. This role goes beyond tickets — we’re building out smart support systems, and we need someone who can help set up, optimize, and automate our Gorgias helpdesk, including training the AI agent (powered by ChatGPT) and building out a knowledge base for long-term scalability.



What You’ll Do:

	•	Set up and configure Gorgias for a fast-growing e-commerce brand

	•	Train the AI Agent using tools like ChatGPT

	•	Create clear, structured process documents to upload to the Gorgias Knowledge Center

	•	Build and organize FAQ, macros, and automated responses

	•	Help define escalation processes and when to hand off to a human

	•	Collaborate with founder and team to continually optimize customer experience



Requirements:

	•	1+ year experience with Gorgias (or similar helpdesk tools)

	•	Strong understanding of AI chat automation and ChatGPT integration

	•	Ability to create clear SOPs and documentation

	•	E-commerce or DTC brand experience preferred

	•	Bonus if you’ve worked with Shopify



What We Offer:

	•	Fully remote & flexible hours

	•	Opportunity to shape support systems from the ground up

	•	Potential for ongoing work or full-time role



Think you’re a fit? Apply with examples of Gorgias setups or knowledge base documents. Will to train the right person or someone that is a self starter and can learn along the way.



We want to continually keep improving and optimizing our customer support Chatbot, but this will also include having a human in case the Chatbot needs to hand over the conversation or escalate an issue with an actual customer support person .

title: Workforce Analyst
description:
Workforce Analyst (Remote)

Full-Time | Remote | US-Based Healthcare Company 



Submission of a CV/resume is required to be considered for this position. Applications without a resume will not be considered



About the Role

We’re looking for a Workforce Analyst to help turn large volumes of workforce, scheduling, and operations data into clear, actionable insights. This role will own the process of gathering data from multiple systems, cleaning and combining it, and building automated dashboards and reports in Power BI and Excel to support decision-making across the organization.



You’ll work closely with leadership, central scheduling, and operations teams to identify trends, improve labor efficiency, and support data-driven management of staffing operations.



Key Responsibilities

• Collect, clean, and consolidate data from multiple systems (HRIS, timekeeping, scheduling, agency, and productivity tools).

• Build, maintain, and automate Power BI dashboards and Excel reports for workforce metrics (e.g., HPPD, utilization, coverage, call-outs, agency usage, etc.).

• Create and maintain data models, charts, and visualizations that clearly tell a story.

• Develop and document standard reporting templates and refresh processes.

• Identify and correct inconsistencies between data sources.

• Support ad-hoc data analysis requests from leadership.

• (Preferred) Work with APIs, data connectors, and Power Automate/Power Query to automate data pulls directly from systems.





Qualifications

• 2+ years of experience as a Workforce Analyst, Data Analyst, or similar role.

• Advanced Excel skills (formulas, pivot tables, Power Query, macros preferred).

• Strong Power BI experience (DAX, data modeling, interactive dashboards).

• Solid understanding of data integrity, cleaning, and normalization.

• Experience combining data from multiple systems/sources.

• Excellent attention to detail and analytical thinking.

• (Preferred) Experience with APIs, Power Automate, Google Sheets, or other data connectors.

• (Preferred) Experience with workforce management, scheduling, or HR data.

• Strong communication skills in English.





What We Offer

• Full-time remote position based in the Philippines.

• Competitive compensation based on experience.

• Work with an international operations and analytics team.

• Growth opportunities into data engineering, automation, or operations leadership roles.



Schedule

• Full-Time

• Must be available during U.S. Eastern Standard Time business hours

If you are organized, dependable, and ready to support a fast-growing healthcare team, we encourage you to apply today.

title: Legal Assistant for U.S. Law Firm
description:

- Maintain organized digital files and tracking systems

- Communicate professionally with clients via
 and phone

- Proofread blog posts and legal content
