title: HR Agent – Talent Acquisition for No More Poor People (NMPP)
description:
About No More Poor People:

NMPP is a mission-driven non-profit using creativity, partnership, and technology to fight poverty and empower families. We believe the right people make all the difference in building stronger, safer communities.



Role Overview:

We’re looking for an HR Agent who is passionate about finding and bringing in top, innovative talent and unique skills to grow our team. You will play a key role in sourcing, screening, and onboarding people who have expertise in areas like AI, WordPress, CRM, social services, and more.



What You’ll Do:



Identify, attract, and recruit talented professionals who are creative, mission-driven, and ready to make an impact

Develop job postings that appeal to skilled candidates in AI, tech, and social support roles

Use online platforms (like onlinejobs.ph) and creative networking to reach diverse talent pools

Screen applicants, schedule interviews, and guide candidates through the hiring process

Work closely with leadership to understand skill gaps and build a team that supports NMPP’s goals

Help create an inclusive, positive hiring experience and culture

Maintain recruitment data and support onboarding for new hires

What We’re Looking For:



Experience with recruitment and talent acquisition, especially in remote or digital roles

Skilled at using digital job platforms, social media, and networking for talent searches

Understanding of (or interest in) roles related to AI, WordPress, CRM, and social support

Creative thinker who embraces new ways to find and assess talent

Friendly communicator and organized team player

Passion for social good and the NMPP mission

Why Join Us? You will also need to know the social service, customer support so you can become a live agent,

for ongoing work Plus...



Help shape a growing nonprofit with big dreams and a collaborative team

Flexible, remote work

Make a real community impact by building the best team possible

Sound like you? Apply now and help us bring together the innovators who will defeat poverty!

title: WordPress & AI Solutions Agent
description:
Job Title: Innovator Project Manager (Nonprofit Organizer)

Organization: No More Poor People (NMPP)

Location: Remote (Bay Area/Oakland preferred)

Reporting To: Director (Willie Green)



About Us

No More Poor People (NMPP) is a nonprofit on a mission to defeat poverty using advanced technology, innovative investments, and direct community support. We combine AI automation, live agents, job platforms like 
, cause-themed merchandise, and impact investing (
) to create a more sustainable and scalable solution for poverty in the Bay Area and beyond.



Role Overview

The Innovator Project Manager leads, implements, and optimizes NMPP’s unique business model—blending technology, direct service, and community organizing. You’ll manage day-to-day operations, launch innovative programs, oversee cross-functional teams (including remote agents), and constantly seek new ways to scale impact, revenue, and efficiency.



Key Responsibilities

Oversee daily operations of NMPP’s programs (client intake, job/gig matching, sponsorships, merch sales, Groundfloor investments, 211 housing project, etc.).

Manage and train a remote/virtual team of agents (including teams from onlinejobs.ph) providing support to clients and sponsors.

Lead the integration and automation of AI/chatbot-driven workflows (client intake, sponsor/client matchmaking, digital LED impact dashboard, CRM campaigns using Adwizar.ai).

Collaborate with insurance agents/partners, verify client eligibility, oversee policy management and tracking, and maintain compliance.

Build and refine the end-to-end customer journey for clients, sponsors, and donors—including digital communication, reporting, and success stories.

Track key performance metrics (clients placed, policies funded, jobs/gigs secured, investment returns, merchandise sales, etc.) and report to leadership/board.

Coordinate regular updates for the website, podcast, blog, and press releases with relevant tea
mbers.

Help develop and implement the AI-powered replacement for the outdated 211 housing system in the Bay Area.

Prepare impact reports, progress updates, and partnership/collaboration proposals.

Support board recruitment and governance operations as needed.

Problem-solve, innovate, and scale: always looking for ways to improve efficiency, impact, and donor/client satisfaction.

Key Skills & Qualifications

Strong experience in nonprofit, startup, or social enterprise project management.

Tech-savvy: experience with AI/automation, CRM systems, or digital tools (WordPress, campaign automations, dashboards).

Team-builder & communicator: comfortable managing both live and remote teams, motivating and coordinating diverse stakeholders.

Results-driven: proven track record of hitting metrics and scaling programs.

Highly organized, self-starter, and flexible—love turning vision into execution.

Familiarity with financial management, investment platforms, or donor/sponsor programs (bonus).

(Preferred but not required) Experience in the Bay Area social impact ecosystem.

Why Join?

Lead a first-of-its-kind model for fighting poverty combining tech, investment, and direct impact.

Work with a passionate founder and mission-driven board.

Grow your leadership and innovation portfolio while directly changing lives.

Competitive compensation, flexible/remote work, with high growth/impact potential.

Interested?

Send your resume and a brief statement (why you believe innovation and tech are key to solving poverty) to:



Subject: Innovator Project Manager Application

title: HubSpot Tracking Specialist
description:
HubSpot Tracking Specialist

Focus: Meta Campaign Lead Tracking & Attribution

Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented HubSpot Tracking Specialist to manage and maintain

accurate lead tracking for Meta advertising campaigns. This role is responsible for

monitoring the full lead journey from initial submission through contract/retainer signed,

ensuring proper attribution, clean data reporting, and accurate performance tracking

across HubSpot and Google Sheets.

This position requires strong analytical skills, consistency, and the ability to spot

discrepancies quickly.

Key Responsibilities

1. Daily HubSpot Management (Monday through Friday)

? Update and maintain HubSpot dashboards daily to ensure accurate reporting

? Review all new Meta leads and verify proper source and campaign attribution

? Monitor lead lifecycle stages and ensure accurate progression through the

pipeline

? Identify and correct data inconsistencies or misattributed leads

2. Lead Journey Tracking

? Track each lead from submission contract/retainer signed

? Ensure lead stages are updated accurately and in real time

? Confirm that contracts/retainers sent and signed are properly attributed to the

correct Meta campaign

? Flag any attribution overlap or discrepancies between campaign data and CRM

data

3. Google Sheets & Meta Spend Reporting

? Update internal tracking sheets daily, Monday through Friday

? Pull daily spend directly fro
ta Ads Manager and enter into the correct

campaign tracking sheet

? Ensure spend aligns with the correct campaign, date range, and reporting period



Benefits:

- Earn a salary rate of USD $6 - $8 per hour (based on experience and skills) for a full-time commitment of 40 hours per week.

- Work from Home, no commute!

- Healthcare insurance

- Paid time off and sick leaves

- Birthday bonus

- Referral bonus

- Annual performance bonus

- Retirement Plan and more!



Ready for this exciting journey? Apply now!

title: Graphic Desiner - Sign Industry
description:
**MUST HAVE SIGN INDUSTRY EXPERIENCE AND PROOF OF WORK**



Introduction:  We are a growing 144-year-old multi-service sign company searching for a dedicated, problem-solving, and reliable experienced graphic designer to join our team.  We operate with a friendly and positive family environment including offering an excellent comprehensive pay and benefit package.



Position Summary:  A full-service sign company graphic designer & production artist who is continuously learning, quality oriented, and hardworking.  We want you to grow and prosper with us.  Working with other designers, as needed, to manage multiple project workload and deadlines for creative design, branding, logos, wayfinding, and signage system’s shop drawings, production ready artwork, and more.  The design team collaborates with the sales and productions teams to provide customers creative, unique, and detailed design documentation packages for interior and exterior signage and architectural elements.  Software experience needed includes Adobe CC, mostly Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign.



SKILLS / ABILITIES / QUALIFICATIONS / EXPERIENCE – requirements & preferred:



Skills:



o Problem-solving focused, dependable, respectful, career-oriented, and have good organizational skills.

o Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and quality.

o Willingness to learn and take direction with a positive attitude.

o Excellent active listening and communication/ comprehension skills are required - must receive, understand, and follow detailed information through verbal and/or written communication.

o Must be able to read, understand, and interpret various documents such as; sales documents, mechanical/electrical drawings & schematics, BOMs, safety rules, work orders, procedure manuals, and related documentation.

o Basic math skills.

o Preferred – Be mechanically inclined.

o Preferred – Comfort with being around industrial equipment in a factory setting.

o 100% team player – must be able and willing to work both independently in team environment - we take this seriously.

• Abilities:

o Work in a medium sized office and shop facility with extensive activities including sitting, walking, standing, crouching, twisting, reaching, etc.

o Understand basic manufacturing and construction concepts.

o Adapt to changes in work assignments and environments.

o Effectively work under pressure to maintain schedules with quality work.

o Willing and able to work outside of regular business hours if/when needed - occasional weekends and weekday overtime are dictated by client demand and company needs.

o Handle work issues and resolve them while remaining positive and helpful.

o “Can do” attitude, a strong work ethic, tenacity, and grit - we take this seriously.



Qualifications:

o High school or GED diploma.  College level design education is preferred.

o Must be able to pass background check.



Experience/Knowledge:

o Required – 1+ years’ experience with graphic design experience with custom and architectural signage, as well as knowledge on how signs are fabricated for shop drawings.  

o Strongly Preferred – 5+ years’ experience with graphic design experience with custom and architectural signage, as well as knowledge on how signs are fabricated for shop drawings.  

o Strongly Preferred – Deep knowledge of processes, methods, tools, and equipment used in the sign industry to fabricate interior and exterior signs.

o Preferred – Knowledge of ADA regulations and signage code for interior sign packages for a variety of industries: healthcare, residential, commercial.

o Preferred – Expertise in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, and InDesign).

o Preferred – Proficient in Microsoft Office, including MS Word, PowerPoint, and Excel.

o Helpful – CAD and/or Solid Modeling experience (or willingness to learn on the job) to produce scaled drawings.



RESPONSIBILITIES & Required Daily/Periodic Activities – include, but are not limited to:



Specific – for Graphic Design role only:



o Most duties will consist of structural and ornamental design & documentation of common commercial signage.

o Creation of layouts for sign concepting, proofing, and permitting for clients. 

o Design and manufacturing documentation development for a variety of projects including wayfinding and signage systems, donor recognition programs, graphic packages, large scale exterior sign programs.

o Using documentation layout skills to develop easy to interpret dimensional proof sets and shop drawing of all signage to be sized and scaled for shop fabrication and visual renderings.  Showing multiple views of signs to capture detail of size, layers, proportions, fabrication materials, etc.

o Creating production-ready art for digital printing, routing, ADA engraving, screen printing, photopolymer, and vinyl cutting.  

o Read, understand, and apply sign message schedules onto proofing documentation.

o Accurately read, follow, and interpret drawings, specifications, and directions/instructions in written, oral, diagram or schedule form to ensure the clients specifications are met by translating and creating proofs/drawings/production files.

o Read and understand multi-level and multi-location site plans.

o Use of knowledge in typography, color, logos, branding, and design creation to prepare and illustrate impactful signage.

o Use of Excel/Word/Office software for message schedules.

o Use and general maintenance of desktop computer.

o Font (typeface) use and recognition including tracking, spacing, and sizing details.

o Detailed attention to color tint and shades. 

o Understand floor plans from architects or consultant designers.

o Understand, or quickly learn, the installation methods for each sign type – exterior and interior.

o Support sales process with knowledge of graphic design-related technology, products, and applications.

o Work with shop leads, the Production Manager, and others in the production team to ensure production goals for proofs/drawings/production files are met in an environment of teamwork.

o Communication with production shop personnel about production and fabrication details.

o Maintain work area and equipment in a clean and safe manner.

o Maintains time records accurately - including daily timesheets.

• General – all shop/install/manufacturing employees:

o Safety First - work safely.  

o Regular, consistent, and punctual attendance.  Reliable transportation required.

o Present yourself professionally while working – including core values of Safety, Courtesy, Integrity, & Exceptional Customer Service.

o Follow all company processes and policies with regard to safety, security, quality control, material handling, and productivity - and contribute ideas for improvement to the team as we continue to grow.

o Demonstrate problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

o Effectively manage time and priorities to meet deadlines.

o Be a productive tea
mber with a strong work ethic.

o Be open to and responds to coaching and feedback on work approach and goal achievement and seek guidance on areas of improvement.

o Effectively and continuously communicate status of ongoing work activities to your supervisor/manager.

o Work cooperatively and build/maintain positive working relationships on a diverse team with team peers, management, suppliers, and customers.

o We are a growing company, so we all wear many different hats and occasionally perform other duties - your willingness to do the same, as assigned by department leads or company management, is required.

title: Senior Accountant – Xero Expert
description:
[IMPORTANT: Failure to follow the application instructions will result in automatic disqualification.]



We are looking for a Senior Accountant who is still highly hands-on with bookkeeping tasks to join our growing international team.



We are specifically looking for someone who:

- Has senior-level accounting knowledge

- Is comfortable doing day-to-day bookkeeping work

- Can own the numbers while still doing the work themselves



What This Role Is

This role is ideal for someone who:

- Understands financial reporting and business performance

- But is also happy to:

> reconcile accounts

> clean up books

> process transactions

> work directly in Xero daily

You will be responsible for both execution AND insight.



What You’ll Do

- Hands-On Bookkeeping (Core Responsibility)

- Perform daily bookkeeping tasks inside Xero

- Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, and transactions

- Clean up and maintain accurate financial records

- Handle transaction coding and categorization



Financial Management

- Maintain accurate general ledger

- Ensure financial data integrity across all accounts



Financial Reporting

Prepare:

- Monthly Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cash Flow reports

- Identify trends and provide insights to management



Accounts Payable & Receivable

- Manage invoices, payments, and collections

- Track outstanding balances



Payroll Support

- Assist with payroll processing and accuracy



Tax & Compliance Support

- Assist with BAS and GST reporting

- Maintain compliance with Australian standards



Budgeting & Forecasting

- Support budgeting and financial planning

- Assist with cost tracking and projections



Xero Ownership

- Manage and maintain Xero daily

- Improve and optimize accounting processes



What We’re Looking For

- Senior Accountant (Hands-On)

- 3+ years experience in accounting/bookkeeping

- Must be comfortable doing both senior-level thinking AND daily bookkeeping tasks



Xero Expertise (Required)

- Strong working knowledge of Xero

Able to perform:

- reconciliation

- reporting

- account setup

- troubleshooting



Australian Accounting Knowledge (Preferred)

Experience with:

- BAS

- GST

- Australian compliance



Strong Accounting Fundamentals

Understanding of:

- accruals

- journal entries

- financial statements



Detail-Oriented & Organized

- High accuracy in financial records

- Strong time management skills



Communication Skills

- Clear English communication

- Ability to explain financial data simply



Bonus Points

- Experience with Australian clients

- CPA or accounting degree and certification

- Experience with growing businesses or startups

- Experience improving accounting systems or workflows



Why Join Us

- Fully remote role

- Work with an international team

- Stable, long-term opportunity

- Opportunity to grow into a Finance Lead role

- Make a real impact on business decisions



How to Apply

To be considered, you MUST submit:

1. CV

2. Portfolio (Google Drive Folder)

Include:

- Resume

- Sample financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet)

- Reconciliation samples

- Any dashboards or reports

Make sure access is set to “Anyone with the link”

3. Short Video (1–2 minutes)

Please answer:

- Your accounting experience

- Your experience with Xero

- Your experience with Australian clients

- Are you comfortable doing hands-on bookkeeping daily? (Important)



[Applications without ALL requirements will not be reviewed.]

title: Virtual Assistant – GoHighLevel Website Builder & Cold Caller (GoHighLevel Expert Only)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Virtual Assistant who specializes in GoHighLevel. The ideal candidate must have strong experience building websites, funnels, and landing pages specifically inside GoHighLevel. This role also requires cold calling and lead generation experience.



?? Important:

This job is ONLY for candidates with real experience using GoHighLevel.

If you mainly build websites using WordPress, Wix, Shopify, or other platforms, this role is not a fit.



Responsibilities:



Build and design websites inside GoHighLevel



Create landing pages and sales funnels in GoHighLevel



Set up forms, calendars, pipelines, and automations



Connect domains and manage GoHighLevel website settings



Maintain and update existing websites and funnels

About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

- Build and maintain a full sales pipeline

- Conduct outbound sales calls and
s to potential clients, qualifying and advancing leads

- Acquire new clients to meet and exceed monthly revenue targets



What We’re Looking For

- This is a full-time remote position.

- Available to work during U.S. business hours (7 AM–3 PM PST), Monday to Friday.

- Proven success in outbound sales

- Strong communication and objection-handling skills

- Native-level English fluency

- Familiarity in CRM tool (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus



What You’ll Need (System Requirements):

- A desktop or laptop computer

- A quiet home workspace

- A noise-cancelling headset



Why Join Haulla?

- Base salary plus uncapped commission and performance-based bonuses

- Incentives: Employee referral bonuses, recurring bonuses on big accounts, task bonuses, etc

- 4-week paid training ($400 awarded for training + commission)



Commissions are unlimited!

- Top performers earn ?100,000–130,000/month

- The most recent top performer earned ?350,000 in a single month!



How to Apply
